Conclusion: WorldStereo通过几何记忆模块有效解决了视频扩散模型在相机控制和3D一致性方面的挑战，为3D场景生成提供了高效、高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in foundational Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) have yielded significant progress. Yet, despite the remarkable visual quality of generated videos, reconstructing consistent 3D scenes from these outputs remains challenging, due to limited camera controllability and inconsistent generated content when viewed from distinct camera trajectories. In this paper, we propose WorldStereo, a novel framework that bridges camera-guided video generation and 3D reconstruction via two dedicated geometric memory modules. Formally, the global-geometric memory enables precise camera control while injecting coarse structural priors through incrementally updated point clouds. Moreover, the spatial-stereo memory constrains the model's attention receptive fields with 3D correspondence to focus on fine-grained details from the memory bank. These components enable WorldStereo to generate multi-view-consistent videos under precise camera control, facilitating high-quality 3D reconstruction. Furthermore, the flexible control branch-based WorldStereo shows impressive efficiency, benefiting from the distribution matching distilled VDM backbone without joint training. Extensive experiments across both camera-guided video generation and 3D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Notably, we show that WorldStereo acts as a powerful world model, tackling diverse scene generation tasks (whether starting from perspective or panoramic images) with high-fidelity 3D results. Models will be released.

</details>


### [298] [ORGAN: Object-Centric Representation Learning using Cycle Consistent Generative Adversarial Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02063)
*Joël Küchler,Ellen van Maren,Vaiva Vasiliauskaitė,Katarina Vulić,Reza Abbasi-Asl,Stephan J. Ihle*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ORGAN是一种基于循环一致性生成对抗网络的对象中心表示学习方法，相比传统自编码器方法，在处理复杂真实世界数据集方面表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然数据生成容易，但从数据中提取信息却很困难。对象中心表示学习能够以无监督方式从图像中提取信息，但现有方法主要基于自编码器架构，在处理复杂真实世界数据时存在局限性。

Method: 提出ORGAN方法，基于循环一致性生成对抗网络进行对象中心表示学习，通过将图像分割为子组件（对象）并在低维潜在空间中表示每个对象。

Result: 在合成数据集上表现与其他最先进方法相当，同时是唯一能够处理具有多个对象和低视觉对比度的复杂真实世界数据集的方法。能够创建富有表现力的潜在空间表示，支持对象操作，并且在对象数量和图像大小方面具有良好的可扩展性。

Conclusion: ORGAN为对象中心表示学习提供了一种新的生成对抗网络方法，相比现有自编码器方法在处理复杂真实世界数据时具有独特优势，具有良好的可扩展性和表达能力。

Abstract: Although data generation is often straightforward, extracting information from data is more difficult. Object-centric representation learning can extract information from images in an unsupervised manner. It does so by segmenting an image into its subcomponents: the objects. Each object is then represented in a low-dimensional latent space that can be used for downstream processing. Object-centric representation learning is dominated by autoencoder architectures (AEs). Here, we present ORGAN, a novel approach for object-centric representation learning, which is based on cycle-consistent Generative Adversarial Networks instead. We show that it performs similarly to other state-of-the-art approaches on synthetic datasets, while at the same time being the only approach tested here capable of handling more challenging real-world datasets with many objects and low visual contrast. Complementing these results, ORGAN creates expressive latent space representations that allow for object manipulation. Finally, we show that ORGAN scales well both with respect to the number of objects and the size of the images, giving it a unique edge over current state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


### [299] [MMNavAgent: Multi-Magnification WSI Navigation Agent for Clinically Consistent Whole-Slide Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02079)
*Zhengyang Xu,Han Li,Jingsong Liu,Linrui Xie,Xun Ma,Xin You,Shihui Zu,Ayako Ito,Xinyu Hao,Hongming Xu,Shaohua Kevin Zhou,Nassir Navab,Peter J. Schüffler*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MMNavAgent，一种临床一致的多倍率WSI导航代理，通过跨倍率交互和自适应倍率选择来模拟病理学家真实诊断工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI导航方法通常在单一固定倍率下操作或依赖预定义倍率遍历，无法模拟病理学家在临床实践中跨多个倍率检查、动态整合全局和细胞证据的序列决策过程。

Method: 提出MMNavAgent，包含两个核心组件：跨倍率导航工具（CMT）聚合相邻倍率上下文信息增强表征；倍率选择工具（MST）利用记忆驱动推理实现交互式自适应倍率选择。

Result: 在公开数据集上实验显示，相比非代理基线，AUC提升1.45%，BACC提升2.93%，诊断性能显著改善。

Conclusion: MMNavAgent通过模拟病理学家的多倍率交互和自适应倍率选择过程，实现了更临床一致的WSI诊断导航，代码将在接受后公开。

Abstract: Recent AI navigation approaches aim to improve Whole-Slide Image (WSI) diagnosis by modeling spatial exploration and selecting diagnostically relevant regions, yet most operate at a single fixed magnification or rely on predefined magnification traversal. In clinical practice, pathologists examine slides across multiple magnifications and selectively inspect only necessary scales, dynamically integrating global and cellular evidence in a sequential manner. This mismatch prevents existing methods from modeling cross-magnification interactions and adaptive magnification selection inherent to real diagnostic workflows. To these, we propose a clinically consistent Multi-Magnification WSI Navigation Agent (MMNavAgent) that explicitly models multi magnification interaction and adaptive magnification selection. Specifically, we introduce a Cross-Magnification navigation Tool (CMT) that aggregates contextual information from adjacent magnifications to enhance discriminative representations along the navigation path. We further introduce a Magnification Selection Tool (MST) that leverages memory-driven reasoning within the agent framework to enable interactive and adaptive magnification selection, mimicking the sequential decision process of pathologists. Extensive experiments on a public dataset demonstrate improved diagnostic performance, with 1.45% gain of AUC and 2.93% gain of BACC over a non-agent baseline. Code will be public upon acceptance.

</details>


### [300] [FluxMem: Adaptive Hierarchical Memory for Streaming Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02096)
*Yiweng Xie,Bo He,Junke Wang,Xiangyu Zheng,Ziyi Ye,Zuxuan Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FluxMem是一个无需训练的高效流视频理解框架，通过自适应压缩冗余视觉记忆，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算和内存开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流视频理解需要处理大量连续帧，存在显著的视觉冗余，导致高计算和内存开销。现有方法要么性能不足，要么需要手动调优压缩率。

Method: 采用分层两阶段设计：1) 时间相邻选择(TAS)模块去除相邻帧间的冗余视觉标记；2) 空间域整合(SDC)模块合并每帧内空间重复区域。引入自适应标记压缩机制，基于场景统计自动确定压缩率。

Result: 在流视频基准测试中达到SOTA：StreamingBench 76.4，OVO-Bench 67.2(实时设置)，同时降低OVO-Bench延迟69.9%和峰值GPU内存34.5%。离线性能也保持强劲，MLVU达到73.1，使用视觉标记减少65%。

Conclusion: FluxMem通过自适应压缩冗余视觉记忆，实现了高效流视频理解，在性能、延迟和内存效率方面取得显著提升，无需训练且自动适应动态场景。

Abstract: This paper presents FluxMem, a training-free framework for efficient streaming video understanding. FluxMem adaptively compresses redundant visual memory through a hierarchical, two-stage design: (1) a Temporal Adjacency Selection (TAS) module removes redundant visual tokens across adjacent frames, and (2) a Spatial Domain Consolidation (SDC) module further merges spatially repetitive regions within each frame into compact representations. To adapt effectively to dynamic scenes, we introduce a self-adaptive token compression mechanism in both TAS and SDC, which automatically determines the compression rate based on intrinsic scene statistics rather than manual tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FluxMem achieves new state-of-the-art results on existing online video benchmarks, reaching 76.4 on StreamingBench and 67.2 on OVO-Bench under real-time settings, while reducing latency by 69.9% and peak GPU memory by 34.5% on OVO-Bench. Furthermore, it maintains strong offline performance, achieving 73.1 on MLVU while using 65% fewer visual tokens.

</details>


### [301] [A 3D mesh convolution-based autoencoder for geometry compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02125)
*Germain Bregeon,Marius Preda,Radu Ispas,Titus Zaharia*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于3D网格卷积的自动编码器，用于不规则网格的几何压缩，无需预处理或流形/水密性条件，在重建和分类任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要预处理或对网格有特殊要求（如流形/水密性），限制了处理不规则网格数据的能力。需要一种能够直接处理任意网格结构且无需额外条件的压缩方法。

Method: 使用3D网格卷积自动编码器，直接从网格面片学习特征，通过专用池化和反池化操作保持连接性。编码器将输入压缩到紧凑的基础网格空间，解码器重建原始连接性和几何细节。

Result: 在多类数据集上的实验表明，该方法在3D网格几何重建和潜在空间分类任务上均优于现有最先进方法，且代码已开源。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能够有效处理不规则网格数据，无需预处理或特殊条件限制，在压缩重建和特征学习方面表现出色，为3D网格处理提供了新思路。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel 3D mesh convolution-based autoencoder for geometry compression, able to deal with irregular mesh data without requiring neither preprocessing nor manifold/watertightness conditions. The proposed approach extracts meaningful latent representations by learning features directly from the mesh faces, while preserving connectivity through dedicated pooling and unpooling operations. The encoder compresses the input mesh into a compact base mesh space, which ensures that the latent space remains comparable. The decoder reconstructs the original connectivity and restores the compressed geometry to its full resolution. Extensive experiments on multi-class datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both 3D mesh geometry reconstruction and latent space classification tasks. Code available at: github.com/germainGB/MeshConv3D

</details>


### [302] [LiftAvatar: Kinematic-Space Completion for Expression-Controlled 3D Gaussian Avatar Animation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02129)
*Hualiang Wei,Shunran Jia,Jialun Liu,Wenhui Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LiftAvatar是一个新的范式，通过将稀疏单目观测数据提升到更丰富的运动学表示空间，来增强3D虚拟角色的动画质量。它使用大规模视频扩散Transformer生成高质量、时序一致的表情序列，并作为即插即用增强器提升现有3D角色方法的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决基于单目视频的3D高斯泼溅虚拟角色由于稀疏运动学线索导致的表达能力有限和重建伪影问题。日常单目视频通常只包含有限的头部姿态和表情变化，这限制了3D角色的重建质量和动画效果。

Method: 1. 将稀疏输入数据提升到更丰富的运动学表示空间
2. 使用细粒度、表情可控的大规模视频扩散Transformer
3. 引入多粒度表情控制方案：结合着色图和表情系数
4. 多参考条件机制：聚合多帧的互补线索
5. 作为即插即用增强器，将大规模视频生成模型的先验知识蒸馏到3D管道中

Result: 实验表明LiftAvatar能够持续提升最先进3D虚拟角色方法的动画质量和量化指标，特别是在极端、未见过的表情下表现优异。它显著增强了3D高斯泼溅虚拟角色的表达能力和重建质量。

Conclusion: LiftAvatar通过将稀疏单目观测提升到运动学空间，并利用大规模视频生成模型的先验知识，有效解决了3D虚拟角色在稀疏输入下的重建和动画质量问题。该方法作为一个通用的增强模块，能够显著提升现有3D角色方法的性能。

Abstract: We present LiftAvatar, a new paradigm that completes sparse monocular observations in kinematic space (e.g., facial expressions and head pose) and uses the completed signals to drive high-fidelity avatar animation. LiftAvatar is a fine-grained, expression-controllable large-scale video diffusion Transformer that synthesizes high-quality, temporally coherent expression sequences conditioned on single or multiple reference images. The key idea is to lift incomplete input data into a richer kinematic representation, thereby strengthening both reconstruction and animation in downstream 3D avatar pipelines. To this end, we introduce (i) a multi-granularity expression control scheme that combines shading maps with expression coefficients for precise and stable driving, and (ii) a multi-reference conditioning mechanism that aggregates complementary cues from multiple frames, enabling strong 3D consistency and controllability. As a plug-and-play enhancer, LiftAvatar directly addresses the limited expressiveness and reconstruction artifacts of 3D Gaussian Splatting-based avatars caused by sparse kinematic cues in everyday monocular videos. By expanding incomplete observations into diverse pose-expression variations, LiftAvatar also enables effective prior distillation from large-scale video generative models into 3D pipelines, leading to substantial gains. Extensive experiments show that LiftAvatar consistently boosts animation quality and quantitative metrics of state-of-the-art 3D avatar methods, especially under extreme, unseen expressions.

</details>


### [303] [Stereo-Inertial Poser: Towards Metric-Accurate Shape-Aware Motion Capture Using Sparse IMUs and a Single Stereo Camera](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02130)
*Tutian Tang,Xingyu Ji,Yutong Li,MingHao Liu,Wenqiang Xu,Cewu Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Stereo-Inertial Poser是一个实时运动捕捉系统，使用单立体相机和6个IMU传感器，通过融合立体视觉和IMU数据，实现度量精确、形状感知的3D人体运动估计，解决单目深度模糊和忽略人体形态变化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-惯性运动捕捉系统虽然结合单目相机和稀疏IMU解决了遮挡和漂移问题，但仍存在两个关键限制：1) 单目深度模糊导致的全局平移度量不准确；2) 忽略人体形态变化的形状无关局部运动估计。

Method: 使用单立体相机和6个IMU传感器。立体视觉通过校准基线几何解决深度模糊，直接提取3D关键点和估计身体形状参数。IMU数据和视觉线索融合预测漂移补偿的关节位置和根运动。新颖的形状感知融合模块动态协调人体测量变化与全局平移。端到端管道无需基于优化的后处理。

Result: 系统达到200+ FPS，支持实时部署。定量评估在各种数据集上显示最先进的性能。定性结果表明：长时间录制下产生无漂移的全局平移，并减少脚滑效应。

Conclusion: Stereo-Inertial Poser通过立体视觉和IMU的协同融合，实现了度量精确、形状感知的实时3D人体运动捕捉，有效解决了单目深度模糊和忽略人体形态变化的问题。

Abstract: Recent advancements in visual-inertial motion capture systems have demonstrated the potential of combining monocular cameras with sparse inertial measurement units (IMUs) as cost-effective solutions, which effectively mitigate occlusion and drift issues inherent in single-modality systems. However, they are still limited by metric inaccuracies in global translations stemming from monocular depth ambiguity, and shape-agnostic local motion estimations that ignore anthropometric variations. We present Stereo-Inertial Poser, a real-time motion capture system that leverages a single stereo camera and six IMUs to estimate metric-accurate and shape-aware 3D human motion. By replacing the monocular RGB with stereo vision, our system resolves depth ambiguity through calibrated baseline geometry, enabling direct 3D keypoint extraction and body shape parameter estimation. IMU data and visual cues are fused for predicting drift-compensated joint positions and root movements, while a novel shape-aware fusion module dynamically harmonizes anthropometry variations with global translations. Our end-to-end pipeline achieves over 200 FPS without optimization-based post-processing, enabling real-time deployment. Quantitative evaluations across various datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Qualitative results show our method produces drift-free global translation under a long recording time and reduces foot-skating effects.

</details>


### [304] [SimRecon: SimReady Compositional Scene Reconstruction from Real Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02133)
*Chong Xia,Kai Zhu,Zizhuo Wang,Fangfu Liu,Zhizheng Zhang,Yueqi Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SimRecon是一个用于杂乱场景重建的"感知-生成-模拟"框架，通过场景级语义重建、单对象生成和模拟器组装实现组合式场景重建，并引入主动视角优化和场景图合成器解决视觉保真度和物理合理性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的组合式重建方法主要关注视觉外观，在真实场景中的泛化能力有限。为了解决这一问题，需要开发能够处理复杂杂乱场景、同时保证视觉保真度和物理合理性的重建框架。

Method: 提出SimRecon框架，包含三个阶段：1) 从视频输入进行场景级语义重建(感知)；2) 单对象生成(生成)；3) 在模拟器中组装这些资产(模拟)。为解决视觉保真度和物理合理性问题，引入两个关键模块：主动视角优化(用于感知到生成的过渡)和场景图合成器(用于生成到模拟的过渡)。

Result: 在ScanNet数据集上的大量实验验证了该方法优于之前的最先进方法，在复杂场景重建中表现出更好的性能。

Conclusion: SimRecon通过"感知-生成-模拟"管道实现了组合式场景重建，通过主动视角优化和场景图合成器有效解决了视觉保真度和物理合理性问题，为复杂杂乱场景的重建提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Compositional scene reconstruction seeks to create object-centric representations rather than holistic scenes from real-world videos, which is natively applicable for simulation and interaction. Conventional compositional reconstruction approaches primarily emphasize on visual appearance and show limited generalization ability to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose SimRecon, a framework that realizes a "Perception-Generation-Simulation" pipeline towards cluttered scene reconstruction, which first conducts scene-level semantic reconstruction from video input, then performs single-object generation, and finally assembles these assets in the simulator. However, naively combining these three stages leads to visual infidelity of generated assets and physical implausibility of the final scene, a problem particularly severe for complex scenes. Thus, we further propose two bridging modules between the three stages to address this problem. To be specific, for the transition from Perception to Generation, critical for visual fidelity, we introduce Active Viewpoint Optimization, which actively searches in 3D space to acquire optimal projected images as conditions for single-object completion. Moreover, for the transition from Generation to Simulation, essential for physical plausibility, we propose a Scene Graph Synthesizer, which guides the construction from scratch in 3D simulators, mirroring the native, constructive principle of the real world. Extensive experiments on the ScanNet dataset validate our method's superior performance over previous state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


### [305] [OnlineX: Unified Online 3D Reconstruction and Understanding with Active-to-Stable State Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02134)
*Chong Xia,Fangfu Liu,Yule Wang,Yize Pang,Yueqi Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OnlineX：一个前馈框架，通过解耦主动-稳定状态演化范式，实现仅使用流式图像的在线3D视觉外观和语言场重建，解决了累积漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可泛化3D高斯溅射方法主要遵循离线重建范式，缺乏连续重建能力，限制了其在机器人、VR/AR等在线场景中的应用。在线重建面临累积漂移的核心挑战，源于内存状态在捕获高频局部几何（主动角色）和保持长期全局结构（稳定角色）之间的根本冲突。

Method: 1. 提出解耦的主动-稳定状态演化范式：将内存状态分离为专用主动状态和持久稳定状态，然后将前者信息融合到后者以实现保真度和稳定性。2. 联合建模视觉外观和语言场。3. 引入隐式高斯融合模块提升重建质量。4. 仅使用流式图像进行前馈在线重建。

Result: 在主流数据集上，该方法在新视角合成和语义理解方面持续优于先前工作，在不同长度输入序列上展现出鲁棒性能，并具备实时推理速度。

Conclusion: OnlineX通过解耦主动-稳定状态演化范式，成功解决了在线3D重建中的累积漂移问题，实现了高质量的视觉外观和语言场在线重建，为机器人、VR/AR等在线应用场景提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled rapid 3D scene reconstruction within seconds, eliminating the need for per-scene optimization. However, existing methods primarily follow an offline reconstruction paradigm, lacking the capacity for continuous reconstruction, which limits their applicability to online scenarios such as robotics and VR/AR. In this paper, we introduce OnlineX, a feed-forward framework that reconstructs both 3D visual appearance and language fields in an online manner using only streaming images. A key challenge in online formulation is the cumulative drift issue, which is rooted in the fundamental conflict between two opposing roles of the memory state: an active role that constantly refreshes to capture high-frequency local geometry, and a stable role that conservatively accumulates and preserves the long-term global structure. To address this, we introduce a decoupled active-to-stable state evolution paradigm. Our framework decouples the memory state into a dedicated active state and a persistent stable state, and then cohesively fuses the information from the former into the latter to achieve both fidelity and stability. Moreover, we jointly model visual appearance and language fields and incorporate an implicit Gaussian fusion module to enhance reconstruction quality. Experiments on mainstream datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior work in novel view synthesis and semantic understanding, showcasing robust performance across input sequences of varying lengths with real-time inference speed.

</details>


### [306] [OmniLottie: Generating Vector Animations via Parameterized Lottie Tokens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02138)
*Yiying Yang,Wei Cheng,Sijin Chen,Honghao Fu,Xianfang Zeng,Yujun Cai,Gang Yu,Xingjun Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OmniLottie是一个从多模态指令生成高质量矢量动画的框架，通过专门设计的Lottie分词器将JSON文件转换为结构化序列，并基于预训练视觉语言模型实现动画生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Lottie格式的JSON文件包含大量不变的结构元数据和格式化标记，这给学习矢量动画生成带来了显著挑战，需要一种有效的方法来处理这种复杂格式并实现从多模态指令生成动画。

Method: 1. 设计专门的Lottie分词器，将JSON文件转换为结构化的命令和参数序列，表示形状、动画函数和控制参数；2. 基于预训练视觉语言模型构建OmniLottie框架；3. 创建MMLottie-2M大规模数据集，包含专业设计的矢量动画及其文本和视觉标注。

Result: OmniLottie能够生成生动且语义对齐的矢量动画，能够紧密遵循多模态人类指令。通过大量实验验证了该框架的有效性。

Conclusion: OmniLottie通过专门的分词器处理Lottie格式的复杂性，结合预训练模型和大规模数据集，成功实现了从多模态指令生成高质量矢量动画的目标，为矢量动画生成研究提供了重要进展。

Abstract: OmniLottie is a versatile framework that generates high quality vector animations from multi-modal instructions. For flexible motion and visual content control, we focus on Lottie, a light weight JSON formatting for both shapes and animation behaviors representation. However, the raw Lottie JSON files contain extensive invariant structural metadata and formatting tokens, posing significant challenges for learning vector animation generation. Therefore, we introduce a well designed Lottie tokenizer that transforms JSON files into structured sequences of commands and parameters representing shapes, animation functions and control parameters. Such tokenizer enables us to build OmniLottie upon pretrained vision language models to follow multi-modal interleaved instructions and generate high quality vector animations. To further advance research in vector animation generation, we curate MMLottie-2M, a large scale dataset of professionally designed vector animations paired with textual and visual annotations. With extensive experiments, we validate that OmniLottie can produce vivid and semantically aligned vector animations that adhere closely to multi modal human instructions.

</details>


### [307] [3D Field of Junctions: A Noise-Robust, Training-Free Structural Prior for Volumetric Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02149)
*Namhoon Kim,Narges Moeini,Justin Romberg,Sara Fridovich-Keil*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出3D Field of Junctions表示法，用于三维体积去噪和重建，在低信噪比条件下保持边缘和角点结构，无需训练数据，适用于多种三维成像任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多三维成像逆问题面临高测量噪声，现有方法难以在低信噪比下保持三维结构的锐利边缘和角点特征，且基于学习的方法存在幻觉风险。

Method: 提出完全三维的Field of Junctions表示，优化每个三维块的最佳三维楔形连接，同时鼓励重叠块之间的一致性。可作为结构先验，通过投影或近端梯度下降应用于任何低信噪比体积逆问题。

Result: 在低剂量CT、冷冻电子断层扫描和点云去噪等低信噪比三维成像任务中，3D FoJ在体积重建和去噪方面优于传统和神经方法。

Conclusion: 3D Field of Junctions是一种有效的无训练数据三维去噪表示方法，能在低信噪比下保持结构特征，适用于多种三维成像逆问题。

Abstract: Volume denoising is a foundational problem in computational imaging, as many 3D imaging inverse problems face high levels of measurement noise. Inspired by the strong 2D image denoising properties of Field of Junctions (ICCV 2021), we propose a novel, fully volumetric 3D Field of Junctions (3D FoJ) representation that optimizes a junction of 3D wedges that best explain each 3D patch of a full volume, while encouraging consistency between overlapping patches. In addition to direct volume denoising, we leverage our 3D FoJ representation as a structural prior that: (i) requires no training data, and thus precludes the risk of hallucination, (ii) preserves and enhances sharp edge and corner structures in 3D, even under low signal to noise ratio (SNR), and (iii) can be used as a drop-in denoising representation via projected or proximal gradient descent for any volumetric inverse problem with low SNR. We demonstrate successful volume reconstruction and denoising with 3D FoJ across three diverse 3D imaging tasks with low-SNR measurements: low-dose X-ray computed tomography (CT), cryogenic electron tomography (cryo-ET), and denoising point clouds such as those from lidar in adverse weather. Across these challenging low-SNR volumetric imaging problems, 3D FoJ outperforms a mixture of classical and neural methods.

</details>


### [308] [Bridging the gap between Performance and Interpretability: An Explainable Disentangled Multimodal Framework for Cancer Survival Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02162)
*Aniek Eijpe,Soufyan Lakbir,Melis Erdal Cesur,Sara P. Oliveira,Angelos Chatzimparmpas,Sanne Abeln,Wilson Silva*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DIMAFx是一个可解释的多模态癌症生存预测框架，通过解耦病理切片图像和转录组数据的模态特异性和模态共享表示，在保持高性能的同时提供生物学解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态生存预测模型虽然准确率提高，但复杂度增加导致可解释性降低，限制了理解不同数据源如何影响预测的能力，阻碍了在精准医学中的应用。

Method: 提出DIMAFx框架，从组织病理学全切片图像和转录组数据中生成解耦的、可解释的模态特异性和模态共享表示，结合SHAP解释技术分析多模态交互和生物学信息。

Result: 在多个癌症队列中，DIMAFx实现了最先进的性能并改善了表示解耦。在乳腺癌生存预测中，最具预测性的特征包含模态共享信息，如捕获实体肿瘤形态并关联雌激素反应通路，以及捕获微环境信号的模态特异性特征。

Conclusion: 多模态模型可以克服性能与可解释性之间的传统权衡，支持其在精准医学中的应用，通过解耦表示提供有意义的生物学见解。

Abstract: While multimodal survival prediction models are increasingly more accurate, their complexity often reduces interpretability, limiting insight into how different data sources influence predictions. To address this, we introduce DIMAFx, an explainable multimodal framework for cancer survival prediction that produces disentangled, interpretable modality-specific and modality-shared representations from histopathology whole-slide images and transcriptomics data. Across multiple cancer cohorts, DIMAFx achieves state-of-the-art performance and improved representation disentanglement. Leveraging its interpretable design and SHapley Additive exPlanations, DIMAFx systematically reveals key multimodal interactions and the biological information encoded in the disentangled representations. In breast cancer survival prediction, the most predictive features contain modality-shared information, including one capturing solid tumor morphology contextualized primarily by late estrogen response, where higher-grade morphology aligned with pathway upregulation and increased risk, consistent with known breast cancer biology. Key modality-specific features capture microenvironmental signals from interacting adipose and stromal morphologies. These results show that multimodal models can overcome the traditional trade-off between performance and explainability, supporting their application in precision medicine.

</details>


### [309] [GeoDiT: Point-Conditioned Diffusion Transformer for Satellite Image Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02172)
*Srikumar Sastry,Dan Cher,Brian Wei,Aayush Dhakal,Subash Khanal,Dev Gupta,Nathan Jacobs*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoDiT是一个用于文本到卫星图像生成的扩散变换器，通过基于点的控制框架实现灵活控制，无需像素级地图，使用自适应局部注意力机制，在卫星图像生成方面超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有卫星图像生成模型通常需要耗时的像素级地图作为控制信号，但这些地图语义信息有限。需要一种更灵活、语义更丰富的控制方法。

Method: 提出基于点的条件框架，通过点的空间位置和每个点的文本描述控制生成过程。引入自适应局部注意力机制，根据输入点查询有效正则化注意力分数。系统评估了卫星图像表示对齐和地理位置表示等设计选择。

Result: GeoDiT在生成性能上表现出色，超越了最先进的遥感生成模型，实现了灵活、标注友好且计算简单的推理。

Conclusion: GeoDiT通过基于点的控制框架为卫星图像生成提供了语义丰富且灵活的控制方式，在遥感图像生成领域取得了显著进展。

Abstract: We introduce GeoDiT, a diffusion transformer designed for text-to-satellite image generation with point-based control. Existing controlled satellite image generative models often require pixel-level maps that are time-consuming to acquire, yet semantically limited. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel point-based conditioning framework that controls the generation process through the spatial location of the points and the textual description associated with each point, providing semantically rich control signals. This approach enables flexible, annotation-friendly, and computationally simple inference for satellite image generation. To this end, we introduce an adaptive local attention mechanism that effectively regularizes the attention scores based on the input point queries. We systematically evaluate various domain-specific design choices for training GeoDiT, including the selection of satellite image representation for alignment and geolocation representation for conditioning. Our experiments demonstrate that GeoDiT achieves impressive generation performance, surpassing the state-of-the-art remote sensing generative models.

</details>


### [310] [Kiwi-Edit: Versatile Video Editing via Instruction and Reference Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02175)
*Yiqi Lin,Guoqiang Liang,Ziyun Zeng,Zechen Bai,Yanzhe Chen,Mike Zheng Shou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个可扩展的数据生成管道RefVIE，用于解决指令引导视频编辑中视觉控制不精确的问题，并设计了统一的编辑架构Kiwi-Edit，通过渐进式多阶段训练在可控视频编辑上达到新的SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于指令的视频编辑方法难以实现精确的视觉控制，因为自然语言在描述复杂视觉细节方面存在固有局限。虽然参考引导编辑提供了稳健解决方案，但高质量配对训练数据的稀缺限制了其潜力。

Method: 1. 提出可扩展的数据生成管道，利用图像生成模型将现有视频编辑对转换为高质量训练四元组；2. 构建大规模数据集RefVIE和评估基准RefVIE-Bench；3. 设计统一编辑架构Kiwi-Edit，结合可学习查询和潜在视觉特征进行参考语义引导；4. 采用渐进式多阶段训练课程。

Result: 通过RefVIE数据集和Kiwi-Edit架构，在指令跟随和参考保真度方面取得显著提升，在可控视频编辑任务上建立了新的最先进水平。

Conclusion: 该研究通过创新的数据生成管道和统一架构，有效解决了指令引导视频编辑中的精确视觉控制问题，为可控视频编辑领域提供了新的解决方案和基准。

Abstract: Instruction-based video editing has witnessed rapid progress, yet current methods often struggle with precise visual control, as natural language is inherently limited in describing complex visual nuances. Although reference-guided editing offers a robust solution, its potential is currently bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality paired training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce a scalable data generation pipeline that transforms existing video editing pairs into high-fidelity training quadruplets, leveraging image generative models to create synthesized reference scaffolds. Using this pipeline, we construct RefVIE, a large-scale dataset tailored for instruction-reference-following tasks, and establish RefVIE-Bench for comprehensive evaluation. Furthermore, we propose a unified editing architecture, Kiwi-Edit, that synergizes learnable queries and latent visual features for reference semantic guidance. Our model achieves significant gains in instruction following and reference fidelity via a progressive multi-stage training curriculum. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our data and architecture establish a new state-of-the-art in controllable video editing. All datasets, models, and code is released at https://github.com/showlab/Kiwi-Edit.

</details>


### [311] [HiFi-Inpaint: Towards High-Fidelity Reference-Based Inpainting for Generating Detail-Preserving Human-Product Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02210)
*Yichen Liu,Donghao Zhou,Jie Wang,Xin Gao,Guisheng Liu,Jiatong Li,Quanwei Zhang,Qiang Lyu,Lanqing Guo,Shilei Wen,Weiqiang Wang,Pheng-Ann Heng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HiFi-Inpaint是一个用于生成人-产品图像的高保真参考修复框架，通过共享增强注意力和细节感知损失来解决产品细节保真度问题，并在新构建的数据集上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人-产品图像在广告、电商和数字营销中至关重要，但现有方法在生成时难以保持产品细节的高保真度。现有参考修复方法存在三大局限：缺乏大规模多样化训练数据、现有模型难以专注产品细节保护、粗粒度监督无法实现精确指导。

Method: 提出了HiFi-Inpaint框架，包含两个核心技术：1）共享增强注意力（SEA）用于精炼细粒度产品特征；2）细节感知损失（DAL）通过高频图实现像素级精确监督。同时构建了HP-Image-40K数据集，包含自合成数据和自动过滤处理后的样本。

Result: 实验结果表明，HiFi-Inpaint在生成人-产品图像方面实现了最先进的性能，能够生成细节保留良好的高质量图像。

Conclusion: HiFi-Inpaint通过创新的注意力机制和损失函数设计，结合新构建的数据集，有效解决了人-产品图像生成中的细节保真度问题，为相关应用提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Human-product images, which showcase the integration of humans and products, play a vital role in advertising, e-commerce, and digital marketing. The essential challenge of generating such images lies in ensuring the high-fidelity preservation of product details. Among existing paradigms, reference-based inpainting offers a targeted solution by leveraging product reference images to guide the inpainting process. However, limitations remain in three key aspects: the lack of diverse large-scale training data, the struggle of current models to focus on product detail preservation, and the inability of coarse supervision for achieving precise guidance. To address these issues, we propose HiFi-Inpaint, a novel high-fidelity reference-based inpainting framework tailored for generating human-product images. HiFi-Inpaint introduces Shared Enhancement Attention (SEA) to refine fine-grained product features and Detail-Aware Loss (DAL) to enforce precise pixel-level supervision using high-frequency maps. Additionally, we construct a new dataset, HP-Image-40K, with samples curated from self-synthesis data and processed with automatic filtering. Experimental results show that HiFi-Inpaint achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering detail-preserving human-product images.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [312] [Beyond Static Instruction: A Multi-agent AI Framework for Adaptive Augmented Reality Robot Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00016)
*Nicolas Leins,Jana Gonnermann-Müller,Malte Teichmann,Sebastian Pokutta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一个用于工业机器人训练的增强现实应用，并设计了一个多智能体AI框架，旨在通过实时分析多模态输入（语音、生理数据、机器人数据）来动态适应学习者的认知特征，提升培训效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AR培训界面多为静态设计，未能充分考虑学习者多样化的认知特征，导致培训效果存在差异。需要一种能够动态适应学习者需求的教学智能系统。

Method: 1. 开发了用于机器人训练的AR应用作为基线系统；2. 通过36名参与者执行机器人拾放任务评估了该AR界面；3. 提出多智能体AI框架，利用自主大型语言模型（LLM）智能体对多模态输入进行复杂预处理，并实时调整AR应用以适应学习者需求。

Result: 基线AR界面整体可用性高，但任务完成时间和学习者特征存在显著差异，表明静态界面无法满足所有学习者的需求，验证了动态适应系统的必要性。

Conclusion: 多智能体AI框架能够桥接静态可视化与教学智能之间的鸿沟，通过实时LLM推理动态调整学习环境，有望为工业机器人培训提供更个性化、更有效的AR学习体验。

Abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) offers powerful visualization capabilities for industrial robot training, yet current interfaces remain predominantly static, failing to account for learners' diverse cognitive profiles. In this paper, we present an AR application for robot training and propose a multi-agent AI framework for future integration that bridges the gap between static visualization and pedagogical intelligence. We report on the evaluation of the baseline AR interface with 36 participants performing a robotic pick-and-place task. While overall usability was high, notable disparities in task duration and learner characteristics highlighted the necessity for dynamic adaptation. To address this, we propose a multi-agent framework that orchestrates multiple components to perform complex preprocessing of multimodal inputs (e.g., voice, physiology, robot data) and adapt the AR application to the learner's needs. By utilizing autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents, the proposed system would dynamically adapt the learning environment based on advanced LLM reasoning in real-time.

</details>


### [313] [A User Study on the Suitability of Teleoperation Interfaces for Primitive Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00020)
*Jun Aoki,Shunki Itadera*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 比较3D鼠标和VR控制器在机器人臂遥操作中的性能差异，发现界面选择应根据任务的主要运动基元进行匹配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然遥操作系统已被广泛研究，但不同界面在不同任务中的系统比较仍然有限。本研究旨在探究实际遥操作系统中界面特性对性能的影响，特别是针对简单但广泛适用的任务。

Method: 使用六自由度机器人臂，比较3D鼠标和VR控制器两种常用遥操作界面。23名参与者分别完成按钮按压和旋钮旋转两个任务，每个任务3分钟，记录完成次数和NASA-TLX工作负荷评分。

Result: 界面与任务性能存在明确关联：VR控制器在按钮按压任务中表现更好，而3D鼠标在旋钮旋转任务中性能更优且工作负荷更低。

Conclusion: 设计实用遥操作界面时，必须考虑任务的主要运动基元特性。界面选择应根据具体任务需求进行匹配，而不是采用"一刀切"的方法。

Abstract: The application of teleoperation to control robotic arms has been widely explored, and user-friendly teleoperation systems have been studied for facilitating higher performance and lower operational burden. To investigate the dominant factors in a practical teleoperation system, this study focused on the characteristics of an interface used to operate a robotic arm. The usability of an interface depends on the characteristics of the manipulation tasks to be completed; however, systematic comparisons of different interfaces across different tasks remain limited. In this study, we compared two widely used teleoperation interfaces, a 3D mouse and a VR controller, for two simple yet broadly applicable tasks with a six-degree-of-freedom (6DoF) robotic arm: repetitively pushing buttons and rotating knobs. Participants (N = 23) controlled a robotic arm with 6DoF to push buttons and rotate knobs as many times as possible in 3-minute trials. Each trial was followed by a NASA-TLX workload rating. The results showed a clear connection between the interface and task performance: the VR controller yielded higher performance for pushing buttons, whereas the 3D mouse performed better and was less demanding for knob rotation. These findings highlight the importance of considering dominant motion primitives of the task when designing practical teleoperation interfaces.

</details>


### [314] [Designing Social Robots with Ethical, User-Adaptive Explainability in the Era of Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00102)
*Fethiye Irmak Dogan,Alva Markelius,Hatice Gunes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文主张将伦理、用户适应的可解释性作为基础模型驱动社交机器人的核心设计目标，针对传统通用解释策略的不足，提出了基于更小、更公平数据集构建用户适应、模态感知、协同设计的解释策略建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基础模型越来越多地嵌入社交机器人，不仅中介其言行，还控制其适应用户的方式。传统"一刀切"的解释策略变得尤其问题重重，因为通用解释现在包裹着由训练于海量、异构、不透明数据集模型产生的行为。

Method: 首先识别当适应和解释都委托给基础模型时出现的可解释性和伦理挑战，然后提出四个建议：1) 向用户适应的解释策略转变；2) 模态感知的解释；3) 基于更小、更公平数据集的协同设计解释策略；4) 通过LLM驱动的社交辅助机器人案例展示这些建议在敏感现实领域的应用。

Result: 提出了一个框架性建议，通过一个LLM驱动的社交辅助机器人案例展示了如何在实际敏感领域中实例化这些建议，为构建更负责任的基础模型驱动社交机器人系统提供了方向。

Conclusion: 伦理、用户适应的可解释性应成为基础模型驱动社交机器人的核心设计目标，需要从通用解释转向基于更小、更公平数据集的用户适应、模态感知、协同设计的解释策略。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly embedded in social robots, mediating not only what they say and do but also how they adapt to users over time. This shift renders traditional ``one-size-fits-all'' explanation strategies especially problematic: generic justifications are now wrapped around behaviour produced by models trained on vast, heterogeneous, and opaque datasets. We argue that ethical, user-adapted explainability must be treated as a core design objective for foundation-model-driven social robotics. We first identify open challenges around explainability and ethical concerns that arise when both adaptation and explanation are delegated to foundation models. Building on this analysis, we propose four recommendations for moving towards user-adapted, modality-aware, and co-designed explanation strategies grounded in smaller, fairer datasets. An illustrative use case of an LLM-driven socially assistive robot demonstrates how these recommendations might be instantiated in a sensitive, real-world domain.

</details>


### [315] [Autonomous Block Assembly for Boom Cranes with Passive Joint Dynamics: Integrated Vision MPC Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00103)
*Gerald Ebmer,Minh Nhat Vu,Tobias Glück,Wolfgang Kemmetmüller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于建筑环境中预制块组装的关节臂起重机自主控制框架，通过视觉姿态估计、碰撞感知路径规划和非线性模型预测控制实现精确的块体放置和避障组装。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决建筑环境中关节臂起重机在被动关节动力学下（产生摆锤式摆动）难以精确放置建筑构件的挑战，实现自动化施工操作。

Method: 集成实时视觉姿态估计、碰撞感知B样条路径规划和非线性模型预测控制（NMPC），实现自主拾取、放置和避障组装操作。

Result: 在实验室测试平台上验证了自主块体堆叠和避障组装，摆动抑制使稳定时间比未控制的被动动力学减少了一个数量级以上，证明了集成方法的实时可行性。

Conclusion: 该集成控制框架能够有效抑制被动关节摆动，实现精确的预制块体组装，为建筑自动化提供了实时可行的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents an autonomous control framework for articulated boom cranes performing prefabricated block assembly in construction environments. The key challenge addressed is precise placement control under passive joint dynamics that cause pendulum-like sway, complicating the accurate positioning of building components. Our integrated approach combines real-time vision-based pose estimation of building blocks, collision-aware B-spline path planning, and nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to achieve autonomous pickup, placement, and obstacle-avoidance assembly operations. The framework is validated on a laboratory-scale testbed that emulates crane kinematics and passive dynamics while enabling rapid experimentation. The collision-aware planner generates feasible B-spline references in real-time on CPU hardware with anytime performance, while the NMPC controller actively suppresses passive joint sway and tracks the planned trajectory under continuous vision feedback. Experimental results demonstrate autonomous block stacking and obstacle-avoidance assembly, with sway damping reducing settling times by more than an order of magnitude compared to uncontrolled passive dynamics, confirming the real-time feasibility of the integrated approach for construction automation.

</details>


### [316] [SurgFusion-Net: Diversified Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Network for Surgical Skill Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00108)
*Runlong He,Freweini M. Tesfai,Matthew W. E. Boal,Nazir Sirajudeen,Dimitrios Anastasiou,Jialang Xu,Mobarak I. Hoque,Philip J. Edwards,John D. Kelly,Ashwin Sridhar,Abdolrahim Kadkhodamohammadi,Dhivya Chandrasekaran,Matthew J. Clarkson,Danail Stoyanov,Nader Francis,Evangelos B. Mazomenos*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出SurgFusion-Net和Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA)用于多模态手术技能评估，在两个临床数据集上验证效果优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前手术技能评估方法主要依赖RGB视频且仅在实验室环境测试，无法应对真实临床场景的复杂性，需要解决多模态信息融合和临床领域适应问题

Method: 提出DRA融合策略，包含自适应双注意力和多样性促进多头注意力，从三种模态融合信息；贡献两个临床数据集RAH-skill和RARP-skill

Result: 在JIGSAWS基准和两个临床数据集上均优于现有方法，SCC分别提升0.02-0.04和0.0493-0.0538

Conclusion: SurgFusion-Net和DRA能有效融合多模态信息，在真实临床环境中提升手术技能评估的准确性和可靠性

Abstract: Robotic-assisted surgery (RAS) is established in clinical practice, and automated surgical skill assessment utilizing multimodal data offers transformative potential for surgical analytics and education. However, developing effective multimodal methods remains challenging due to the task complexity, limited annotated datasets and insufficient techniques for cross-modal information fusion. Existing state-of-the-art relies exclusively on RGB video and only applies on dry-lab settings, failing to address the significant domain gap between controlled simulation and real clinical cases, where the surgical environment together with camera and tissue motion introduce substantial complexities. This work introduces SurgFusion-Net and Divergence Regulated Attention (DRA), an innovative fusion strategy for multimodal surgical skill assessment. We contribute two first-of-their-kind clinical datasets: the RAH-skill dataset containing 279,691 RGB frames from 37 videos of Robot-assisted Hysterectomy (RAH), and the RARP-skill dataset containing 70,661 RGB frames from 33 videos of Robot-Assisted Radical Prostatectomy (RARP). Both datasets include M-GEARS skill annotations, corresponding optical flow and tool segmentation masks. DRA incorporates adaptive dual attention and diversity-promoting multi-head attention to fuse multimodal information, from three modalities, based on surgical context, enhancing assessment accuracy and reliability. Validated on the JIGSAWS benchmark, RAH-skill, and RARP-skill datasets, our approach outperforms recent baselines with SCC improvements of 0.02 in LOSO, 0.04 in LOUO across JIGSAWS tasks, and 0.0538 and 0.0493 gains on RAH-skill and RARP-skill, respectively.

</details>


### [317] [Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Models: A Multimodal Continuous and Sequential World Interaction Models for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00110)
*Zijian Song,Qichang Li,Sihan Qin,Yuhao Chen,Tianshui Chen,Liang Lin,Guangrun Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PhysGen利用预训练视频生成模型作为物理模拟器，通过统一视频和动作的连续表示，将视频中的物理知识迁移到机器人操作任务中，在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模机器人数据的稀缺促使研究者利用其他模态的基础模型进行策略学习。视频生成模型隐含了丰富的物理知识（如物体持久性和动力学），但如何将这些知识有效迁移到连续的机器人控制任务中是一个挑战。

Method: 提出PhysGen框架：1）将预训练视频模型作为物理模拟器的代理；2）引入多模态连续表示，将视频和动作统一为共享的物理token；3）采用因果掩码、逆运动学、前瞻多token预测（L-MTP）和KV缓存等技术确保高效收敛。

Result: 在Libero和ManiSkill基准测试中，PhysGen显著优于现有基线，分别超过OpenVLA 13.8%和WorldVLA 8.8%。在真实世界场景中，无需动作预训练即可达到π_0等大规模动作预训练模型的性能，在抓取透明物体等复杂物理任务中表现优异。

Conclusion: 从预训练视频生成器中提取物理直觉可以有效促进可泛化的机器人操作，验证了视频模型作为物理知识来源的潜力，为机器人学习提供了新的数据高效途径。

Abstract: The scarcity of large-scale robotic data has motivated the repurposing of foundation models from other modalities for policy learning. In this work, we introduce PhysGen (Learning Physics from Pretrained Video Generation Models), a scalable continuous and sequential world interaction framework that leverages autoregressive video generation to solve robotic manipulation tasks. By treating the pretrained video model as a proxy for a physics simulator, PhysGen models the dynamic interplay between the external environment and robot actions. We introduce a multimodal continuous representation that unifies video and action into shared physical tokens, bridging the gap between discrete video generation and continuous robotic control. This approach enables the seamless transfer of implicit physical knowledge-such as object permanence and dynamics-from video pretraining to downstream manipulation.To ensure efficient convergence, we incorporate causal masking, inverse kinematics, Lookahead Multi-Token Prediction (L-MTP), and key-value (KV) caching. Experimental results on the Libero and ManiSkill benchmarks demonstrate that PhysGen consistently outperforms robust baselines, surpassing OpenVLA and WorldVLA by margins of 13.8% and 8.8%, respectively. Notably, in real-world scenarios, PhysGen matches the performance of large-scale action-pretrained models like $π_0$ without requiring prior action-specific pretraining, demonstrating superior capability in physically complex tasks such as grasping transparent objects. These findings validate the potential of extracting physical intuition from pretrained video generators to facilitate generalizable robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [318] [PEPA: a Persistently Autonomous Embodied Agent with Personalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00117)
*Kaige Liu,Yang Li,Lijun Zhu,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PEPA：一种基于人格特质实现持久自主性的三层认知架构，使机器人能够在没有外部任务规范的情况下自主生成目标并维持行为演化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身智能体依赖外部预设目标，限制了其在动态、非结构化环境中长期部署的能力。生物通过内部生成目标和自我维持行为组织展现持久自主性，而人格特质可作为实现类似自主性的内在组织原则。

Method: 提出PEPA三层认知架构：Sys3（人格对齐目标生成与反思）、Sys2（目标到行动计划的推理转换）、Sys1（感觉运动交互执行与经验记录）。通过五种人格原型在多层办公楼四足机器人上验证。

Result: 机器人能够自主仲裁用户请求和人格驱动动机，自主导航电梯和探索环境。定量分析显示五种人格原型均产生稳定、特质对齐的行为，实现了持续自主操作。

Conclusion: 人格驱动的认知架构能够实现具身系统的持久自主性特征，为在动态环境中长期部署自主智能体提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Living organisms exhibit persistent autonomy through internally generated goals and self-sustaining behavioral organization, yet current embodied agents remain driven by externally scripted objectives. This dependence on predefined task specifications limits their capacity for long-term deployment in dynamic, unstructured environments where continuous human intervention is impractical. We propose that personality traits provide an intrinsic organizational principle for achieving persistent autonomy. Analogous to genotypic biases shaping biological behavioral tendencies, personalities enable agents to autonomously generate goals and sustain behavioral evolution without external supervision. To realize this, we develop PEPA, a three-layer cognitive architecture that operates through three interacting systems: Sys3 autonomously synthesizes personality-aligned goals and refines them via episodic memory and daily self-reflection; Sys2 performs deliberative reasoning to translate goals into executable action plans; Sys1 grounds the agent in sensorimotor interaction, executing actions and recording experiences. We validate the framework through real-world deployment on a quadruped robot in a multi-floor office building. Operating without reliance on fixed task specifications, the robot autonomously arbitrates between user requests and personality-driven motivations, navigating elevators and exploring environments accordingly. Quantitative analysis across five distinct personality prototypes demonstrates stable, trait-aligned behaviors. The results confirm that personality-driven cognitive architectures enable sustained autonomous operation characteristic of persistent embodied systems. Code and demo videos are available at https://sites.google.com/view/pepa-persistent/.

</details>


### [319] [Multiview Progress Prediction of Robot Activities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00151)
*Elena Zoppellari,Federico Becattini,Marco Fiorucci,Lamberto Ballan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出多视角架构用于机器人操作任务中的动作进度预测，解决单摄像头视角下自遮挡问题，在Mobile ALOHA平台上验证有效性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人需要理解正在进行动作的进度才能与人类有效协作，但动作进度预测在机器人领域常被忽视，且单摄像头视角因自遮挡问题难以准确感知机器人自身动作

Method: 提出多视角架构用于机器人操作任务中的动作进度预测，通过多个视角解决单摄像头自遮挡问题

Result: 在Mobile ALOHA机器人平台上进行实验，证明了所提方法的有效性

Conclusion: 多视角架构能有效解决机器人动作进度预测中的自遮挡问题，提升机器人对自身动作进度的理解能力

Abstract: For robots to operate effectively and safely alongside humans, they must be able to understand the progress of ongoing actions. This ability, known as action progress prediction, is critical for tasks ranging from timely assistance to autonomous decision-making. However, modeling action progression in robotics has often been overlooked. Moreover, a single camera may be insufficient for understanding robot's ego-actions, as self-occlusion can significantly hinder perception and model performance. In this paper, we propose a multi-view architecture for action progress prediction in robot manipulation tasks. Experiments on Mobile ALOHA demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [320] [Trust in Autonomous Human--Robot Collaboration: Effects of Responsive Interaction Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00154)
*Shauna Heron,Meng Cheng Lau*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究比较了两种人机交互策略对信任形成的影响：响应式策略（主动适应对话和协助）与中性反应式策略（仅提供任务相关响应）。响应式交互在可行通信条件下显著提升信任度，但通信质量下降时优势减弱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信任在人机协作中至关重要，但很少在完全自主交互的约束下研究其形成机制。本研究旨在探索交互策略如何影响真实自主交互（无Wizard-of-Oz控制或脚本修复）中的信任形成。

Method: 参与者与移动机器人完成多阶段协作任务，机器人完全自主管理语音对话、情感推断和任务进度。比较两种交互策略：响应式策略（基于推断的交互状态主动调整对话和协助）和中性反应式策略（仅在提示时提供直接任务相关响应）。

Result: 在可行通信条件下，响应式交互显著提高交互后信任度，尽管任务准确性无显著差异。敏感性分析显示：情感和体验性信任成分对通信中断更敏感；当语言交互质量下降时，响应式策略的信任优势减弱，信任评分难以准确反映协作能力评估。

Conclusion: 自主人机交互中的信任源于过程层面的交互动态，并受通信可行性的约束。设计交互式机器人系统时，需要在真实自主条件下评估信任，以更好地理解信任形成机制。

Abstract: Trust plays a central role in human--robot collaboration, yet its formation is rarely examined under the constraints of fully autonomous interaction. This pilot study investigated how interaction policy influences trust during in-person collaboration with a social robot operating without Wizard-of-Oz control or scripted repair. Participants completed a multi-stage collaborative task with a mobile robot that autonomously managed spoken-language dialogue, affect inference, and task progression. Two interaction policies were compared: a responsive policy, in which the robot proactively adapted its dialogue and assistance based on inferred interaction state, and a neutral, reactive policy, in which the robot provided only direct, task-relevant responses when prompted. Responsive interaction was associated with significantly higher post-interaction trust under viable communication conditions, despite no reliable differences in overall task accuracy. Sensitivity analyses indicated that affective and experiential components of trust were more sensitive to communication breakdown than evaluative judgments of reliability, and that as language-mediated interaction degraded, the trust advantage associated with responsiveness attenuated and ratings became less clearly interpretable as calibrated evaluations of collaborative competence. These findings suggest that trust in autonomous human--robot interaction emerges from process-level interaction dynamics and operates within constraints imposed by communication viability, highlighting the importance of evaluating trust under real autonomy conditions when designing interactive robotic systems.

</details>


### [321] [EgoMoD: Predicting Global Maps of Dynamics from Local Egocentric Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00167)
*Iacopo Catalano,David Morilla-Cabello,Jorge Pena-Queralta,Eduardo Montijano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EgoMoD：首个从短时自我中心视频中学习预测未来动态地图的方法，能够在有限观测下预测全局运动趋势，实现零样本迁移到真实系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在动态环境中高效导航需要预测运动模式在机器人感知范围之外如何演化，以便进行预见性而非纯粹反应性的规划。动态地图（MoDs）提供了空间运动趋势的结构化表示，但传统构建方法需要长时间全局环境观测。

Method: 提出EgoMoD方法，通过视频和姿态条件架构，从短时自我中心视频片段中学习预测未来动态地图。使用外部观测计算的MoDs作为特权监督进行训练，让局部观测作为全局运动结构的预测信号。

Result: 在大型仿真环境中的实验表明，EgoMoD在有限观测下能准确预测未来动态地图。真实图像评估展示了该方法对真实系统的零样本迁移能力。

Conclusion: EgoMoD首次实现了从局部自我中心观测中预测全局动态地图，为机器人在动态环境中的预见性规划提供了有效工具，具备良好的实际应用潜力。

Abstract: Efficient navigation in dynamic environments requires anticipating how motion patterns evolve beyond the robot's immediate perceptual range, enabling preemptive rather than purely reactive planning in crowded scenes. Maps of Dynamics (MoDs) offer a structured representation of motion tendencies in space useful for long-term global planning, but constructing them traditionally requires global environment observations over extended periods of time. We introduce EgoMoD, the first approach that learns to predict future MoDs directly from short egocentric video clips collected during robot operation. Our method learns to infer environment-wide motion tendencies from local dynamic cues using a video- and pose-conditioned architecture trained with MoDs computed from external observations as privileged supervision, allowing local observations to serve as predictive signals of global motion structure. Thanks to this, we offer the capacity to forecast future motion dynamics over the whole environment rather than merely extend past patterns in the robot's field of view. Experiments in large simulated environments show that EgoMoD accurately predicts future MoDs under limited observability, while evaluation with real images showcases its zero-shot transferability to real systems.

</details>


### [322] [Embedding Morphology into Transformers for Cross-Robot Policy Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00182)
*Kei Suzuki,Jing Liu,Ye Wang,Chiori Hori,Matthew Brand,Diego Romeres,Toshiaki Koike-Akino*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种具身感知的Transformer策略，通过注入形态学信息来提升跨机器人策略学习的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨机器人策略学习面临挑战，传统Transformer策略（如VLA模型）是具身无关的，需要从观察中推断运动学结构，这会降低跨具身的鲁棒性并限制单个具身内的性能。

Method: 提出具身感知Transformer策略，通过三种机制注入形态学信息：1）运动学token，将动作分解到关节并通过关节时间分块压缩时间；2）拓扑感知注意力偏置，将运动学拓扑编码为自注意力中的归纳偏置；3）关节属性条件，用关节描述符增强拓扑以捕获连接性之外的语义。

Result: 在各种具身上，这种结构化集成始终优于基础的pi0.5 VLA基线，表明在单个具身内和跨具身方面都提高了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 通过结构化地集成形态学信息，可以显著提升跨机器人策略学习的性能，增强策略在单个具身内和跨不同具身时的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Cross-robot policy learning -- training a single policy to perform well across multiple embodiments -- remains a central challenge in robot learning. Transformer-based policies, such as vision-language-action (VLA) models, are typically embodiment-agnostic and must infer kinematic structure purely from observations, which can reduce robustness across embodiments and even limit performance within a single embodiment. We propose an embodiment-aware transformer policy that injects morphology via three mechanisms: (1) kinematic tokens that factorize actions across joints and compress time through per-joint temporal chunking; (2) a topology-aware attention bias that encodes kinematic topology as an inductive bias in self-attention, encouraging message passing along kinematic edges; and (3) joint-attribute conditioning that augments topology with per-joint descriptors to capture semantics beyond connectivity. Across a range of embodiments, this structured integration consistently improves performance over a vanilla pi0.5 VLA baseline, indicating improved robustness both within an embodiment and across embodiments.

</details>


### [323] [Modeling PWM-Time-SOC Interaction in a Simulated Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00319)
*Vidyut Pradeep,Shirantha Welikala*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发基于物理和数据驱动的模型，预测Arduino四轮机器人在不同PWM占空比下的电池SOC随时间变化，用于能量感知运动规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主机器人需要准确预测电池SOC，以便在耗尽所有可用电力之前规划运动，实现能量感知的自主导航。

Method: 结合电机电气特性（电阻、电感、反电动势、扭矩常数）和机械动力学（质量、阻力、滚动阻力、轮半径）建立前向运动仿真，生成1-100% PWM值下的SOC时间序列数据，应用稀疏识别非线性动力学（SINDy）结合最小二乘回归构建统一的非线性模型SOC(t,p)。

Result: 开发出能够预测SOC随时间t和PWM占空比p变化的统一非线性模型，该框架支持能量感知规划，并可扩展到任意初始SOC水平和环境相关参数。

Conclusion: 提出的物理和数据驱动模型框架能够准确预测机器人电池SOC，为类似机器人提供能量感知规划能力，并可扩展用于实际部署。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of battery state of charge is needed for autonomous robots to plan movements without using up all available power. This work develops a physics and data-informed model from a simulation that predicts SOC depletion as a function of time and PWM duty cycle for a simulated 4-wheel Arduino robot. A forward-motion simulation incorporating motor electrical characteristics (resistance, inductance, back-EMF, torque constant) and mechanical dynamics (mass, drag, rolling resistance, wheel radius) was used to generate SOC time-series data across PWM values from 1-100%. Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy), combined with least-squares regression, was applied to construct a unified nonlinear model that captures SOC(t, p). The framework allows for energy-aware planning for similar robots and can be extended to incorporate arbitrary initial SOC levels and environment-dependent parameters for real-world deployment.

</details>


### [324] [Geometric Look-Angle Shaping Strategy for Enclosed Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00325)
*Amit Shivam,Manuel C. R. M. Fernandes,Sergio Vinha,Fernando A. C. C. Fontes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GLASS是一种用于无人机封闭区域检测的几何视角成形策略，通过有界的几何一致性视角成形构建制导指令，确保制导动力学全局存在，避免远场限制，并满足最大转弯率约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在封闭区域检测中存在远场限制和制导动力学全局存在性问题，需要一种能够处理封闭区域检测、避免奇异点并满足实际飞行约束的制导策略。

Method: 在极坐标几何框架中嵌入平滑的双曲正切型成形函数，构建几何一致的视角成形策略，通过Lyapunov稳定性分析建立渐近收敛性，并显式考虑曲率可行性条件。

Result: GLASS确保制导动力学全局存在，避免远场限制，在满足最大转弯率约束下实现渐近收敛到预设的检测距离，六自由度四旋翼仿真验证了在代表性封闭检测场景中的有效性。

Conclusion: GLASS为自主封闭检测任务提供了一个实用可行的制导框架，能够处理几何约束和飞行限制，在复杂环境中实现稳定可靠的检测操作。

Abstract: This paper introduces inspection through GLASS, a Geometric Look-Angle Shaping Strategy for enclosed regions using unmanned aerial vehicles. In doing so, the vehicles guidance command is constructed through a bounded, geometry-consistent shaping of the look angle relative to a desired standoff path. By embedding a smooth, hyperbolic-tangent-type shaping function within a polar geometric framework, GLASS ensures global existence of the guidance dynamics. It avoids the far-field limitations inherent to conventional formulations. Lyapunov stability analysis establishes asymptotic convergence to a prescribed inspection standoff under explicit curvature feasibility conditions, along with analytical settling-time characteristics. The proposed strategy incorporates maximum turn-rate constraints without inducing singularities throughout the workspace. High-fidelity six-degree-of-freedom quadrotor simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of GLASS in representative enclosed inspection scenarios, highlighting a practically viable guidance framework for autonomous enclosed inspection missions.

</details>


### [325] [Layered Safety: Enhancing Autonomous Collision Avoidance via Multistage CBF Safety Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00338)
*Erina Yamaguchi,Ryan M. Bena,Gilbert Bahati,Aaron D. Ames*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个端到端的分层安全过滤框架，通过Poisson安全函数作为控制屏障函数，在预测和实时两个阶段进行安全过滤，为足式机器人提供动态避障的正式安全保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单阶段安全过滤器在复杂动态环境中可能无法保证安全，需要构建一个能够处理局部感知数据、提供正式安全保证且适用于多种应用场景的鲁棒安全框架。

Method: 基于机器人中心点云构建占据地图，合成Poisson安全函数作为控制屏障函数。采用两阶段安全过滤：第一阶段使用预测安全过滤器在有限预测时域内计算最优安全轨迹；第二阶段使用实时CBF安全过滤器精炼瞬时速度命令，并由底层控制器跟踪。

Result: 通过Pareto分析验证了多阶段架构在最优性和鲁棒性上优于传统单阶段过滤器。在多种足式机器人平台和真实世界动态场景中展示了方法的有效性和通用性。

Conclusion: 提出的分层安全过滤框架能够仅使用局部感知数据为足式机器人提供动态避障的正式安全保证，具有鲁棒性、可靠性和广泛适用性。

Abstract: This paper presents a general end-to-end framework for constructing robust and reliable layered safety filters that can be leveraged to perform dynamic collision avoidance over a broad range of applications using only local perception data. Given a robot-centric point cloud, we begin by constructing an occupancy map which is used to synthesize a Poisson safety function (PSF). The resultant PSF is employed as a control barrier function (CBF) within two distinct safety filtering stages. In the first stage, we propose a predictive safety filter to compute optimal safe trajectories based on nominal potentially-unsafe commands. The resultant short-term plans are constrained to satisfy the CBF condition along a finite prediction horizon. In the second stage, instantaneous velocity commands are further refined by a real-time CBF-based safety filter and tracked by the full-order low-level robot controller. Assuming accurate tracking of velocity commands, we obtain formal guarantees of safety for the full-order system. We validate the optimality and robustness of our multistage architecture, in comparison to traditional single-stage safety filters, via a detailed Pareto analysis. We further demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of our collision avoidance methodology on multiple legged robot platforms across a variety of real-world dynamic scenarios.

</details>


### [326] [Acoustic Sensing for Universal Jamming Grippers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00351)
*Lion Weber,Theodor Wienert,Martin Splettstößer,Alexander Koenig,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于声学传感的形态感知方法，将万能夹持器的软体本身作为传感器，通过在夹持器腔内放置扬声器和麦克风，利用声音传播编码物体特性，并通过机器学习重建物体信息，在保持夹持器柔顺性的同时实现高精度感知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统触觉传感器会损害万能夹持器的柔顺性，降低抓取性能。需要一种既能保持夹持器柔顺性又能实现高精度感知的解决方案。

Method: 将扬声器和麦克风放置在夹持器腔内（远离可变形膜），利用声音通过夹持器和物体传播来编码物体特性，然后通过机器学习重建物体属性。

Result: 传感器在物体尺寸感知（2.6 mm误差）和方向感知（0.6度误差）方面实现高空间分辨率，对外部噪声（80 dBA）保持鲁棒性，能区分物体材料（最高100%准确率）和16种日常物体（85.6%准确率），在53分钟不间断抓取和感知任务中验证了性能。

Conclusion: 声学传感作为一种形态感知形式，能够将夹持器软体本身转化为传感器，在完全保持柔顺性的同时实现高精度物体感知，且能够学习解耦的声学表示以提高鲁棒性。

Abstract: Universal jamming grippers excel at grasping unknown objects due to their compliant bodies. Traditional tactile sensors can compromise this compliance, reducing grasping performance. We present acoustic sensing as a form of morphological sensing, where the gripper's soft body itself becomes the sensor. A speaker and microphone are placed inside the gripper cavity, away from the deformable membrane, fully preserving compliance. Sound propagates through the gripper and object, encoding object properties, which are then reconstructed via machine learning. Our sensor achieves high spatial resolution in sensing object size (2.6 mm error) and orientation (0.6 deg error), remains robust to external noise levels of 80 dBA, and discriminates object materials (up to 100% accuracy) and 16 everyday objects (85.6% accuracy). We validate the sensor in a realistic tactile object sorting task, achieving 53 minutes of uninterrupted grasping and sensing, confirming the preserved grasping performance. Finally, we demonstrate that disentangled acoustic representations can be learned, improving robustness to irrelevant acoustic variations.

</details>


### [327] [TMR-VLA:Vision-Language-Action Model for Magnetic Motion Control of Tri-leg Silicone-based Soft Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00420)
*Ruijie Tang,Chi Kit Ng,Kaixuan Wu,Long Bai,Guankun Wang,Yiming Huang,Yupeng Wang,Hongliang Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了一种三足磁驱动软体机器人（TMR）及其多模态控制系统TMR-VLA，能够通过自然语言指令控制机器人完成多种运动模式，实现74%的平均成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 磁驱动软体机器人在体内环境中具有无线操作和精确控制的优势，在无痛检测和治疗程序中显示出潜力。然而，需要解决如何将高级运动类型描述转化为具体的低层电压控制的问题。

Method: 开发了三足磁驱动软体机器人（TMR），采用多足设计实现更灵活步态。提出TMR-VLA端到端多模态系统，融合序列帧和自然语言指令作为输入，基于当前观察状态和特定运动类型描述生成低层电压输出。

Result: TMR-VLA能够预测施加在TMR上的电压如何改变硅制软体机器人的动力学特性。系统达到了74%的平均成功率，展示了通过自然语言指令控制软体机器人运动的能力。

Conclusion: TMR-VLA系统为磁驱动软体机器人提供了一种有效的端到端控制方法，通过自然语言约束的运动类型实现导航能力，为软体机器人在医疗应用中的实际部署奠定了基础。

Abstract: In-vivo environments, magnetically actuated soft robots offer advantages such as wireless operation and precise control, showing promising potential for painless detection and therapeutic procedures. We developed a trileg magnetically driven soft robot (TMR) whose multi-legged design enables more flexible gaits and diverse motion patterns. For the silicone made of reconfigurable soft robots, its navigation ability can be separated into sequential motions, namely squatting, rotation, lifting a leg, walking and so on. Its motion and behavior depend on its bending shapes. To bridge motion type description and specific low-level voltage control, we introduced TMR-VLA, an end-to-end multi-modal system for a trileg magnetic soft robot capable of performing hybrid motion types, which is promising for developing a navigation ability by adapting its shape to language-constrained motion types. The TMR-VLA deploys embodied endoluminal localization ability from EndoVLA, and fuses sequential frames and natural language commands as input. Low-level voltage output is generated based on the current observation state and specific motion type description. The result shows the TMR-VLA can predict how the voltage applied to TMR will change the dynamics of a silicon-made soft robot. The TMR-VLA reached a 74% average success rate.

</details>


### [328] [HydroShear: Hydroelastic Shear Simulation for Tactile Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00446)
*An Dang,Jayjun Lee,Mustafa Mukadam,X. Alice Wu,Bernadette Bucher,Manikantan Nambi,Nima Fazeli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HydroShear是一个非完整的水弹性触觉模拟器，通过建模粘滑转换、路径依赖的力和剪切积累以及完整的SE(3)物体-传感器交互，显著缩小了触觉模拟到真实的差距，实现了零样本策略迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注基于视觉的传感器，强调图像渲染质量，但对力和剪切的建模过于简化，导致许多灵巧任务存在较大的模拟到真实差距。

Method: 提出HydroShear非完整水弹性触觉模拟器，使用符号距离函数(SDFs)跟踪压头表面点在传感器膜物理交互过程中的位移，生成基于物理的、计算高效的力场，且不依赖于底层物理引擎。

Result: 在GelSight Minis实验中，HydroShear比现有方法更准确地再现真实触觉剪切。在四个任务（钉插入、箱体包装、书架插入、抽屉拉动）中实现了93%的平均成功率，显著优于基于触觉图像训练的策略（34%）和其他剪切模拟方法（58%-61%）。

Conclusion: HydroShear通过建模粘滑转换、路径依赖的力和剪切积累以及完整的SE(3)交互，显著提高了触觉模拟的真实性，实现了零样本模拟到真实的策略迁移，为接触丰富的任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of tactile sim-to-real policy transfer for contact-rich tasks. Existing methods primarily focus on vision-based sensors and emphasize image rendering quality while providing overly simplistic models of force and shear. Consequently, these models exhibit a large sim-to-real gap for many dexterous tasks. Here, we present HydroShear, a non-holonomic hydroelastic tactile simulator that advances the state-of-the-art by modeling: a) stick-slip transitions, b) path-dependent force and shear build up, and c) full SE(3) object-sensor interactions. HydroShear extends hydroelastic contact models using Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) to track the displacements of the on-surface points of an indenter during physical interaction with the sensor membrane. Our approach generates physics-based, computationally efficient force fields from arbitrary watertight geometries while remaining agnostic to the underlying physics engine. In experiments with GelSight Minis, HydroShear more faithfully reproduces real tactile shear compared to existing methods. This fidelity enables zero-shot sim-to-real transfer of reinforcement learning policies across four tasks: peg insertion, bin packing, book shelving for insertion, and drawer pulling for fine gripper control under slip. Our method achieves a 93% average success rate, outperforming policies trained on tactile images (34%) and alternative shear simulation methods (58%-61%).

</details>


### [329] [Test-Driven Agentic Framework for Reliable Robot Controller](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00455)
*Shivanshu Tripathi,Reza Akbarian Bafghi,Maziar Raissi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个测试驱动的智能体框架，通过迭代测试和双层级修复策略，从二维地图或三维仿真环境合成可部署的低层机器人导航控制器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的一次性控制器生成方法在初始提示不明确时，往往难以产生可靠和鲁棒的控制器。需要一种能够通过测试反馈迭代改进控制器代码的方法。

Method: 采用测试驱动的智能体框架，通过结构化测试套件获取诊断反馈，迭代优化生成的控制器代码。提出双层级修复策略，在提示级细化和直接代码编辑之间交替进行。

Result: 在2D导航任务和Webots模拟器的3D导航任务上评估，结果显示测试驱动合成相比一次性控制器生成，显著提高了控制器的可靠性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 测试驱动框架能有效合成可部署的机器人控制器，特别是在初始提示不明确时，通过迭代测试和双层级修复策略能显著提升性能。

Abstract: In this work, we present a test-driven, agentic framework for synthesizing a deployable low-level robot controller for navigation tasks. Given a 2D map with an image of an ultrasonic sensor-based robot, or a 3D robotic simulation environment, our framework iteratively refines the generated controller code using diagnostic feedback from structured test suites to achieve task success. We propose a dual-tier repair strategy to refine the generated code that alternates between prompt-level refinement and direct code editing. We evaluate the approach across 2D navigation tasks and 3D navigation in the Webots simulator. Experimental results show that test-driven synthesis substantially improves controller reliability and robustness over one-shot controller generation, especially when the initial prompt is underspecified. The source code and demonstration videos are available at: https://shivanshutripath.github.io/robotic_controller.github.io.

</details>


### [330] [Zero-Shot Robotic Manipulation via 3D Gaussian Splatting-Enhanced Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00500)
*Zilong Xie,Jingyu Gong,Xin Tan,Zhizhong Zhang,Yuan Xie*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RobMRAG：一个基于3D高斯泼溅增强的多模态检索增强生成框架，用于零样本机器人操作，通过构建知识库和分层检索策略，结合3D感知姿态优化，显著提升未见物体的操作成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端机器人操作方法由于数据有限和可解释性差，难以泛化到未见物体或任务。虽然多模态大语言模型具有常识推理能力，但缺乏几何和空间理解能力，无法准确预测物体姿态。

Method: 提出RobMRAG框架：1）构建包含物体接触帧、任务完成帧和姿态参数的多源操作知识库；2）分层多模态检索模块采用三优先级混合检索策略找到任务相关物体原型，基于像素级相似性和实例匹配距离选择几何最接近的参考示例；3）引入3D高斯泼溅的3D感知姿态优化模块，在3D空间中对齐参考物体与目标物体的姿态，将结果重投影到图像平面作为MLLM输入，生成最终姿态参数。

Result: 在包含30类家居物体的测试集上，相比最佳零样本基线提升7.76%成功率，相比最先进的监督基线提升6.54%成功率。有效弥合高层语义推理与低层几何执行之间的差距。

Conclusion: RobMRAG通过结合多模态检索增强生成和3D感知姿态优化，实现了对未见物体的泛化能力，同时保持内在可解释性，为机器人操作提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Existing end-to-end approaches of robotic manipulation often lack generalization to unseen objects or tasks due to limited data and poor interpretability. While recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong commonsense reasoning, they struggle with geometric and spatial understanding required for pose prediction. In this paper, we propose RobMRAG, a 3D Gaussian Splatting-Enhanced Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (MRAG) framework for zero-shot robotic manipulation. Specifically, we construct a multi-source manipulation knowledge base containing object contact frames, task completion frames, and pose parameters. During inference, a Hierarchical Multimodal Retrieval module first employs a three-priority hybrid retrieval strategy to find task-relevant object prototypes, then selects the geometrically closest reference example based on pixel-level similarity and Instance Matching Distance (IMD). We further introduce a 3D-Aware Pose Refinement module based on 3D Gaussian Splatting into the MRAG framework, which aligns the pose of the reference object to the target object in 3D space. The aligned results are reprojected onto the image plane and used as input to the MLLM to enhance the generation of the final pose parameters. Extensive experiments show that on a test set containing 30 categories of household objects, our method improves the success rate by 7.76% compared to the best-performing zero-shot baseline under the same setting, and by 6.54% compared to the state-of-the-art supervised baseline. Our results validate that RobMRAG effectively bridges the gap between high-level semantic reasoning and low-level geometric execution, enabling robotic systems that generalize to unseen objects while remaining inherently interpretable.

</details>


### [331] [Optimal-Horizon Social Robot Navigation in Heterogeneous Crowds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00507)
*Jiamin Shi,Haolin Zhang,Yuchen Yan,Shitao Chen,Jingmin Xin,Nanning Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于最优预测时域的社会机器人导航框架，通过在线优化MPC预测时域来适应动态人群中的社交环境变化，显著提升导航成功率和安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MPC方法在密集动态人群导航中存在局限性：固定预测时域无法适应环境变化和社交动态；将行人视为同质障碍物，忽略社交异质性和合作/对抗交互，导致在部分可观测环境中出现"冻结机器人问题"。

Method: 1. 将规划时域视为社交条件决策变量而非固定设计选择；2. 提出最优时域社会导航框架，根据推断的社交上下文在线优化MPC预测能力；3. 使用时空Transformer从局部轨迹观测推断行人合作属性作为社交先验；4. 基于强化学习策略在任务驱动目标下最优选择预测时域；5. 包含社交条件安全约束的时域感知MPC平衡导航效率和交互安全性。

Result: 与最先进基线相比：成功率提升6.8%，碰撞减少50%，导航时间缩短19%，超时率仅为0.8%。仿真和真实机器人实验验证了最优预测时域选择对部分可观测人群中鲁棒社交导航的关键作用。

Conclusion: 规划时域应作为社交条件决策变量进行优化，而非固定设计参数。提出的最优时域社会导航框架通过在线适应社交上下文，显著提升了机器人在拥挤环境中的导航效率和安全性，验证了社交最优规划时域的必要性。

Abstract: Navigating social robots in dense, dynamic crowds is challenging due to environmental uncertainty and complex human-robot interactions. While Model Predictive Control (MPC) offers strong real-time performance, its reliance on a fixed prediction horizon limits adaptability to changing environments and social dynamics. Furthermore, most MPC approaches treat pedestrians as homogeneous obstacles, ignoring social heterogeneity and cooperative or adversarial interactions, which often causes the Frozen Robot Problem in partially observable real-world environments. In this paper, we identify the planning horizon as a socially conditioned decision variable rather than a fixed design choice. Building on this insight, we propose an optimal-horizon social navigation framework that optimizes MPC foresight online according to inferred social context. A spatio-temporal Transformer infers pedestrian cooperation attributes from local trajectory observations, which serve as social priors for a reinforcement learning policy that optimally selects the prediction horizon under a task-driven objective. The resulting horizon-aware MPC incorporates socially conditioned safety constraints to balance navigation efficiency and interaction safety. Extensive simulations and real-world robot experiments demonstrate that optimal foresight selection is critical for robust social navigation in partially observable crowds. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, the proposed approach achieves a 6.8\% improvement in success rate, reduces collisions by 50\%, and shortens navigation time by 19\%, with a low timeout rate of 0.8\%, validating the necessity of socially optimal planning horizons for efficient and safe robot navigation in crowded environments. Code and videos are available at Under Review.

</details>


### [332] [Planning Method for Skill-Based Control of Robots Using a PLC as Skill Trigger](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00555)
*Andreas Gaugenrieder,Hari Hara Balasubramaniam,Jannik Möhrle,Rüdiger Daub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种结合运动序列优化的技能型机器人编程方法，通过MoveContinuousSkill实现执行时间显著提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能型机器人编程方案忽视运动序列优化，导致执行效率低下，需要改进

Method: 引入集成运动序列优化的规划方法，创建MoveContinuousSkill，在可编程逻辑控制器上实现软件

Result: 通过优化运动序列显著改善执行时间，并在多个机器人系统上成功应用

Conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了技能型机器人编程的执行效率，具有实际应用价值

Abstract: Skill-based programming of robots provides a flexible approach for automation. Existing solutions neglect the optimization of motion sequences, leading to inefficiencies in execution. This work introduces a planning method that enhances skill-based robot programming by integrating motion sequence optimization. This optimization leads to a new MoveContinuousSkill. The software for executing the MoveContinuousSkill is implemented on a Programmable Logic Controller and applied across multiple robotic systems. Experimental results demonstrate a significant improvement in execution time through optimized motion sequence.

</details>


### [333] [LangGap: Diagnosing and Closing the Language Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00592)
*Yuchen Hou,Lin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VLA模型在标准基准上达到95%+成功率，但实验发现它们实际上忽略了语言指令。作者构建了LangGap基准，通过语义扰动揭示VLA模型的语言理解缺陷，并发现数据增强只能部分解决问题，随着语义多样性增加，模型学习能力严重不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在标准基准上表现优异（>95%成功率），但系统实验发现它们实际上忽视了语言指令。先前工作缺乏：1) 系统语义扰动诊断；2) 强制语言理解的基准设计；3) 语言多样性的训练数据。

Method: 构建LangGap基准，基于四维语义扰动方法——在保持桌面布局不变的情况下改变指令语义。与LIBERO等现有基准（每个布局只分配一个任务）不同，LangGap在相同布局下充分多样化拾取放置任务，强制模型理解语言。通过目标数据增强实验来验证解决方案。

Result: 目标数据增强可以部分缩小语言差距——单任务训练成功率从0%提升到90%，多任务训练从0%提升到28%。但随着扩展任务语义多样性增加，模型学习能力严重不足，即使训练过的任务也表现不佳。

Conclusion: VLA模型在理解多样化语言指令方面存在根本性挑战，这正是LangGap基准的长期价值所在。现有模型在强制语言理解的基准上表现极差，揭示了当前VLA方法的局限性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve over 95% success on standard benchmarks. However, through systematic experiments, we find that current state-of-the-art VLA models largely ignore language instructions. Prior work lacks: (1) systematic semantic perturbation diagnostics, (2) a benchmark that forces language understanding by design, and (3) linguistically diverse training data.
  This paper constructs the LangGap benchmark, based on a four-dimensional semantic perturbation method -- varying instruction semantics while keeping the tabletop layout fixed -- revealing language understanding deficits in π0.5. Existing benchmarks like LIBERO assign only one task per layout, underutilizing available objects and target locations; LangGap fully diversifies pick-and-place tasks under identical layouts, forcing models to truly understand language.
  Experiments show that targeted data augmentation can partially close the language gap -- success rate improves from 0% to 90% with single-task training, and 0% to 28% with multi-task training. However, as semantic diversity of extended tasks increases, model learning capacity proves severely insufficient; even trained tasks perform poorly. This reveals a fundamental challenge for VLA models in understanding diverse language instructions -- precisely the long-term value of LangGap.

</details>


### [334] [AI-IO: An Aerodynamics-Inspired Real-Time Inertial Odometry for Quadrotors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00597)
*Jiahao Cui,Feng Yu,Linzuo Zhang,Yu Hu,Danping Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于转子转速测量和Transformer架构的惯性里程计，通过物理建模提升四旋翼无人机速度估计精度和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型惯性里程计要么仅用IMU数据，要么加入推力等动态相关输入，但缺乏对底层物理模型的原则性建模，导致可解释性差、泛化能力有限且精度受限。

Method: 基于空气动力学模型和IMU测量模型，识别出转子转速测量这一关键物理量，设计基于Transformer的惯性里程计架构，有效利用时序依赖进行去噪和空气动力学建模，并结合不确定性感知的扩展卡尔曼滤波器进行验证。

Result: 引入转子转速测量使速度预测精度提升36.9%，Transformer架构进一步带来22.4%的精度增益。在多个数据集和实时系统中验证了优越的精度、泛化能力和实时性能。

Conclusion: 通过物理启发的建模和Transformer架构，显著提升了四旋翼惯性里程计的精度和泛化能力，提供了真实世界数据集并开源代码促进研究。

Abstract: Inertial Odometry (IO) has gained attention in quadrotor applications due to its sole reliance on inertial measurement units (IMUs), attributed to its lightweight design, low cost, and robust performance across diverse environments. However, most existing learning-based inertial odometry systems for quadrotors either use only IMU data or include additional dynamics-related inputs such as thrust, but still lack a principled formulation of the underlying physical model to be learned. This lack of interpretability hampers the model's ability to generalize and often limits its accuracy. In this work, we approach the inertial odometry learning problem from a different perspective. Inspired by the aerodynamics model and IMU measurement model, we identify the key physical quantity--rotor speed measurements required for inertial odometry and design a transformer-based inertial odometry. By incorporating rotor speed measurements, the proposed model improves velocity prediction accuracy by 36.9%. Furthermore, the transformer architecture more effectively exploits temporal dependencies for denoising and aerodynamics modeling, yielding an additional 22.4% accuracy gain over previous results. To support evaluation, we also provide a real-world quadrotor flight dataset capturing IMU measurements and rotor speed for high-speed motion. Finally, combined with an uncertainty-aware extended Kalman filter (EKF), our framework is validated across multiple datasets and real-time systems, demonstrating superior accuracy, generalization, and real-time performance. We share the code and data to promote further research (https://github.com/SJTU-ViSYS-team/AI-IO).

</details>


### [335] [I-Perceive: A Foundation Model for Active Perception with Language Instructions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00600)
*Yongxi Huang,Zhuohang Wang,Wenjing Tang,Cewu Lu,Panpan Cai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: I-Perceive是一个基于自然语言指令的主动感知基础模型，专为移动机械臂和室内环境设计，通过融合视觉语言模型和几何基础模型来预测符合开放指令的相机视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动感知方法主要局限于局部场景（如桌面）和固定感知目标（如减少遮挡），难以处理大规模环境中开放式的感知意图。需要一种能够根据自然语言指令进行主动感知的通用解决方案。

Method: 提出I-Perceive模型，将视觉语言模型（VLM）主干与几何基础模型融合，结合语义和几何理解。使用自动化可扩展的数据生成管道，在包含真实世界场景扫描数据和模拟数据的多样化数据集上进行训练。

Result: I-Perceive在相机视角预测准确性和指令跟随方面显著优于现有最先进的VLM，并在新场景和任务上表现出强大的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: I-Perceive通过融合语义和几何理解，成功解决了大规模环境中基于自然语言指令的主动感知挑战，为移动机械臂的开放意图感知提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Active perception, the ability of a robot to proactively adjust its viewpoint to acquire task-relevant information, is essential for robust operation in unstructured real-world environments. While critical for downstream tasks such as manipulation, existing approaches have largely been confined to local settings (e.g., table-top scenes) with fixed perception objectives (e.g., occlusion reduction). Addressing active perception with open-ended intents in large-scale environments remains an open challenge. To bridge this gap, we propose I-Perceive, a foundation model for active perception conditioned on natural language instructions, designed for mobile manipulators and indoor environments. I-Perceive predicts camera views that follows open-ended language instructions, based on image-based scene contexts. By fusing a Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone with a geometric foundation model, I-Perceive bridges semantic and geometric understanding, thus enabling effective reasoning for active perception.
