We train I-Perceive on a diverse dataset comprising real-world scene-scanning data and simulation data, both processed via an automated and scalable data generation pipeline. Experiments demonstrate that I-Perceive significantly outperforms state-of-the-art VLMs in both prediction accuracy and instruction following of generated camera views, and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to novel scenes and tasks.

</details>


### [336] [TGM-VLA: Task-Guided Mixup for Sampling-Efficient and Robust Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00615)
*Fanqi Pu,Lei Jiang,Wenming Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种新的机器人模仿学习框架，通过优化关键帧采样、颜色反转投影和任务引导混合技术，显著提升模型性能和训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人模仿学习存在数据质量和训练策略问题：RLBench的关键帧采样存在冗余和分布不平衡，导致内存使用低效和优化不稳定；点云重投影到多视图图像时，黑色背景使暗色物体难以区分和操作。

Method: 1. 重新设计和优化关键帧采样策略，减少80%内存消耗并加速5倍训练；2. 增加颜色反转投影分支，解决暗色物体模糊问题；3. 提出任务引导混合技术，根据任务指令动态融合点云和动作热图。

Result: 在RLBench上达到90.5%的成功率，在COLOSSEUM基准测试的干扰条件下达到68.8%成功率，均达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: 提出的整体框架通过采样优化、颜色反转投影和任务引导混合，显著提升了机器人模仿学习的性能和训练效率，在多个基准测试中表现优异。

Abstract: The performance of robotic imitation learning is fundamentally limited by data quality and training strategies. Prevalent sampling strategies on RLBench suffer from severe keyframe redundancy and imbalanced temporal distribution, leading to inefficient memory usage and unstable optimization. Moreover, reprojecting point clouds onto multi-view images with a black background--while more efficient than voxel-based methods--often causes dark objects to be indistinguishable and hard to manipulate. In this work, we propose a novel holistic framework that significantly improves both model performance and training efficiency. First, we redesign and optimize the keyframe sampling strategy, reducing memory consumption by 80% and accelerating training speed by 5x. Second, we augment the model with a color inversion projection branch--a simple yet effective module that resolves the ambiguity of dark objects. Finally, we propose a task-guided mixup technique that dynamically fuses point clouds and action heatmaps according to task instructions, greatly improving robustness to distractors and performance in multi-goal scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with a 90.5% success rate on RLBench and 68.8% on the COLOSSEUM benchmark under challenging interference conditions. Our code and checkpoints are available at https://github.com/PuFanqi23/TGM-VLA.

</details>


### [337] [Validation of Space Robotics in Underwater Environments via Disturbance Robustness Equivalency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00628)
*Joris Verhagen,Elias Krantz,Chelsea Sidrane,David Dörner,Nicola De Carli,Pedro Roque,Huina Mao,Gunnar Tibert,Ivan Stenius,Christer Fuglesang,Dimos Dimarogonas,Jana Tumova*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用水下环境模拟微重力动态的空间机器人验证框架，通过信号时序逻辑规范定义任务，并基于最大扰动鲁棒性来克服环境差异，确保空间任务与验证任务具有相同的鲁棒性程度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下环境是验证空间机器人的优秀平台，但其动力学和环境条件与真实空间环境仍存在差异，需要一种方法来克服这些差异，确保验证结果能准确反映空间任务性能。

Method: 1. 使用信号时序逻辑（STL）表达高级空间任务规范；2. 引入最大扰动鲁棒性概念来克服环境差异；3. 将运动规划问题表述为空间任务与验证任务具有相同扰动鲁棒性程度；4. 在验证平台上执行与空间任务几乎相同的控制策略；5. 通过估计执行过程中的扰动并与鲁棒性程度比较来评估验证框架。

Result: 建立了一个双实验评估设置：水下机器人在近中性浮力条件下运行，用于验证实验性平面航天器平台或CubeSat在高保真空间动力学模拟器中的规划和控制策略。

Conclusion: 该框架通过扰动鲁棒性分析，使水下验证能够准确反映空间任务性能，为空间机器人提供了实用的地面验证方法，弥合了水下环境与空间环境之间的动力学差异。

Abstract: We present an experimental validation framework for space robotics that leverages underwater environments to approximate microgravity dynamics. While neutral buoyancy conditions make underwater robotics an excellent platform for space robotics validation, there are still dynamical and environmental differences that need to be overcome. Given a high-level space mission specification, expressed in terms of a Signal Temporal Logic specification, we overcome these differences via the notion of maximal disturbance robustness of the mission. We formulate the motion planning problem such that the original space mission and the validation mission achieve the same disturbance robustness degree. The validation platform then executes its mission plan using a near-identical control strategy to the space mission where the closed-loop controller considers the spacecraft dynamics. Evaluating our validation framework relies on estimating disturbances during execution and comparing them to the disturbance robustness degree, providing practical evidence of operation in the space environment. Our evaluation features a dual-experiment setup: an underwater robot operating under near-neutral buoyancy conditions to validate the planning and control strategy of either an experimental planar spacecraft platform or a CubeSat in a high-fidelity space dynamics simulator.

</details>


### [338] [Optimal Solutions for the Moving Target Vehicle Routing Problem via Branch-and-Price with Relaxed Continuity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00663)
*Anoop Bhat,Geordan Gutow,Zhongqiang Ren,Sivakumar Rathinam,Howie Choset*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种精确算法BPRC来解决移动目标车辆路径问题，通过新的标签算法和支配准则处理移动目标和时变旅行成本，显著提升了求解效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MT-VRP问题涉及多个智能体拦截移动目标，需要考虑速度、时间窗和容量约束。现有方法在处理移动目标和时变旅行成本时效率较低，需要更有效的精确算法。

Method: 提出分支定价与松弛连续性算法（BPRC），核心是新的标签算法，采用专门为移动目标问题设计的支配准则来解决定价子问题。

Result: 在最多25个目标的实例上，算法比基于先前工作的基线方法快一个数量级以上找到最优解，在智能体容量有限的情况下表现尤为突出。

Conclusion: BPRC算法有效解决了MT-VRP问题，新的标签算法和支配准则显著提升了求解移动目标问题的效率，特别是在容量受限场景中。

Abstract: The Moving Target Vehicle Routing Problem (MT-VRP) seeks trajectories for several agents that intercept a set of moving targets, subject to speed, time window, and capacity constraints. We introduce an exact algorithm, Branch-and-Price with Relaxed Continuity (BPRC), for the MT-VRP. The main challenge in a branch-and-price approach for the MT-VRP is the pricing subproblem, which is complicated by moving targets and time-dependent travel costs between targets. Our key contribution is a new labeling algorithm that solves this subproblem by means of a novel dominance criterion tailored for problems with moving targets. Numerical results on instances with up to 25 targets show that our algorithm finds optimal solutions more than an order of magnitude faster than a baseline based on previous work, showing particular strength in scenarios with limited agent capacities.

</details>


### [339] [Wild-Drive: Off-Road Scene Captioning and Path Planning via Robust Multi-modal Routing and Efficient Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00694)
*Zihang Wang,Xu Li,Benwu Wang,Wenkai Zhu,Xieyuanli Chen,Dong Kong,Kailin Lyu,Yinan Du,Yiming Peng,Haoyang Che*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Wild-Drive是一个用于越野场景的联合场景描述与路径规划框架，通过多模态编码器和模态路由桥解决传感器退化问题，在恶劣环境下表现稳定


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有场景描述方法主要针对结构化城市场景，在越野环境中易受雨、雾、雪、黑暗等单模态退化影响，且缺乏统一的场景描述与路径规划联合建模框架

Method: 采用现代多模态编码器，提出任务条件化的模态路由桥MoRo-Former来自适应聚合可靠信息，集成高效大语言模型、规划token和GRU解码器来生成结构化描述和预测未来轨迹

Result: 在OR-C2P数据集和自收集数据集上，Wild-Drive优于现有基于LLM的方法，在传感器退化条件下表现更稳定

Conclusion: Wild-Drive为越野环境提供了一个高效的联合场景描述与路径规划框架，能够适应恶劣感知条件，提高自动驾驶系统的透明度和安全性

Abstract: Explainability and transparent decision-making are essential for the safe deployment of autonomous driving systems. Scene captioning summarizes environmental conditions and risk factors in natural language, improving transparency, safety, and human--robot interaction. However, most existing approaches target structured urban scenarios; in off-road environments, they are vulnerable to single-modality degradations caused by rain, fog, snow, and darkness, and they lack a unified framework that jointly models structured scene captioning and path planning. To bridge this gap, we propose Wild-Drive, an efficient framework for off-road scene captioning and path planning. Wild-Drive adopts modern multimodal encoders and introduces a task-conditioned modality-routing bridge, MoRo-Former, to adaptively aggregate reliable information under degraded sensing. It then integrates an efficient large language model (LLM), together with a planning token and a gate recurrent unit (GRU) decoder, to generate structured captions and predict future trajectories. We also build the OR-C2P Benchmark, which covers structured off-road scene captioning and path planning under diverse sensor corruption conditions. Experiments on OR-C2P dataset and a self-collected dataset show that Wild-Drive outperforms prior LLM-based methods and remains more stable under degraded sensing. The code and benchmark will be publicly available at https://github.com/wangzihanggg/Wild-Drive.

</details>


### [340] [Keyframe-Guided Structured Rewards for Reinforcement Learning in Long-Horizon Laboratory Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00719)
*Yibo Qiu,Shu'ang Sun,Haoliang Ye,Ronald X Xu,Mingzhai Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于关键帧引导的奖励生成框架，通过从演示中提取运动感知关键帧，在潜在空间中使用扩散模型生成阶段目标，构建几何进度奖励来指导在线强化学习，提高实验室自动化中长时程精密操作的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实验室自动化中的长时程精密操作（如移液枪头安装和液体转移）需要满足严格程序逻辑的策略，但现有方法在奖励稀疏性、多阶段结构约束、噪声或不完美演示方面存在困难，导致探索效率低和收敛不稳定。

Method: 提出关键帧引导奖励生成框架：1) 从演示中自动提取运动感知关键帧；2) 通过潜在空间中的扩散基预测器生成阶段目标；3) 构建基于几何进度的奖励指导在线强化学习；4) 集成多视角视觉编码、基于潜在相似性的进度跟踪和人在环强化微调。

Result: 在四个真实世界实验室任务中（包括高精度移液枪头安装和动态液体转移），该方法在40-60分钟在线微调后平均成功率达到82%。相比HG-DAgger（42%）和Hil-ConRFT（47%）有显著提升。

Conclusion: 该方法证明了结构化关键帧引导奖励在克服探索瓶颈方面的有效性，为高精度、长时程机器人实验室自动化提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Long-horizon precision manipulation in laboratory automation, such as pipette tip attachment and liquid transfer, requires policies that respect strict procedural logic while operating in continuous, high-dimensional state spaces. However, existing approaches struggle with reward sparsity, multi-stage structural constraints, and noisy or imperfect demonstrations, leading to inefficient exploration and unstable convergence. We propose a Keyframe-Guided Reward Generation Framework that automatically extracts kinematics-aware keyframes from demonstrations, generates stage-wise targets via a diffusion-based predictor in latent space, and constructs a geometric progress-based reward to guide online reinforcement learning. The framework integrates multi-view visual encoding, latent similarity-based progress tracking, and human-in-the-loop reinforcement fine-tuning on a Vision-Language-Action backbone to align policy optimization with the intrinsic stepwise logic of biological protocols. Across four real-world laboratory tasks, including high-precision pipette attachment and dynamic liquid transfer, our method achieves an average success rate of 82% after 40--60 minutes of online fine-tuning. Compared with HG-DAgger (42%) and Hil-ConRFT (47%), our approach demonstrates the effectiveness of structured keyframe-guided rewards in overcoming exploration bottlenecks and providing a scalable solution for high-precision, long-horizon robotic laboratory automation.

</details>


### [341] [UniHM: Unified Dexterous Hand Manipulation with Vision Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00732)
*Zhenhao Zhang,Jiaxin Liu,Ye Shi,Jingya Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UniHM是一个首个通过自由形式语言指令指导统一灵巧手操作的框架，使用统一的手部-灵巧标记器将不同手部形态映射到共享码本，通过视觉语言动作模型从人类交互数据学习，并引入物理引导的动态细化模块确保物理可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常依赖物体中心线索或精确的手-物体交互序列，缺乏开放词汇指令的丰富、组合性指导。需要开发能够通过自由形式语言指令指导灵巧手操作的统一框架。

Method: 提出统一手部-灵巧标记器将异构手部形态映射到共享码本；训练仅基于人类-物体交互数据的视觉语言动作模型；引入物理引导的动态细化模块进行分段联合优化。

Result: 在多个数据集和真实世界评估中，UniHM在已见和未见物体及轨迹上都取得了最先进的结果，展示了强大的泛化能力和高物理可行性。

Conclusion: UniHM是首个通过自由形式语言指令指导统一灵巧手操作的框架，无需大规模遥操作数据集，能够生成人类般自然的操作序列，并确保物理可行性，具有强大的泛化能力。

Abstract: Planning physically feasible dexterous hand manipulation is a central challenge in robotic manipulation and Embodied AI. Prior work typically relies on object-centric cues or precise hand-object interaction sequences, foregoing the rich, compositional guidance of open-vocabulary instruction. We introduce UniHM, the first framework for unified dexterous hand manipulation guided by free-form language commands. We propose a Unified Hand-Dexterous Tokenizer that maps heterogeneous dexterous-hand morphologies into a single shared codebook, improving cross-dexterous hand generalization and scalability to new morphologies. Our vision language action model is trained solely on human-object interaction data, eliminating the need for massive real-world teleoperation datasets, and demonstrates strong generalizability in producing human-like manipulation sequences from open-ended language instructions. To ensure physical realism, we introduce a physics-guided dynamic refinement module that performs segment-wise joint optimization under generative and temporal priors, yielding smooth and physically feasible manipulation sequences. Across multiple datasets and real-world evaluations, UniHM attains state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen objects and trajectories, demonstrating strong generalization and high physical feasibility. Our project page at \href{https://unihm.github.io/}{https://unihm.github.io/}.

</details>


### [342] [Online Generation of Collision-Free Trajectories in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00759)
*Nermin Covic,Bakir Lacevic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种在线方法，将任意几何路径转换为运动学可行、加加速度受限的轨迹，使用五次/四次样条，支持实时适应环境变化和动态重规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路径规划器（如RRT、PRM、ARA*等）生成的路径通常只是几何序列，缺乏运动学可行性，无法直接用于机器人控制。需要一种能够实时将几何路径转换为平滑、加加速度受限轨迹的方法，以适应动态环境和频繁的目标状态变化。

Method: 提出在线转换方法，将几何路径序列转换为五次/四次样条序列，可按用户指定的控制率离散化并流式传输给底层控制器。方法支持实时适应环境变化，可随时重新调用以从机器人当前位置生成到目标状态的新轨迹，保证轨迹在一定时间内无碰撞且几何偏差有界。

Result: 对比仿真研究表明，该方法在平滑性、计算时间和实时性能方面优于竞争方法，特别是在目标状态频繁变化的场景中（高达1kHz）。真实机器人实验验证了该方法在包括人类存在的现实场景中的可行性。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效将任意几何路径转换为运动学可行、加加速度受限的轨迹，支持实时适应动态环境，在仿真和真实机器人实验中均表现出优越性能，适用于需要高频重规划的动态场景。

Abstract: In this paper, we present an online method for converting an arbitrary geometric path represented by a sequence of states, generated by any planner (e.g., sampling-based planners like RRT or PRM, search-based planners like ARA*, etc.), into a corresponding kinematically feasible, jerk-limited trajectory. The method generates a sequence of quintic/quartic splines that can be discretized at a user-specified control rate, and then streamed to a low-level robot controller. Our approach enables real-time adaptation to newly captured changes in the environment. It can also be re-invoked at any time instance to generate a new trajectory from the robot's current to a desired target state or sequence of states. We can guarantee that the trajectory will remain collision-free for a certain amount of time in dynamic environments, while allowing bounded geometric deviation from the original path. The kinematic constraints are taken into account, including limited jerk. We validate the approach in a comparative simulation study against the competing method, demonstrating favorable behavior w.r.t. smoothness, computational time, and real-time performance, particularly in scenarios with frequent changes of target states (up to 1 [kHz]). Experiments on a real robot demonstrate that the proposed approach can be used in real-world scenarios including human presence.

</details>


### [343] [Hippo: High-performance Interior-Point and Projection-based Solver for Generic Constrained Trajectory Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00871)
*Haizhou Zhao,Ludovic Righetti,Majid Khadiv*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HIPPO：一种基于内点法的轨迹优化求解器，能够高效处理不等式和等式约束，适用于机器人控制与运动规划中的复杂任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于序列二次规划（SQP）或微分动态规划（DDP）的轨迹优化器存在计算效率低、建模灵活性差、对需要硬约束的复杂任务收敛性不佳等问题。

Method: 采用内点法（IPM）处理不等式约束，并引入自适应障碍更新策略；通过投影或内点法处理硬等式约束。

Result: 在广泛的数值基准测试中，HIPPO 在处理需要高质量解的困难机器人轨迹优化问题（如运动与操作）时，表现出比现有最先进求解器更强的鲁棒性和计算效率。

Conclusion: HIPPO 为机器人轨迹优化问题提供了一个鲁棒且高效的替代求解器，特别适用于具有复杂约束的挑战性任务。

Abstract: Trajectory optimization is the core of modern model-based robotic control and motion planning. Existing trajectory optimizers, based on sequential quadratic programming (SQP) or differential dynamic programming (DDP), are often limited by their slow computation efficiency, low modeling flexibility, and poor convergence for complex tasks requiring hard constraints. In this paper, we introduce Hippo, a solver that can handle inequality constraints using the interior-point method (IPM) with an adaptive barrier update strategy and hard equality constraints via projection or IPM. Through extensive numerical benchmarks, we show that Hippo is a robust and efficient alternative to existing state-of-the-art solvers for difficult robotic trajectory optimization problems requiring high-quality solutions, such as locomotion and manipulation.

</details>


### [344] [A Novel Reconfigurable Dexterous Hand Based on Triple-Symmetric Bricard Parallel Mechanism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00892)
*Chunxu Tian,Zhichao Huang,Hongzeng Li,Bo Wang,Jinghao Jia,Yirui Sun,Dan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于并联机构的新型机器人手，采用三对称Bricard连杆作为可重构手掌，增强对不同形状尺寸物体的适应性，通过拓扑和尺寸综合优化自由度与连杆配置，平衡灵巧性、稳定性和负载能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种能够适应不同形状和尺寸物体的机器人手，提高抓取操作的通用性和精度，解决传统机器人手在适应性和多功能性方面的限制。

Method: 1. 使用三对称Bricard连杆作为可重构手掌
2. 通过拓扑和尺寸综合优化机构自由度与连杆配置
3. 采用螺旋理论和闭环约束进行运动学分析
4. 基于工作空间、刚度和运动/力传递效率评估性能
5. 开发原型并进行系列抓取实验验证

Result: 原型实验表明，该设计能够稳定高效地操作各种物体，验证了设计在提高抓取通用性和操作精度方面的有效性，为先进机器人操作任务提供了有前景的解决方案。

Conclusion: 基于并联机构和可重构Bricard手掌的机器人手设计有效提升了抓取操作的适应性和性能平衡，在灵巧性、稳定性和负载能力之间取得了良好平衡，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper introduces a novel design for a robotic hand based on parallel mechanisms. The proposed hand uses a triple-symmetric Bricard linkage as its reconfigurable palm, enhancing adaptability to objects of varying shapes and sizes. Through topological and dimensional synthesis, the mechanism achieves a well-balanced degree of freedom and link configuration suitable for reconfigurable palm motion, balancing dexterity, stability, and load capacity. Furthermore, kinematic analysis is performed using screw theory and closed-loop constraints, and performance is evaluated based on workspace, stiffness, and motion/force transmission efficiency. Finally, a prototype is developed and tested through a series of grasping experiments, demonstrating the ability to perform stable and efficient manipulation across a wide range of objects. The results validate the effectiveness of the design in improving grasping versatility and operational precision, offering a promising solution for advanced robotic manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [345] [Minimalist Compliance Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00913)
*Haochen Shi,Songbo Hu,Yifan Hou,Weizhuo Wang,Karen Liu,Shuran Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 仅使用电机电流/电压信号实现柔顺控制，无需力传感器、电流控制或学习，通过执行器信号和雅可比矩阵估计外力，集成到任务空间导纳控制器中


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔顺控制对安全物理交互至关重要，但通常需要力传感器等硬件，限制了应用。现有强化学习方法存在仿真到现实的差距、缺乏安全保证和系统复杂性问题

Method: 提出最小化柔顺控制方法，仅使用现代伺服电机和准直驱电机中可用的电机电流或电压信号，通过执行器信号和雅可比矩阵估计外部力矩，并集成到任务空间导纳控制器中

Result: 在机械臂、灵巧手和两个人形机器人上验证，通过视觉语言模型、模仿学习和基于模型的规划完成多种接触丰富的任务，展示了跨平台和规划范式的鲁棒、安全和柔顺交互

Conclusion: 该方法实现了仅使用电机信号的柔顺控制，无需额外硬件或学习，具有平台无关性和即插即用特性，为安全物理交互提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Compliance control is essential for safe physical interaction, yet its adoption is limited by hardware requirements such as force torque sensors. While recent reinforcement learning approaches aim to bypass these constraints, they often suffer from sim-to-real gaps, lack safety guarantees, and add system complexity. We propose Minimalist Compliance Control, which enables compliant behavior using only motor current or voltage signals readily available in modern servos and quasi-direct-drive motors, without force sensors, current control, or learning. External wrenches are estimated from actuator signals and Jacobians and incorporated into a task-space admittance controller, preserving sufficient force measurement accuracy for stable and responsive compliance control. Our method is embodiment-agnostic and plug-and-play with diverse high-level planners. We validate our approach on a robot arm, a dexterous hand, and two humanoid robots across multiple contact-rich tasks, using vision-language models, imitation learning, and model-based planning. The results demonstrate robust, safe, and compliant interaction across embodiments and planning paradigms.

</details>


### [346] [DAM-VLA: A Dynamic Action Model-Based Vision-Language-Action Framework for Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00926)
*Xiongfeng Peng,Jiaqian Yu,Dingzhe Li,Yixiang Jin,Lu Xu,Yamin Mao,Chao Zhang,Weiming Li,Sujin Jang,Dongwook Lee,Daehyun Ji*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DAM-VLA是一个动态动作模型的视觉-语言-动作框架，通过集成VLM推理和基于扩散的动作模型，专门解决机器人从粗大运动到精细操作的无缝切换问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架在动态环境中（如仓库、医院、家庭）难以平衡通用任务适应性和精细操作所需的专门精度。机器人需要无缝切换粗大运动和精确操作来完成复杂任务。

Method: 提出DAM-VLA框架，包含三个关键组件：1）动作路由机制，利用任务特定的视觉和语言线索选择合适的动作模型（如手臂运动或夹爪操作）；2）动态动作模型，融合高级VLM认知和低级视觉特征来预测动作；3）双尺度动作权重机制，实现手臂运动和夹爪操作模型之间的动态协调。

Result: 在模拟（SIMPLER、FurnitureBench）和真实世界环境中，DAM-VLA相比最先进的VLA方法取得了更高的成功率，展示了从标准拾取放置到要求更高的长时程和接触丰富任务的稳健泛化能力。

Conclusion: DAM-VLA通过集成VLM推理和专门化的扩散动作模型，有效解决了动态环境中机器人任务执行中粗大运动与精细操作之间的协调问题，为复杂机器人操作任务提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In dynamic environments such as warehouses, hospitals, and homes, robots must seamlessly transition between gross motion and precise manipulations to complete complex tasks. However, current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) frameworks, largely adapted from pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs), often struggle to reconcile general task adaptability with the specialized precision required for intricate manipulation. To address this challenge, we propose DAM-VLA, a dynamic action model-based VLA framework. DAM-VLA integrates VLM reasoning with diffusion-based action models specialized for arm and gripper control. Specifically, it introduces (i) an action routing mechanism, using task-specific visual and linguistic cues to select appropriate action models (e.g., arm movement or gripper manipulation), (ii) a dynamic action model that fuses high-level VLM cognition with low-level visual features to predict actions, and (iii) a dual-scale action weighting mechanism that enables dynamic coordination between the arm-movement and gripper-manipulation models. Across extensive evaluations, DAM-VLA achieves superior success rates compared to state-of-the-art VLA methods in simulated (SIMPLER, FurnitureBench) and real-world settings, showing robust generalization from standard pick-and-place to demanding long-horizon and contact-rich tasks.

</details>


### [347] [DRIFT: Diffusion-based Rule-Inferred For Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00936)
*Jinyang Zhao,Handong Zheng,Yanjiu Zhong,Qiang Zhang,Yu Kang,Shunyu Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DRIFT是一个用于移动机器人在非结构化环境中轨迹生成的扩散模型框架，通过整合关系归纳偏置和时间注意力偏置，平衡了运动平滑性和终端精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹生成方法在运动平滑性和终端精度之间存在矛盾：要么生成平滑但不精确的路径，要么生成几何准确但运动不稳定的轨迹。这限制了移动机器人在非结构化环境中执行精细任务的能力。

Method: 提出DRIFT框架，整合两种归纳偏置：1) 关系归纳偏置：通过GNN结构场景感知模块编码全局拓扑约束，确保整体平滑性；2) 时间注意力偏置：通过新颖的图条件时间感知GRU动态关注稀疏障碍物和目标，实现精确局部操控。

Result: DRIFT在平衡平滑性和精度方面表现优异，达到厘米级模仿保真度（0.041m FDE）和竞争性平滑度（27.19 Jerk），为下游控制提供高度可执行的参考轨迹。

Conclusion: DRIFT成功解决了移动机器人轨迹生成中平滑性与精度的权衡问题，通过整合两种归纳偏置的扩散框架，为精细任务执行提供了高质量的参考轨迹。

Abstract: Trajectory generation for mobile robots in unstructured environments faces a critical dilemma: balancing kinematic smoothness for safe execution with terminal precision for fine-grained tasks. Existing generative planners often struggle with this trade-off, yielding either smooth but imprecise paths or geometrically accurate but erratic motions. To address the aforementioned shortcomings, this article proposes DRIFT (Diffusion-based Rule-Inferred for Trajectories), a conditional diffusion framework designed to generate high-fidelity reference trajectories by integrating two complementary inductive biases. First, a Relational Inductive Bias, realized via a GNN-based Structured Scene Perception (SSP) module, encodes global topological constraints to ensure holistic smoothness. Second, a Temporal Attention Bias, implemented through a novel Graph-Conditioned Time-Aware GRU (GTGRU), dynamically attends to sparse obstacles and targets for precise local maneuvering. In the end, quantitative results demonstrate that DRIFT reconciles these conflicting objectives, achieving centimeter-level imitation fidelity (0.041m FDE) and competitive smoothness (27.19 Jerk). This balance yields highly executable reference plans for downstream control.

</details>


### [348] [HierKick: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Vision-Guided Soccer Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00948)
*Yizhi Chen,Zheng Zhang,Zhanxiang Cao,Yihe Chen,Shengcheng Fu,Liyun Yan,Yang Zhang,Jiali Liu,Haoyang Li,Yue Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HierKick：基于双频分层强化学习的视觉引导足球机器人控制框架，通过5Hz高层策略和50Hz低层控制器实现多时间尺度决策，在仿真和真实环境中均取得高成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足球机器人控制需要平衡长期战术规划和短期运动执行，传统端到端强化学习方法在复杂动态环境中面临挑战，需要一种有效的分层控制框架。

Method: 提出双频分层强化学习框架，包含：5Hz高层策略（集成YOLOv8实时检测和教练模型选择任务）和预训练的50Hz低层控制器（精确关节控制），实现接近、对齐、运球、踢球四步流程。

Result: 在IsaacGym中成功率95.2%，Mujoco中89.8%，真实世界中80%，证明框架在仿真和真实环境中的有效性。

Conclusion: HierKick为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供了有效的分层范式，其模块化设计和技能复用特性可扩展到多时间尺度任务，为智能机器人控制提供了新路径。

Abstract: Controlling soccer robots involves multi-time-scale decision-making, which requires balancing long-term tactical planning and short-term motion execution. Traditional end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) methods face challenges in complex dynamic environments. This paper proposes HierKick, a vision-guided soccer robot control framework based on dual-frequency hierarchical RL. The framework adopts a hierarchical control architecture featuring a 5 Hz high-level policy that integrates YOLOv8 for real-time detection and selects tasks via a coach model, and a pre-trained 50 Hz low-level controller for precise joint control. Through this architecture, the framework achieves the four steps of approaching, aligning, dribbling, and kicking. Experimental results show that the success rates of this framework are 95.2\% in IsaacGym, 89.8\% in Mujoco, and 80\% in the real world. HierKick provides an effective hierarchical paradigm for robot control in complex environments, extendable to multi-time-scale tasks, with its modular design and skill reuse offering a new path for intelligent robot control.

</details>


### [349] [MiniUGV$_2$: A Compact UAV-Deployable Tracked Ground Vehicle with Manipulation Capabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00972)
*Durgakant Pushp,Swapnil Kalhapure,Shaekh Mohammad Shithil,Lantao Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 研究人员开发了miniUGV₂——一种紧凑型无人机可部署的履带式地面车辆，用于探索无人机难以进入的隐蔽空间，具备双关节臂、LiDAR感知和磁力系留部署功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索"隐蔽空间"（即只有空中机器人能到达入口但无法深入探索的环境）面临几何约束、飞行时间有限和通信中断等挑战，需要新的解决方案来扩展无人机的能力。

Method: 设计了miniUGV₂系统，包含：1)双关节臂增强操控能力；2)集成LiDAR和深度传感器；3)模块化电子设备支持自主性；4)创新的系留模块采用电磁永磁头，实现安全部署、回收和可选脱离，避免缠绕问题。

Result: 实验验证了系统在崎岖地形导航、自我扶正和操控重达3.5公斤物体的能力，证明了miniUGV₂作为混合空中-地面机器人平台的实用性和多功能性。

Conclusion: miniUGV₂成功扩展了无人机进入隐蔽空间的能力，通过创新的系留部署机制和增强的感知操控系统，为解决空中机器人探索受限环境的问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Exploring and inspecting \emph{Hidden Spaces}, defined as environments whose entrances are accessible only to aerial robots but remain unexplored due to geometric constraints, limited flight time, and communication loss, remains a major challenge. We present miniUGV$_2$, a compact UAV-deployable tracked ground vehicle that extends UAV capabilities into confined environments. The system introduces dual articulated arms, integrated LiDAR and depth sensing, and modular electronics for enhanced autonomy. A novel tether module with an electro-permanent magnetic head enables safe deployment, retrieval, and optional detachment, thereby overcoming prior entanglement issues. Experiments demonstrate robust terrain navigation, self-righting, and manipulation of objects up to 3.5 kg, validating miniUGV$_2$ as a versatile platform for hybrid aerial-ground robotics.

</details>


### [350] [An Open-Source Modular Benchmark for Diffusion-Based Motion Planning in Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01023)
*Yun Li,Simon Thompson,Yidu Zhang,Ehsan Javanmardi,Manabu Tsukada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出开源模块化基准测试，将单体的扩散运动规划器分解为三个独立模块，在Autoware中实现实时可配置的求解器参数，并通过AWSIM闭环仿真验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散运动规划器评估忽略了ROS 2通信延迟和实时调度约束，且单体ONNX部署在导出时冻结所有求解器参数，无法适应实际自动驾驶系统的需求。

Method: 使用ONNX GraphSurgeon将18,398节点的单体扩散规划器分解为三个独立可执行模块，在C++中重新实现DPM-Solver++去噪循环，并集成到Autoware ROS 2节点中。

Result: 编码器缓存使延迟降低3.2倍；在N=3时，二阶求解比一阶求解减少41%的最终位移误差；系统支持运行时配置求解器参数，无需重新编译模型。

Conclusion: 该模块化基准测试填补了扩散规划器在闭环生产自动驾驶系统中的评估空白，提供了从仿真基准到真实车辆部署的直接路径。

Abstract: Diffusion-based motion planners have achieved state-of-the-art results on benchmarks such as nuPlan, yet their evaluation within closed-loop production autonomous driving stacks remains largely unexplored. Existing evaluations abstract away ROS 2 communication latency and real-time scheduling constraints, while monolithic ONNX deployment freezes all solver parameters at export time. We present an open-source modular benchmark that addresses both gaps: using ONNX GraphSurgeon, we decompose a monolithic 18,398 node diffusion planner into three independently executable modules and reimplement the DPM-Solver++ denoising loop in native C++. Integrated as a ROS 2 node within Autoware, the open-source AD stack deployed on real vehicles worldwide, the system enables runtime-configurable solver parameters without model recompilation and per-step observability of the denoising process, breaking the black box of monolithic deployment. Unlike evaluations in standalone simulators such as CARLA, our benchmark operates within a production-grade stack and is validated through AWSIM closed-loop simulation. Through systematic comparison of DPM-Solver++ (first- and second-order) and DDIM across six step-count configurations (N in {3, 5, 7, 10, 15, 20}), we show that encoder caching yields a 3.2x latency reduction, and that second-order solving reduces FDE by 41% at N=3 compared to first-order. The complete codebase will be released as open-source, providing a direct path from simulation benchmarks to real-vehicle deployment.

</details>


### [351] [Compact Task-Aligned Imitation Learning for Laboratory Automation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01110)
*Kanata Suzuki,Hanon Nakamurama,Kana Miyamoto,Tetsuya Ogata*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TVF-DiT：一个用于实验室自动化的紧凑型模仿学习框架，通过小规模基础模型（<500M参数）实现高效能，在三个真实实验室任务中达到86.6%的平均成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统实验室自动化依赖精心设计的运动管道和任务特定硬件接口，导致高设计成本和有限灵活性。现有模仿学习模型通常规模庞大，需要高性能计算资源，限制了在实际实验室环境中的应用。

Method: 提出TVF-DiT方法：通过紧凑适配器将自监督视觉基础模型与视觉语言模型对齐，并与基于Diffusion Transformer的动作专家集成。整个模型参数少于500M，可在低显存GPU上推理。

Result: 在三个真实实验室任务（试管清洁、试管排列、粉末转移）上的实验显示平均成功率为86.6%，显著优于其他轻量级基线。详细任务提示改善了视觉语言对齐和任务性能。

Conclusion: 当小规模基础模型通过扩散策略学习进行适当对齐和集成时，可以在有限计算资源下有效支持实际的实验室自动化应用。

Abstract: Robotic laboratory automation has traditionally relied on carefully engineered motion pipelines and task-specific hardware interfaces, resulting in high design cost and limited flexibility. While recent imitation learning techniques can generate general robot behaviors, their large model sizes often require high-performance computational resources, limiting applicability in practical laboratory environments. In this study, we propose a compact imitation learning framework for laboratory automation using small foundation models. The proposed method, TVF-DiT, aligns a self-supervised vision foundation model with a vision-language model through a compact adapter, and integrates them with a Diffusion Transformer-based action expert. The entire model consists of fewer than 500M parameters, enabling inference on low-VRAM GPUs. Experiments on three real-world laboratory tasks - test tube cleaning, test tube arrangement, and powder transfer - demonstrate an average success rate of 86.6%, significantly outperforming alternative lightweight baselines. Furthermore, detailed task prompts improve vision-language alignment and task performance. These results indicate that small foundation models, when properly aligned and integrated with diffusion-based policy learning, can effectively support practical laboratory automation with limited computational resources.

</details>


### [352] [From Dialogue to Execution: Mixture-of-Agents Assisted Interactive Planning for Behavior Tree-Based Long-Horizon Robot Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01113)
*Kanata Suzuki,Kazuki Hori,Haruka Miyoshi,Shuhei Kurita,Tetsuya Ogata*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个结合多智能体代理回答和行为树的框架，用于机器人交互式任务规划，减少人类干预，提高长时程任务执行效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的交互式任务规划在长时程任务中需要大量提问，增加用户负担，且平面规划表示难以管理复杂任务。

Method: 提出一个框架，整合基于多智能体的代理回答到交互式规划中，并生成行为树进行结构化长期执行。多智能体由多个基于大语言模型的专家智能体组成，能够回答一般或领域特定问题，减少不必要的人类干预。生成的行为树层次化表示任务逻辑，支持重试机制和多个机器人策略的动态切换。

Result: 在鸡尾酒制作任务实验中，该方法减少了约27%的人类回答需求，同时保持与完全人工回答行为树的结构和语义相似性。在真实机器人制作奶昔任务中，成功实现了长时程执行，具有自适应策略切换和动作失败恢复能力。

Conclusion: 多智能体辅助的交互式规划提高了对话效率，同时在真实世界机器人任务中保持了执行质量。

Abstract: Interactive task planning with large language models (LLMs) enables robots to generate high-level action plans from natural language instructions. However, in long-horizon tasks, such approaches often require many questions, increasing user burden. Moreover, flat plan representations become difficult to manage as task complexity grows. We propose a framework that integrates Mixture-of-Agents (MoA)-based proxy answering into interactive planning and generates Behavior Trees (BTs) for structured long-term execution. The MoA consists of multiple LLM-based expert agents that answer general or domain-specific questions when possible, reducing unnecessary human intervention. The resulting BT hierarchically represents task logic and enables retry mechanisms and dynamic switching among multiple robot policies. Experiments on cocktail-making tasks show that the proposed method reduces human response requirements by approximately 27% while maintaining structural and semantic similarity to fully human-answered BTs. Real-robot experiments on a smoothie-making task further demonstrate successful long-horizon execution with adaptive policy switching and recovery from action failures. These results indicate that MoA-assisted interactive planning improves dialogue efficiency while preserving execution quality in real-world robotic tasks.

</details>


### [353] [Fast Confidence-Aware Human Prediction via Hardware-accelerated Bayesian Inference for Safe Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01122)
*Michael Lu,Minh Bui,Xubo Lyu,Mo Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于粒子表示的置信感知预测框架，用于机器人导航中的人类轨迹预测，实现125Hz高频长时预测，支持多人预测，提升人机共存安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人在日常环境中的广泛应用，确保其在多人交互场景（如超市、养老院）中的安全导航变得至关重要。现有方法虽然使用贝叶斯框架建模人类理性导航意图，但需要更高效、更精细的预测方法来应对动态环境中人类行为的细微变化。

Method: 提出一种简单而新颖的置信感知预测方法，将未来预测视为粒子表示。该框架高度并行化，并在GPU上加速实现，支持125Hz的高频长时预测，并可轻松扩展到多人预测场景，提供更精细的时间步长预测。

Result: 通过真实世界实验验证，机器人能够在具有不同导航目标的多人环境中安全导航。相比现有方法，该方法支持更精细的预测时间步长，提供更细粒度的轨迹预测，使运动规划器能有效应对人类行为的细微变化。

Conclusion: 该方法在动态环境中展现了实现鲁棒高效人机共存的潜力，为机器人安全导航提供了有效的置信感知预测解决方案。

Abstract: As robots increasingly integrate into everyday environments, ensuring their safe navigation around humans becomes imperative. Efficient and safe motion planning requires robots to account for human behavior, particularly in constrained spaces such as grocery stores or care homes, where interactions with multiple individuals are common. Prior research has employed Bayesian frameworks to model human rationality based on navigational intent, enabling the prediction of probabilistic trajectories for planning purposes. In this work, we present a simple yet novel approach for confidence-aware prediction that treats future predictions as particles. This framework is highly parallelized and accelerated on an graphics processing unit (GPU). As a result, this enables longer-term predictions at a frequency of 125 Hz and can be easily extended for multi-human predictions. Compared to existing methods, our implementation supports finer prediction time steps, yielding more granular trajectory forecasts. This enhanced resolution allows motion planners to respond effectively to subtle changes in human behavior. We validate our approach through real-world experiments, demonstrating a robot safely navigating among multiple humans with diverse navigational goals. Our results highlight the methods potential for robust and efficient human-robot coexistence in dynamic environments.

</details>


### [354] [Pro-HOI: Perceptive Root-guided Humanoid-Object Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01126)
*Yuhang Lin,Jiyuan Shi,Dewei Wang,Jipeng Kong,Yong Liu,Chenjia Bai,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Pro-HOI是一个感知式根引导人形机器人-物体交互框架，通过根轨迹作为通用控制接口，结合持续物体估计模块，实现鲁棒的长时程人形机器人移动操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人执行可靠的人机物交互任务面临两个主要挑战：缺乏通用的控制接口和鲁棒的闭环感知机制。现有方法难以实现同时导航和移动操作的长时程任务。

Method: 1) 收集适合真实世界部署的箱体搬运动作，通过有符号距离场损失优化穿透伪影；2) 提出新颖的训练框架，将策略条件化于期望的根轨迹，同时仅将参考动作用作奖励；3) 集成持续物体估计模块，融合实时检测与数字孪生，实现自主滑移检测和重新抓取。

Result: 在Unitree G1机器人上的实证验证表明，Pro-HOI在泛化性和鲁棒性方面显著优于基线方法，能够在复杂的真实世界场景中实现可靠的长时程执行。

Conclusion: Pro-HOI框架通过根轨迹作为通用接口和持续物体估计模块，为人形机器人提供了可泛化、鲁棒的移动操作解决方案，成功解决了人机物交互中的控制接口和感知可靠性问题。

Abstract: Executing reliable Humanoid-Object Interaction (HOI) tasks for humanoid robots is hindered by the lack of generalized control interfaces and robust closed-loop perception mechanisms. In this work, we introduce Perceptive Root-guided Humanoid-Object Interaction, Pro-HOI, a generalizable framework for robust humanoid loco-manipulation. First, we collect box-carrying motions that are suitable for real-world deployment and optimize penetration artifacts through a Signed Distance Field loss. Second, we propose a novel training framework that conditions the policy on a desired root-trajectory while utilizing reference motion exclusively as a reward. This design not only eliminates the need for intricate reward tuning but also establishes root trajectory as a universal interface for high-level planners, enabling simultaneous navigation and loco-manipulation. Furthermore, to ensure operational reliability, we incorporate a persistent object estimation module. By fusing real-time detection with Digital Twin, this module allows the robot to autonomously detect slippage and trigger re-grasping maneuvers. Empirical validation on a Unitree G1 robot demonstrates that Pro-HOI significantly outperforms baselines in generalization and robustness, achieving reliable long-horizon execution in complex real-world scenarios.

</details>


### [355] [A Deployable Bio-inspired Compliant Leg Design for Enhanced Leaping in Quadruped Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01128)
*Yiyang Chen,Yuxin Liu,Jinzheng Zhou,Fanxin Wang,Qinglei Bu,Jie Sun,Yikun Cheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种仿生可部署柔性腿设计，通过3D打印PEBA材料的内网格结构模拟弹性能量存储机制，显著提升了四足机器人的垂直跳跃能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前四足机器人在工业巡检和灾难搜救等应用中需要更高的敏捷性和越障能力，但现有平台因电机峰值功率不足而限制了爆发性跳跃能力。

Method: 模仿沫蝉腿部的能量存储机制，设计了一种可部署柔性腿（DCL），采用3D打印的聚醚嵌段酰胺（PEBA）材料，内部为轻质网格结构，类似生物肌腱，能在机器人下蹲阶段储存弹性能量并在跳跃时快速释放以增强电机输出。

Result: 通过有限元分析和实验验证，该机械设计使机器人的垂直跳跃高度相对提升了17.1%。

Conclusion: 仿生可部署柔性腿设计能有效解决四足机器人爆发性跳跃能力不足的问题，为需要高敏捷性的应用场景提供了可行的技术解决方案。

Abstract: Quadruped robots are becoming increasingly essential for various applications, including industrial inspection and catastrophe search and rescue. These scenarios require robots to possess enhanced agility and obstacle-navigation skills. Nonetheless, the performance of current platforms is often constrained by insufficient peak motor power, limiting their ability to perform explosive jumps. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a bio-inspired method that emulates the energy-storage mechanism found in froghopper legs. We designed a Deployable Compliant Leg (DCL) utilizing a specialized 3D-printed elastic material, Polyether block amide (PEBA), featuring a lightweight internal lattice structure. This structure functions analogously to biological tendons, storing elastic energy during the robot's squatting phase and rapidly releasing it to augment motor output during the leap. The proposed mechanical design significantly enhances the robot's vertical jumping capability. Through finite element analysis (FEA) and experimental validation, we demonstrate a relative performance improvement of 17.1% in vertical jumping height.

</details>


### [356] [D-REX: Differentiable Real-to-Sim-to-Real Engine for Learning Dexterous Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01151)
*Haozhe Lou,Mingtong Zhang,Haoran Geng,Hanyang Zhou,Sicheng He,Zhiyuan Gao,Siheng Zhao,Jiageng Mao,Pieter Abbeel,Jitendra Malik,Daniel Seita,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于高斯溅射表示的可微分引擎，通过真实世界视觉观察和机器人控制信号识别物体质量，同时学习抓取策略，构建高保真数字孪生并缩小仿真与现实的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿真是开发机器人系统成本效益高且灵活的数据生成和政策学习平台，但仿真与现实之间的动态差距仍然是重大挑战，特别是在物理参数识别方面。

Method: 引入真实-仿真-真实引擎，利用高斯溅射表示构建可微分引擎，通过优化被操纵物体的质量自动构建高保真物理合理的数字孪生；提出新方法将可行的人类演示转移到模拟机器人演示，从有限数据中训练力感知抓取策略。

Result: 实验表明该引擎在各种物体几何形状和质量值下实现了准确鲁棒的质量识别；优化的质量值促进了力感知策略学习，在物体抓取方面取得了优越性能，有效缩小了仿真与现实的差距。

Conclusion: 该方法能够通过真实世界观察和机器人信号自动构建物理合理的数字孪生，同时学习有效的力感知抓取策略，为解决仿真与现实差距问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Simulation provides a cost-effective and flexible platform for data generation and policy learning to develop robotic systems. However, bridging the gap between simulation and real-world dynamics remains a significant challenge, especially in physical parameter identification. In this work, we introduce a real-to-sim-to-real engine that leverages the Gaussian Splat representations to build a differentiable engine, enabling object mass identification from real-world visual observations and robot control signals, while enabling grasping policy learning simultaneously. Through optimizing the mass of the manipulated object, our method automatically builds high-fidelity and physically plausible digital twins. Additionally, we propose a novel approach to train force-aware grasping policies from limited data by transferring feasible human demonstrations into simulated robot demonstrations. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our engine achieves accurate and robust performance in mass identification across various object geometries and mass values. Those optimized mass values facilitate force-aware policy learning, achieving superior and high performance in object grasping, effectively reducing the sim-to-real gap.

</details>


### [357] [RAG-RUSS: A Retrieval-Augmented Robotic Ultrasound for Autonomous Carotid Examination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01153)
*Dianye Huang,Ziping Cong,Nassir Navab,Zhongliang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出RAG-RUSS框架，通过可解释的决策过程实现自主颈动脉超声检查，结合检索增强生成技术解决医疗数据稀缺问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人超声方法多为基于规则或端到端黑盒模型，临床接受度低且存在安全隐患，需要可解释的自主超声检查系统。

Method: 开发RAG-RUSS可解释框架，结合检索增强生成技术，按照临床工作流程执行完整颈动脉检查，明确解释当前阶段和下一步计划动作。

Result: 在28名志愿者数据上训练，4名新志愿者测试，系统能解释当前扫描阶段并自主规划探头运动完成颈动脉横切面和纵切面检查。

Conclusion: RAG-RUSS框架实现了可解释的自主颈动脉超声检查，提高了临床接受度和安全性，为机器人超声的广泛应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Robotic ultrasound (US) has recently attracted increasing attention as a means to overcome the limitations of conventional US examinations, such as the strong operator dependence. However, the decision-making process of existing methods is often either rule-based or relies on end-to-end learning models that operate as black boxes. This has been seen as a main limit for clinical acceptance and raises safety concerns for widespread adoption in routine practice. To tackle this challenge, we introduce the RAG-RUSS, an interpretable framework capable of performing a full carotid examination in accordance with the clinical workflow while explicitly explaining both the current stage and the next planned action. Furthermore, given the scarcity of medical data, we incorporate retrieval-augmented generation to enhance generalization and reduce dependence on large-scale training datasets. The method was trained on data acquired from 28 volunteers, while an additional four volumetric scans recorded from previously unseen volunteers were reserved for testing. The results demonstrate that the method can explain the current scanning stage and autonomously plan probe motions to complete the carotid examination, encompassing both transverse and longitudinal planes.

</details>


### [358] [Path Integral Particle Filtering for Hybrid Systems via Saltation Matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01176)
*Karthik Shaji,Sreeranj Jayadevan,Bo Yuan,Hongzhe Yu,Yongxin Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于最优控制的粒子滤波方法，用于处理与环境间歇性接触的混合系统状态估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合系统在与环境间歇性接触时具有挑战性的动态特性，需要鲁棒的状态估计方法处理接触事件和非高斯噪声

Method: 采用路径积分滤波框架，利用平滑问题与最优控制的二元性，使用saltation矩阵映射接触事件期间的不确定性传播，形成路径积分最优控制问题

Result: 开发出计算高效、可靠的混合系统状态估计算法，能够处理异常值效应、非高斯噪声分布和具有挑战性的接触动态，在多个设置中始终优于强基线方法

Conclusion: 该方法为具有随机动态的混合系统提供了有效的状态估计解决方案，通过广泛的实验结果证明了其优越性能

Abstract: We present an optimal-control-based particle filtering method for state estimation in hybrid systems that undergo intermittent contact with their environments. We follow the path integral filtering framework that exploits the duality between the smoothing problem and optimal control. We leverage saltation matrices to map out the uncertainty propagation during contact events for hybrid systems. The resulting path integral optimal control problem allows for a state estimation algorithm robust to outlier effects, flexible to non-Gaussian noise distributions, that also handles the challenging contact dynamics in hybrid systems. This work offers a computationally efficient and reliable estimation algorithm for hybrid systems with stochastic dynamics. We also present extensive experimental results demonstrating that our approach consistently outperforms strong baselines across multiple settings.

</details>


### [359] [riMESA: Consensus ADMM for Real-World Collaborative SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01178)
*Daniel McGann,Michael Kaess*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出riMESA——一种鲁棒、增量、分布式的C-SLAM后端算法，能处理异常值、有限通信，实现多机器人实时状态估计，性能优于现有方法7倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有C-SLAM后端算法难以应对实际部署中的通信限制、异常测量和在线操作等现实挑战，需要一种更鲁棒、分布式的解决方案。

Method: 提出Robust Incremental Manifold Edge-based Separable ADMM (riMESA)，基于共识交替方向乘子法(ADMM)，采用流形边缘可分离设计，实现分布式优化。

Result: 在合成和真实C-SLAM数据集上验证，riMESA能适应各种条件和网络环境，实时生成准确状态估计，在真实数据集上精度比先前方法高7倍以上。

Conclusion: riMESA是鲁棒、分布式的C-SLAM后端解决方案，证明了ADMM作为分布式优化理论基础的适用性，能有效应对实际部署挑战。

Abstract: Collaborative Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (C-SLAM) is a fundamental capability for multi-robot teams as it enables downstream tasks like planning and navigation. However, existing C-SLAM back-end algorithms that are required to solve this problem struggle to address the practical realities of real-world deployments (i.e. communication limitations, outlier measurements, and online operation). In this paper we propose Robust Incremental Manifold Edge-based Separable ADMM (riMESA) -- a robust, incremental, and distributed C-SLAM back-end that is resilient to outliers, reliable in the face of limited communication, and can compute accurate state estimates for a multi-robot team in real-time. Through the development of riMESA, we, more broadly, make an argument for the use of Consensus Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers as a theoretical foundation for distributed optimization tasks in robotics like C-SLAM due to its flexibility, accuracy, and fast convergence. We conclude this work with an in-depth evaluation of riMESA on a variety of C-SLAM problem scenarios and communication network conditions using both synthetic and real-world C-SLAM data. These experiments demonstrate that riMESA is able to generalize across conditions, produce accurate state estimates, operate in real-time, and outperform the accuracy of prior works by a factor >7x on real-world datasets.

</details>


### [360] [Agent-Based Simulation of Trust Development in Human-Robot Teams: An Empirically-Validated Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01189)
*Ravi Kalluri*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于实证的智能体模型，模拟人机团队中的信任动态、工作负载分配和协作绩效，通过验证与元分析结果一致，发现机器人可靠性对信任和任务成功影响最大，揭示了信任与绩效可能脱钩的现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是开发一个基于实证的智能体模型，以理解和预测人机团队中的信任动态，识别过度信任和信任不足的条件，为实际部署前提供诊断工具。

Method: 使用NetLogo 6.4.0实现智能体模型，模拟2-10个智能体执行不同复杂度任务。通过Hancock等人(2021)的元分析进行验证，使用OFAT和全因子设计进行敏感性分析，并进行场景分析和因子方差分析。

Result: 模型验证显示对8个信任前因类别中的4个具有区间有效性，强序数有效性(Spearman ρ=0.833)。机器人可靠性对信任(η²=0.35)、任务成功(η²=0.93)和生产力(η²=0.89)影响最大。发现信任与绩效脱钩现象：信任恢复场景生产力最高但信任最低，不可靠机器人场景信任最高但任务成功率最低。因子方差分析显示可靠性、透明度、沟通和协作对信任有显著主效应，解释了45.4%的信任方差。

Conclusion: 该模型提供了基于证据的工具，可在部署前识别过度信任和信任不足的条件。研究发现信任不对称比率低于元分析基准，表明事件级不对称不一定累积为整体不对称。校准错误是独立于信任程度的重要诊断指标，信任与绩效可能脱钩。

Abstract: This paper presents an empirically grounded agent-based model capturing trust dynamics, workload distribution, and collaborative performance in human-robot teams. The model, implemented in NetLogo 6.4.0, simulates teams of 2--10 agents performing tasks of varying complexity. We validate against Hancock et al.'s (2021) meta-analysis, achieving interval validity for 4 of 8 trust antecedent categories and strong ordinal validity (Spearman \r{ho}=0.833ρ= 0.833 \r{ho}=0.833). Sensitivity analysis using OFAT and full factorial designs (n=50n = 50 n=50 replications per condition) reveals robot reliability exhibits the strongest effect on trust (η2=0.35η^2 = 0.35 η2=0.35) and dominates task success (η2=0.93η^2 = 0.93 η2=0.93) and productivity (η2=0.89η^2 = 0.89 η2=0.89), consistent with meta-analytic findings. Trust asymmetry ratios ranged from 0.07 to 0.55 -- below the meta-analytic benchmark of 1.50 -- revealing that per-event asymmetry does not guarantee cumulative asymmetry when trust repair mechanisms remain active. Scenario analysis uncovered trust-performance decoupling: the Trust Recovery scenario achieved the highest productivity (4.29) despite the lowest trust (38.2), while the Unreliable Robot scenario produced the highest trust (73.2) despite the lowest task success (33.4\%), establishing calibration error as a critical diagnostic distinct from trust magnitude. Factorial ANOVA confirmed significant main effects for reliability, transparency, communication, and collaboration (p<.001p < .001 p<.001), explaining 45.4\% of trust variance. The open-source implementation provides an evidence-based tool for identifying overtrust and undertrust conditions prior to deployment.

</details>


### [361] [RMBench: Memory-Dependent Robotic Manipulation Benchmark with Insights into Policy Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01229)
*Tianxing Chen,Yuran Wang,Mingleyang Li,Yan Qin,Hao Shi,Zixuan Li,Yifan Hu,Yingsheng Zhang,Kaixuan Wang,Yue Chen,Hongcheng Wang,Renjing Xu,Ruihai Wu,Yao Mu,Yaodong Yang,Hao Dong,Ping Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了RMBench基准测试和Mem-0策略，用于系统评估机器人操作策略的记忆能力，填补了记忆依赖操作任务评估的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人操作策略大多忽视记忆能力，难以处理需要历史观察推理和长期信息保持的真实世界任务，且缺乏系统性的记忆能力评估方法。

Method: 1. 提出RMBench基准测试，包含9个不同记忆复杂度的操作任务；2. 设计Mem-0模块化操作策略，具有显式记忆组件，支持可控消融研究。

Result: 通过大量仿真和真实世界实验，识别出现有策略的记忆相关局限性，并提供了架构设计选择如何影响记忆性能的实证见解。

Conclusion: RMBench基准和Mem-0策略为系统评估机器人操作策略的记忆能力提供了有效工具，有助于理解架构设计对记忆性能的影响。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation policies have made rapid progress in recent years, yet most existing approaches give limited consideration to memory capabilities. Consequently, they struggle to solve tasks that require reasoning over historical observations and maintaining task-relevant information over time, which are common requirements in real-world manipulation scenarios. Although several memory-aware policies have been proposed, systematic evaluation of memory-dependent manipulation remains underexplored, and the relationship between architectural design choices and memory performance is still not well understood. To address this gap, we introduce RMBench, a simulation benchmark comprising 9 manipulation tasks that span multiple levels of memory complexity, enabling systematic evaluation of policy memory capabilities. We further propose Mem-0, a modular manipulation policy with explicit memory components designed to support controlled ablation studies. Through extensive simulation and real-world experiments, we identify memory-related limitations in existing policies and provide empirical insights into how architectural design choices influence memory performance. The website is available at https://rmbench.github.io/.

</details>


### [362] [Certifiable Estimation with Factor Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01267)
*Zhexin Xu,Nikolas R. Sanderson,Hanna Jiamei Zhang,David M. Rosen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种统一框架，将因子图建模与可认证优化相结合，通过结构保持变换使可认证估计能直接利用成熟的因子图库，简化部署流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因子图推理使用局部优化方法，可能收敛到次优解，这在安全关键应用中存在可靠性问题。而基于凸松弛的可认证估计器虽然能获得全局最优解，但其大规模松弛求解需要专业结构利用求解器，实现复杂，阻碍了实际部署。

Method: 论文提出将因子图建模与可认证优化相结合的统一框架。关键发现是因子图结构在Shor松弛和Burer-Monteiro分解下保持不变：将这些变换应用于具有因子图表示的QCQP，会产生一个具有相同连接性的提升问题，其中变量和因子是原始QCQP中相应元素的简单代数变换。

Result: 这种结构保持特性使得Riemannian Staircase方法能够直接使用现有成熟的高性能因子图库和工作流实现，使可认证估计的设计和部署变得像传统因子图推理一样简单。

Conclusion: 论文成功地将因子图建模和可认证优化这两个原本独立的范式统一起来，为机器人状态估计提供了既模块化又具有可认证全局最优性的解决方案，大大降低了可认证估计在实际应用中的部署门槛。

Abstract: Factor graphs provide a convenient modular modeling language that enables practitioners to design and deploy high-performance robotic state estimation systems by composing simple, reusable building blocks. However, inference in these models is typically performed using local optimization methods that can converge to suboptimal solutions, a serious reliability concern in safety-critical applications. Conversely, certifiable estimators based on convex relaxation can recover verifiably globally optimal solutions in many practical settings, but the computational cost of solving their large-scale relaxations necessitates specialized, structure-exploiting solvers that require substantial expertise to implement, significantly hampering practical deployment.
  In this paper, we show that these two paradigms, which have thus far been treated as independent in the literature, can be naturally synthesized into a unified framework for certifiable factor graph optimization. The key insight is that factor graph structure is preserved under Shor's relaxation and Burer-Monteiro factorization: applying these transformations to a QCQP with an associated factor graph representation yields a lifted problem admitting a factor graph model with identical connectivity, in which variables and factors are simple one-to-one algebraic transformations of those in the original QCQP. This structural preservation enables the Riemannian Staircase methodology for certifiable estimation to be implemented using the same mature, highly-performant factor graph libraries and workflows already ubiquitously employed throughout robotics and computer vision, making certifiable estimation as straightforward to design and deploy as conventional factor graph inference.

</details>


### [363] [Spherical Latent Motion Prior for Physics-Based Simulated Humanoid Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01294)
*Jing Tan,Weisheng Xu,Xiangrui Jiang,Jiaxi Zhang,Kun Yang,Kai Wu,Jiaqi Xiong,Shiting Chen,Yangfan Li,Yixiao Feng,Yuetong Fang,Yujia Zou,Yiqun Song,Renjing Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SLMP是一种两阶段运动先验学习方法，通过高质量运动跟踪控制器和球形潜在空间蒸馏，解决了VAE信息损失和AMP模式崩溃问题，在物理人形控制中实现了稳定随机采样和多样化运动技能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有运动先验学习方法（VAE和AMP）存在信息损失、随机采样可能产生无效行为、模式崩溃以及难以捕捉多样化运动技能等问题。需要一种能够稳定随机采样且不损失信息的运动先验学习方法。

Method: 提出球形潜在运动先验（SLMP）两阶段方法：1）训练高质量运动跟踪控制器；2）将跟踪控制器蒸馏到球形潜在空间。通过蒸馏、判别器和判别器引导的局部语义一致性约束，构建结构化潜在动作空间。

Result: SLMP在收集的两小时人类战斗动作捕捉数据集上，保留了精细运动细节且无信息损失，随机采样产生语义有效且稳定的行为。在双智能体物理战斗任务中，仅使用简单基于规则的奖励就产生了类人且物理合理的战斗行为。此外，SLMP能够泛化到不同人形机器人形态。

Conclusion: SLMP通过两阶段方法和结构化潜在空间设计，有效解决了现有运动先验方法的局限性，实现了稳定随机采样、多样化运动技能捕捉和跨形态泛化能力，为物理人形控制提供了更优的运动先验学习框架。

Abstract: Learning motion priors for physics-based humanoid control is an active research topic. Existing approaches mainly include variational autoencoders (VAE) and adversarial motion priors (AMP). VAE introduces information loss, and random latent sampling may sometimes produce invalid behaviors. AMP suffers from mode collapse and struggles to capture diverse motion skills. We present the Spherical Latent Motion Prior (SLMP), a two-stage method for learning motion priors. In the first stage, we train a high-quality motion tracking controller. In the second stage, we distill the tracking controller into a spherical latent space. A combination of distillation, a discriminator, and a discriminator-guided local semantic consistency constraint shapes a structured latent action space, allowing stable random sampling without information loss. To evaluate SLMP, we collect a two-hour human combat motion capture dataset and show that SLMP preserves fine motion detail without information loss, and random sampling yields semantically valid and stable behaviors. When applied to a two-agent physics-based combat task, SLMP produces human-like and physically plausible combat behaviors only using simple rule-based rewards. Furthermore, SLMP generalizes across different humanoid robot morphologies, demonstrating its transferability beyond a single simulated avatar.

</details>


### [364] [Hybrid TD3: Overestimation Bias Analysis and Stable Policy Optimization for Hybrid Action Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01302)
*Thanh-Tuan Tran,Thanh Nguyen Canh,Nak Young Chong,Xiem HoangVan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Hybrid TD3方法，扩展TD3算法以原生处理参数化混合动作空间，通过理论分析过估计偏差并引入加权裁剪Q学习目标，在机器人操作任务中实现更好的训练稳定性和性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人操作中强化学习面临离散-连续混合动作空间的挑战，现有方法（离散化连续组件或连续化离散选择）在高维动作空间和领域随机化下存在可扩展性限制和训练不稳定性问题

Method: 提出Hybrid TD3方法，扩展TD3算法以原生处理参数化混合动作空间；进行混合动作设置下过估计偏差的严格理论分析；引入加权裁剪Q学习目标，通过对离散动作分布进行边缘化，在保持偏差减少的同时改善策略平滑性

Result: Hybrid TD3在机器人操作任务中实现了优越的训练稳定性和与最先进混合动作基线方法竞争的性能

Conclusion: Hybrid TD3为处理离散-连续混合动作空间提供了一种原则性方法，通过理论分析和算法改进解决了现有方法的局限性，在机器人操作任务中表现出色

Abstract: Reinforcement learning in discrete-continuous hybrid action spaces presents fundamental challenges for robotic manipulation, where high-level task decisions and low-level joint-space execution must be jointly optimized. Existing approaches either discretize continuous components or relax discrete choices into continuous approximations, which suffer from scalability limitations and training instability in high-dimensional action spaces and under domain randomization. In this paper, we propose Hybrid TD3, an extension of Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) that natively handles parameterized hybrid action spaces in a principled manner. We conduct a rigorous theoretical analysis of overestimation bias in hybrid action settings, deriving formal bounds under twin-critic architectures and establishing a complete bias ordering across five algorithmic variants. Building on this analysis, we introduce a weighted clipped Q-learning target that marginalizes over the discrete action distribution, achieving equivalent bias reduction to standard clipped minimization while improving policy smoothness. Experimental results demonstrate that Hybrid TD3 achieves superior training stability and competitive performance against state-of-the-art hybrid action baselines

</details>


### [365] [D-GVIO: A Buffer-Driven and Efficient Decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial State Estimator for Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01404)
*Yarong Luo,Wentao Lu,Chi Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: D-GVIO 是一个完全去中心化的GNSS-视觉-惯性里程计框架，通过缓冲策略实现高效鲁棒的分布式状态估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决群体应用中协同定位面临的实时性、鲁棒性和计算效率挑战，特别是在资源受限平台上

Method: 1) 协方差分割、协方差交叉和缓冲策略模块化分布式状态估计；2) 采用左不变扩展卡尔曼滤波；3) 基于缓冲的重传播策略处理延迟测量；4) 自适应缓冲驱动异常值检测方法剔除GNSS异常值

Result: 显著降低了计算和通信负担，提高了状态估计性能，能高效准确处理延迟测量，增强了GNSS挑战环境下的鲁棒性

Conclusion: D-GVIO框架为资源受限平台上的群体应用提供了一种高效、鲁棒且完全去中心化的协同定位解决方案

Abstract: Cooperative localization is essential for swarm applications like collaborative exploration and search-and-rescue missions. However, maintaining real-time capability, robustness, and computational efficiency on resource-constrained platforms presents significant challenges. To address these challenges, we propose D-GVIO, a buffer-driven and fully decentralized GNSS-Visual-Inertial Odometry (GVIO) framework that leverages a novel buffering strategy to support efficient and robust distributed state estimation. The proposed framework is characterized by four core mechanisms. Firstly, through covariance segmentation, covariance intersection and buffering strategy, we modularize propagation and update steps in distributed state estimation, significantly reducing computational and communication burdens. Secondly, the left-invariant extended Kalman filter (L-IEKF) is adopted for information fusion, which exhibits superior state estimation performance over the traditional extended Kalman filter (EKF) since its state transition matrix is independent of the system state. Thirdly, a buffer-based re-propagation strategy is employed to handle delayed measurements efficiently and accurately by leveraging the L-IEKF, eliminating the need for costly re-computation. Finally, an adaptive buffer-driven outlier detection method is proposed to dynamically cull GNSS outliers, enhancing robustness in GNSS-challenged environments.

</details>


### [366] [Jailbreaking Embodied LLMs via Action-level Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01414)
*Xinyu Huang,Qiang Yang,Leming Shen,Zijing Ma,Yuanqing Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Blindfold是一个针对具身大语言模型的自动化攻击框架，利用具身LLM在现实世界动作场景中因果推理能力有限的弱点，通过对抗性代理规划策略执行看似语义安全但实际会导致物理伤害的攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身LLM将AI代理与物理世界连接，但除了语言层面的风险外，它们引入了新的漏洞：语义上看似良性的指令仍可能导致危险的现实后果，揭示了语言安全与物理结果之间的根本性错位。需要研究这种新型攻击模式。

Method: Blindfold采用对抗性代理规划策略：通过攻陷本地代理LLM来执行动作层面的操纵；注入精心设计的噪声来隐藏恶意动作以规避检测；结合基于规则的验证器来提高攻击可执行性。

Result: 在具身AI模拟器和真实6自由度机械臂上的评估显示，Blindfold比现有最先进基线攻击成功率高出53%，突显了其攻击有效性。

Conclusion: 需要超越表面语言审查，转向后果感知的防御机制来保护具身LLM，因为语义安全与物理安全之间存在根本性错位，Blindfold攻击框架的成功揭示了这一紧迫需求。

Abstract: Embodied Large Language Models (LLMs) enable AI agents to interact with the physical world through natural language instructions and actions. However, beyond the language-level risks inherent to LLMs themselves, embodied LLMs with real-world actuation introduce a new vulnerability: instructions that appear semantically benign may still lead to dangerous real-world consequences, revealing a fundamental misalignment between linguistic security and physical outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Blindfold, an automated attack framework that leverages the limited causal reasoning capabilities of embodied LLMs in real-world action contexts. Rather than iterative trial-and-error jailbreaking of black-box embodied LLMs, Blindfold adopts an Adversarial Proxy Planning strategy: it compromises a local surrogate LLM to perform action-level manipulations that appear semantically safe but could result in harmful physical effects when executed. Blindfold further conceals key malicious actions by injecting carefully crafted noise to evade detection by defense mechanisms, and it incorporates a rule-based verifier to improve the attack executability. Evaluations on both embodied AI simulators and a real-world 6DoF robotic arm show that Blindfold achieves up to 53% higher attack success rates than SOTA baselines, highlighting the urgent need to move beyond surface-level language censorship and toward consequence-aware defense mechanisms to secure embodied LLMs.

</details>


### [367] [PhysGraph: Physically-Grounded Graph-Transformer Policies for Bimanual Dexterous Hand-Tool-Object Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01436)
*Runfa Blark Li,David Kim,Xinshuang Liu,Keito Suzuki,Dwait Bhatt,Nikola Raicevic,Xin Lin,Ki Myung Brian Lee,Nikolay Atanasov,Truong Nguyen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PhysGraph：基于物理图变换器的双手灵巧操作策略，通过图表示和物理先验提升工具操作性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将整个系统状态表示为单一配置向量，忽略了灵巧手丰富的结构和拓扑信息，导致双手工具操作面临高维状态空间和复杂接触动力学的挑战

Method: 将双手系统表示为运动学图，引入每连杆标记化保留细粒度局部状态信息，提出物理基础偏置生成器，将空间距离、接触状态、几何邻近性和解剖属性等结构先验直接注入注意力机制

Result: PhysGraph在操作精度和任务成功率上显著优于基线ManipTrans，同时仅使用其51%的参数，且能零样本迁移到未见过的工具/物体几何形状，支持三种机械手训练

Conclusion: 通过图表示和物理先验的显式结合，PhysGraph能够更好地推理物理交互，为双手灵巧操作提供了更有效和通用的解决方案

Abstract: Bimanual dexterous manipulation for tool use remains a formidable challenge in robotics due to the high-dimensional state space and complicated contact dynamics. Existing methods naively represent the entire system state as a single configuration vector, disregarding the rich structural and topological information inherent to articulated hands. We present PhysGraph, a physically-grounded graph transformer policy designed explicitly for challenging bimanual hand-tool-object manipulation. Unlike prior works, we represent the bimanual system as a kinematic graph and introduce per-link tokenization to preserve fine-grained local state information. We propose a physically-grounded bias generator that injects structural priors directly into the attention mechanism, including kinematic spatial distance, dynamic contact states, geometric proximity, and anatomical properties. This allows the policy to explicitly reason about physical interactions rather than learning them implicitly from sparse rewards. Extensive experiments show that PhysGraph significantly outperforms baseline - ManipTrans in manipulation precision and task success rates while using only 51% of the parameters of ManipTrans. Furthermore, the inherent topological flexibility of our architecture shows qualitative zero-shot transfer to unseen tool/object geometries, and is sufficiently general to be trained on three robotic hands (Shadow, Allegro, Inspire).

</details>


### [368] [Non-Markovian Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation via Keyframe Chaining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01465)
*Yipeng Chen,Wentao Tan,Lei Zhu,Fengling Li,Jingjing Li,Guoli Yang,Heng Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Keyframe-Chaining VLA框架，通过提取和链接关键历史帧来建模长时程依赖，解决现有VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务中的泛化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型过度依赖即时观测，难以泛化到长时程任务。虽然近期研究引入检索机制或扩展上下文窗口来处理程序性任务，但仍难以捕捉非马尔可夫依赖（最优动作仅依赖于特定历史状态而非当前观测）。

Method: 1. 自动关键帧选择器：学习判别性嵌入空间，有效识别不同的状态转换
2. 进度感知查询机制：基于时间相关性动态检索与当前执行阶段相关的历史帧
3. 关键帧作为交错视觉标记集成到VLA中，将策略显式地锚定在长时程时间上下文中

Result: 在基于ManiSkill模拟器构建的四个非马尔可夫操作任务上，该方法表现出优越性能，有效解决了具有长时程时间依赖的机器人操作任务。

Conclusion: Keyframe-Chaining VLA框架通过提取和链接关键历史帧，能够有效建模长时程依赖，显著提升VLA模型在非马尔可夫任务中的表现。

Abstract: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often struggle to generalize to long-horizon tasks due to their heavy reliance on immediate observations. While recent studies incorporate retrieval mechanisms or extend context windows to handle procedural tasks, they often struggle to capture Non-Markovian dependencies, where optimal actions rely solely on specific past states rather than the current observation. To address this, we introduce Keyframe-Chaining VLA, a framework that extracts and links key historical frames to model long-horizon dependencies. Specifically, we propose an automatic keyframe selector that learns a discriminative embedding space, effectively identifying distinct state transitions. To capture task-critical information, we design a progress-aware query mechanism that dynamically retrieves historical frames based on their temporal relevance to the current execution phase. These selected keyframes are integrated into the VLA as interleaved visual tokens, explicitly grounding the policy in the long-horizon temporal context. Finally, we introduce a suite of four Non-Markovian manipulation tasks built upon the ManiSkill simulator to measure task success rates. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance, effectively tackling robot manipulation tasks characterized by long-horizon temporal dependencies. Code is available at https://github.com/cytoplastm/KC-VLA.

</details>


### [369] [Mean-Flow based One-Step Vision-Language-Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01469)
*Yang Chen,Xiaoguang Ma,Bin Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于Mean-Flow的单步VLA方法，解决FlowMatching VLA框架生成延迟高的问题，实现高效的单步动作生成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有FlowMatching VLA框架在灵巧机器人操作任务中表现出色，但存在生成延迟高的问题，这源于固有的迭代采样要求和架构限制，限制了实际应用

Method: 提出基于Mean-Flow的单步VLA方法，解决动作生成过程中的噪声问题，消除传统Flow-Matching方法的一致性约束，实现高效的单步动作生成

Result: 真实机器人实验表明，提出的Mean-Flow单步VLA生成速度比SmolVLA快8.7倍，比Diffusion Policy快83.9倍

Conclusion: 该方法在生成效率上具有显著优势，有潜力成为VLA机器人操作任务的高效骨干网络

Abstract: Recent advances in FlowMatching-based Vision-Language-Action (VLA) frameworks have demonstrated remarkable advantages in generating high-frequency action chunks, particularly for highly dexterous robotic manipulation tasks. Despite these notable achievements, their practical applications are constrained by prolonged generation latency, which stems from inherent iterative sampling requirements and architectural limitations. To address this critical bottleneck, we propose a Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA approach. Specifically, we resolve the noise-induced issues in the action generation process, thereby eliminating the consistency constraints inherent to conventional Flow-Matching methods. This significantly enhances generation efficiency and enables one-step action generation. Real-world robotic experiments show that the generation speed of the proposed Mean-Flow based One-Step VLA is 8.7 times and 83.9 times faster than that of SmolVLA and Diffusion Policy, respectively. These results elucidate its great potential as a high-efficiency backbone for VLA-based robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [370] [ROSER: Few-Shot Robotic Sequence Retrieval for Scalable Robot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01474)
*Zillur Rahman,Eddison Pham,Alejandro Daniel Noel,Cristian Meo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ROSER是一个轻量级少样本检索框架，能够从未标记的机器人交互日志中提取可重用的任务中心片段，仅需3-5个演示示例，无需任务特定训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习面临的关键瓶颈是缺乏任务标记、分段的训练数据，尽管存在大量作为长连续交互日志记录的大规模机器人数据集。现有数据集包含大量多样化行为，但在结构上与需要干净分段、任务特定轨迹的现代学习框架不兼容。

Method: 提出ROSER框架，将机器人序列检索形式化：使用少量参考示例从未标记日志中提取可重用、任务中心片段。该方法学习时间窗口上的任务无关度量空间，实现准确检索。

Result: 在三个大规模数据集（LIBERO、DROID、nuScenes）上评估，ROSER在准确性和效率上均优于所有先前方法（经典对齐方法、学习嵌入、语言模型基线），实现每匹配亚毫秒级推理，同时保持优越的分布对齐。

Conclusion: 通过将数据整理重构为少样本检索问题，ROSER为解锁未充分利用的机器人数据集提供了实用途径，从根本上改善了机器人学习的数据可用性。

Abstract: A critical bottleneck in robot learning is the scarcity of task-labeled, segmented training data, despite the abundance of large-scale robotic datasets recorded as long, continuous interaction logs. Existing datasets contain vast amounts of diverse behaviors, yet remain structurally incompatible with modern learning frameworks that require cleanly segmented, task-specific trajectories. We address this data utilization crisis by formalizing robotic sequence retrieval: the task of extracting reusable, task-centric segments from unlabeled logs using only a few reference examples. We introduce ROSER, a lightweight few-shot retrieval framework that learns task-agnostic metric spaces over temporal windows, enabling accurate retrieval with as few as 3-5 demonstrations, without any task-specific training required. To validate our approach, we establish comprehensive evaluation protocols and benchmark ROSER against classical alignment methods, learned embeddings, and language model baselines across three large-scale datasets (e.g., LIBERO, DROID, and nuScenes). Our experiments demonstrate that ROSER consistently outperforms all prior methods in both accuracy and efficiency, achieving sub-millisecond per-match inference while maintaining superior distributional alignment. By reframing data curation as few-shot retrieval, ROSER provides a practical pathway to unlock underutilized robotic datasets, fundamentally improving data availability for robot learning.

</details>


### [371] [SFCo-Nav: Efficient Zero-Shot Visual Language Navigation via Collaboration of Slow LLM and Fast Attributed Graph Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01477)
*Chaoran Xiong,Litao Wei,Xinhao Hu,Kehui Ma,Ziyi Xia,Zixin Jiang,Zhen Sun,Ling Pei*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SFCo-Nav：基于慢-快认知协作的高效零样本视觉语言导航框架，通过异步触发LLM减少计算开销，实现实时部署


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本VLN方法构建简单观察图并进行逐步VLM-LLM推理，导致高延迟和高计算成本，限制了实时部署

Method: 采用慢-快认知协作原则：1) 慢LLM规划器生成战略性子目标链和想象对象图；2) 快速反应导航器实时构建对象图并执行子目标；3) 轻量级异步慢快桥对齐想象图与感知图以估计导航置信度，仅在必要时触发慢LLM

Result: 在R2R和REVERIE基准测试中，SFCo-Nav达到或超过先前最先进的零样本VLN成功率，同时将每条轨迹的总token消耗减少50%以上，运行速度快3.5倍以上，并在酒店套房的腿式机器人上展示了实际应用

Conclusion: SFCo-Nav是首个基于慢快协作的零样本VLN系统，通过异步LLM触发机制显著提高了效率，为室内环境中的实时视觉语言导航提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Recent advances in large vision-language models (VLMs) and large language models (LLMs) have enabled zero-shot approaches to visual language navigation (VLN), where an agent follows natural language instructions using only ego perception and reasoning. However, existing zero-shot methods typically construct a naive observation graph and perform per-step VLM-LLM inference on it, resulting in high latency and computation costs that limit real-time deployment. To address this, we present SFCo-Nav, an efficient zero-shot VLN framework inspired by the principle of slow-fast cognitive collaboration. SFCo-Nav integrates three key modules: 1) a slow LLM-based planner that produces a strategic chain of subgoals, each linked to an imagined object graph; 2) a fast reactive navigator for real-time object graph construction and subgoal execution; and 3) a lightweight asynchronous slow-fast bridge aligns advanced structured, attributed imagined and perceived graphs to estimate navigation confidence, triggering the slow LLM planner only when necessary. To the best of our knowledge, SFCo-Nav is the first slow-fast collaboration zero-shot VLN system supporting asynchronous LLM triggering according to the internal confidence. Evaluated on the public R2R and REVERIE benchmarks, SFCo-Nav matches or exceeds prior state-of-the-art zero-shot VLN success rates while cutting total token consumption per trajectory by over 50% and running more than 3.5 times faster. Finally, we demonstrate SFCo-Nav on a legged robot in a hotel suite, showcasing its efficiency and practicality in indoor environments.

</details>


### [372] [Multimodal Adversarial Quality Policy for Safe Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01479)
*Kunlin Xie Chenghao Li Haolan Zhang,Nak Young Chong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MAQP框架实现多模态安全抓取，通过双模态补丁优化和梯度平衡策略解决RGBD模态对抗攻击的分布差异和优化不平衡问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于DNN的视觉引导机器人抓取在HRI中虽泛化性好但存在安全风险，现有RGB模态对抗攻击方法在RGBD模态上效果有限，需要解决模态间分布差异和优化不平衡问题

Method: 提出多模态对抗质量策略(MAQP)，包含：1)异构双补丁优化方案(HDPOS)，采用模态特定初始化策略（深度用高斯分布，RGB用均匀分布）并在统一目标函数下联合优化；2)梯度级模态平衡策略(GLMBS)，基于通道敏感性分析重新加权梯度贡献并应用距离自适应扰动边界

Result: 在基准数据集和协作机器人上进行了广泛实验，证明了MAQP的有效性

Conclusion: MAQP框架成功解决了RGBD模态对抗攻击中的模态分布差异和优化不平衡问题，实现了有效的多模态安全抓取

Abstract: Vision-guided robot grasping based on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) generalizes well but poses safety risks in the Human-Robot Interaction (HRI). Recent works solved it by designing benign adversarial attacks and patches with RGB modality, yet depth-independent characteristics limit their effectiveness on RGBD modality. In this work, we propose the Multimodal Adversarial Quality Policy (MAQP) to realize multimodal safe grasping. Our framework introduces two key components. First, the Heterogeneous Dual-Patch Optimization Scheme (HDPOS) mitigates the distribution discrepancy between RGB and depth modalities in patch generation by adopting modality-specific initialization strategies, employing a Gaussian distribution for depth patches and a uniform distribution for RGB patches, while jointly optimizing both modalities under a unified objective function. Second, the Gradient-Level Modality Balancing Strategy (GLMBS) is designed to resolve the optimization imbalance from RGB and Depth patches in patch shape adaptation by reweighting gradient contributions based on per-channel sensitivity analysis and applying distance-adaptive perturbation bounds. We conduct extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets and a cobot, showing the effectiveness of MAQP.

</details>


### [373] [Towards Robot Skill Learning and Adaptation with Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01480)
*A K M Nadimul Haque,Fouad Sukkar,Sheila Sujipto,Cedric Le Gentil,Marc G. Carmichael,Teresa Vidal-Calleja*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于高斯过程的稀疏路点技能适应框架，通过优化、行为克隆和强化学习三种方法实现机器人技能在大范围环境变化下的鲁棒适应


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型技能适应方法表示能力有限，难以应对显著的环境变化；而高斯过程技能模型虽然表达能力强，但其适应方法研究不足。需要一种既能保持运动学特性又能适应大范围配置变化的技能表示和适应框架

Method: 使用高斯过程结合稀疏路点进行紧凑表达，利用轨迹位姿及其一阶、二阶解析导数保持运动学特性。提出三种适应方法：1) 优化代理调整路径路点同时保持演示速度；2) 行为克隆代理学习复制优化代理的输出轨迹；3) 强化学习代理学习修改路点并保持运动学特性，支持在线适应

Result: 在三个任务（抽屉开启、方块推动、杆件操作）的仿真和硬件实验中，所有方法在成功率上均优于基准方法。高斯过程表示使三种方法都能获得高余弦相似度和低速度幅值误差，表明运动学特性得到良好保持

Conclusion: 该框架提供了紧凑的技能表示，能够基于单次演示技能适应大范围的环境变化，为机器人技能适应提供了表达能力强且鲁棒的解决方案

Abstract: General robot skill adaptation requires expressive representations robust to varying task configurations. While recent learning-based skill adaptation methods refined via Reinforcement Learning (RL), have shown success, existing skill models often lack sufficient representational capacity for anything beyond minor environmental changes. In contrast, Gaussian Process (GP)-based skill modelling provides an expressive representation with useful analytical properties; however, adaptation of GP-based skills remains underexplored. This paper proposes a novel, robust skill adaptation framework that utilises GPs with sparse via-points for compact and expressive modelling. The model considers the trajectory's poses and leverages its first and second analytical derivatives to preserve the skill's kinematic profile. We present three adaptation methods to cater for the variability between initial and observed configurations. Firstly, an optimisation agent that adjusts the path's via-points while preserving the demonstration velocity. Second, a behaviour cloning agent trained to replicate output trajectories from the optimisation agent. Lastly, an RL agent that has learnt to modify via-points whilst maintaining the kinematic profile and enabling online capabilities. Evaluated across three tasks (drawer opening, cube-pushing and bar manipulation) in both simulation and hardware, our proposed methods outperform every benchmark in success rates. Furthermore, the results demonstrate that the GP-based representation enables all three methods to attain high cosine similarity and low velocity magnitude errors, indicating strong preservation of the kinematic profile. Overall, our formulation provides a compact representation capable of adapting to large deviations from a single demonstrated skill.

</details>


### [374] [FATE: Closed-Loop Feasibility-Aware Task Generation with Active Repair for Physically Grounded Robotic Curricula](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01505)
*Bingchuan Wei,Bingqi Huang,Jingheng Ma,Zeyu zhang,Sen Cui*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FATE 是一个闭环、自校正的框架，通过将通用具身智能体嵌入生成循环，确保机器人任务课程在物理上的可行性，显著降低执行失败率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的生成式模拟方法虽然能生成多样化的机器人任务课程，但经常产生语言上连贯但物理上不可行的目标，这源于未接地的任务规范或目标表述错位。

Method: FATE 将任务生成重新构想为迭代验证和优化过程，采用顺序审计管道：首先验证静态场景属性（如物体可供性、布局兼容性），然后通过模拟具身交互验证执行可行性。当检测到不可行任务时，部署主动修复模块自动调整场景配置或策略规范。

Result: 实验验证表明，FATE 能生成语义多样、物理接地的任务课程，相对于最先进的生成基线，执行失败率显著降低。

Conclusion: FATE 通过闭环、自校正的框架解决了生成式模拟中物理可行性不足的问题，为机器人任务课程生成提供了更可靠的方法。

Abstract: Recent breakthroughs in generative simulation have harnessed Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate diverse robotic task curricula, yet these open-loop paradigms frequently produce linguistically coherent but physically infeasible goals, stemming from ungrounded task specifications or misaligned objective formulations. To address this critical limitation, we propose FATE (Feasibility-Aware Task gEneration), a closed-loop, self-correcting framework that reimagines task generation as an iterative validation-and-refinement process.
