Unlike conventional methods that decouple generation and verification into discrete stages, FATE embeds a generalist embodied agent directly into the generation loop to proactively guarantee the physical groundedness of the resulting curriculum. FATE instantiates a sequential auditing pipeline: it first validates static scene attributes (e.g., object affordances, layout compatibility) and subsequently verifies execution feasibility via simulated embodied interaction. Critical to its performance, upon detecting an infeasible task, FATE deploys an active repair module that autonomously adapts scene configurations or policy specifications, converting unworkable proposals into physically valid task instances. Extensive experiments validate that FATE generates semantically diverse, physically grounded task curricula while achieving a substantial reduction in execution failure rates relative to state-of-the-art generative baselines.

</details>


### [375] [(hu)Man vs. Machine: In the Future of Motorsport, can Autonomous Vehicles Compete?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01560)
*Armand Amaritei,Amber-Lily Blackadder,Sebastian Donnelly,Lora Hernandez,James Vine,Alexander Rast,Matthias Rolf,Andrew Bradley*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文探讨了人类与自动驾驶车辆在赛车运动中同场竞技的可能性，分析了技术挑战、安全问题和观众吸引力等关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 赛车运动历来是汽车技术创新的试验场，自动驾驶赛车可以推动AV系统性能极限。目前人类赛车和自动驾驶赛车各自独立发展，论文旨在评估两者联合竞赛的可能性，以推动技术进一步发展。

Method: 通过分析当前技术现状和近期比赛结果，探讨混合人类-AI赛车面临的关键问题，包括系统级延迟、有效规划、风险保证等技术挑战，以及观众参与度等非技术因素。

Result: 虽然技术性能已达到可比水平，但在赛车技巧、策略和安全方面仍存在重大挑战。混合竞赛需要克服系统延迟、规划算法、风险控制等技术障碍，同时要考虑观众吸引力的变化。

Conclusion: 论文提出了未来研究议程，旨在推动人类与自动驾驶车辆在赛车运动中实现联合竞赛，保持"不断突破可能"的赛车精神，同时解决技术和非技术层面的挑战。

Abstract: Motorsport has historically driven technological innovation in the automotive industry. Autonomous racing provides a proving ground to push the limits of performance of autonomous vehicle (AV) systems. In principle, AVs could be at least as fast, if not faster, than humans. However, human driven racing provides broader audience appeal thus far, and is more strategically challenging. Both provide opportunities to push each other even further technologically, yet competitions remain separate. This paper evaluates whether the future of motorsport could encompass joint competition between humans and AVs. Analysis of the current state of the art, as well as recent competition outcomes, shows that while technical performance has reached comparable levels, there are substantial challenges in racecraft, strategy and safety that need to be overcome. Outstanding issues involved in mixed human-AI racing, ranging from an initial assessment of critical factors such as system-level latencies, to effective planning and risk guarantees are explored. The crucial non-technical aspect of audience engagement and appeal regarding the changing character of motorsport is addressed. In the wider context of motorsport and AVs, this work outlines a proposed agenda for future research to 'keep pushing the possible', in the true spirit of motorsport.

</details>


### [376] [KERV: Kinematic-Rectified Speculative Decoding for Embodied VLA Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01581)
*Zihao Zheng,Zhihao Mao,Maoliang Li,Jiayu Chen,Xinhao Sun,Zhaobo Zhang,Donggang Cao,Hong Mei,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KERV框架创新性地将token域视觉语言动作模型与运动学域预测结合，通过运动学修正的推测解码实现27%~37%的加速，同时保持几乎无成功率损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言动作模型在token域控制机器人时速度较慢，推测解码虽能加速但存在两个关键问题：1) 依赖计算昂贵的重新推理来处理token错误 2) 接受阈值需要仔细调整。同时现有具身智能研究忽视了机器人运动学的应用。

Method: 提出KERV框架，将token域VLA模型与运动学域预测结合，使用基于运动学的卡尔曼滤波器预测动作并补偿推测解码错误，避免重新推理。同时设计基于运动学的调整策略动态修正接受阈值。

Result: 在多种任务和环境中的实验结果表明，KERV实现了27%~37%的加速，同时几乎无成功率损失。

Conclusion: KERV通过将token域模型与运动学域预测相结合，有效解决了推测解码在VLA模型中的两个关键问题，显著提升了推理速度，为具身智能系统提供了高效的优化框架。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models build a token-domain robot control paradigm, yet suffer from low speed. Speculative Decoding (SD) is an optimization strategy that can boost inference speed. Two key issues emerge when integrating VLA and SD: first, SD relies on re-inference to address token errors, which is computationally expensive; second, to mitigate token errors, the acceptance threshold in SD requires careful adjustment. Existing works fail to address the above two issues effectively. Meanwhile, as the bridge between AI and the physical world, existing embodied intelligence has overlooked the application of robotic kinematics. To address these issues, we innovatively combine token-domain VLA models with kinematic-domain prediction for SD, proposing a kinematic-rectified SD framework named KERV. We employ a kinematics-based Kalman Filter to predict actions and compensate for SD errors, avoiding costly re-inference. Moreover, we design a kinematics-based adjustment strategy to dynamically rectify the acceptance threshold, addressing the difficulty of threshold determination. Experimental results across diverse tasks and environments demonstrate that KERV achieves 27%~37% acceleration with nearly no Success Rate loss.

</details>


### [377] [Learning Thermal-Aware Locomotion Policies for an Electrically-Actuated Quadruped Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01631)
*Letian Qian,Yuhang Wan,Shuhan Wang,Xin Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种热感知控制方法，将电机温度融入强化学习运动策略，通过热约束奖励防止过热，使四足机器人在负载下持续运行时间从7分钟延长至27分钟以上


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电驱动四足机器人虽然地形适应能力强，但电机在高扭矩循环负载下容易积累热量，触发过热保护，限制了长时间任务执行能力

Method: 提出热感知控制方法，将电机温度作为状态输入融入强化学习运动策略，并引入热约束奖励函数来防止温度超标

Result: 在Unitree A1机器人上实验，固定负载3kg时，基线策略约7分钟触发过热保护停止，而所提方法可连续运行27分钟以上无热中断，且保持相当的运动跟踪性能

Conclusion: 该方法显著提升了四足机器人的可持续运行能力，解决了电机过热限制长时间任务的问题

Abstract: Electrically-actuated quadrupedal robots possess high mobility on complex terrains, but their motors tend to accumulate heat under high-torque cyclic loads, potentially triggering overheat protection and limiting long-duration tasks. This work proposes a thermal-aware control method that incorporates motor temperatures into reinforcement learning locomotion policies and introduces thermal-constraint rewards to prevent temperature exceedance. Real-world experiments on the Unitree A1 demonstrate that, under a fixed 3 kg payload, the baseline policy triggers overheat protection and stops within approximately 7 minutes, whereas the proposed method can operate continuously for over 27 minutes without thermal interruptions while maintaining comparable command-tracking performance, thereby enhancing sustainable operational capability.

</details>


### [378] [B$^2$F-Map: Crowd-sourced Mapping with Bayesian B-spline Fusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01673)
*Yiping Xie,Yuxuan Xia,Erik Stenborg,Junsheng Fu,Axel Beauvisage,Gabriel E. Garcia,Tianyu Wu,Gustaf Hendeby*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: B²F-Map：基于众包车辆的单目相机、消费级GNSS和IMU生成高精地图的完整流水线，通过贝叶斯融合处理不确定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有众包建图方法要么依赖先验高精地图，要么忽视地图融合中的不确定性。需要一种仅使用低成本传感器（单目相机、消费级GNSS、IMU）就能生成高精地图的完整解决方案。

Method: 提出完整流水线：1）基于轻量标准地图的云上定位；2）车载建图使用带Gibbs采样的EOT-PMB滤波器；3）云上多车优化和贝叶斯地图融合。使用B样条表示车道线，提出针对不同密度表示的B样条轨迹贝叶斯融合框架。

Result: 在多样化驾驶条件的大规模真实数据集上评估B²F-Map，证明能够生成几何一致的车道级地图。

Conclusion: B²F-Map提供了一种仅使用低成本传感器就能生成高精地图的完整方案，通过贝叶斯融合框架处理不确定性，实现了几何一致的车道级建图。

Abstract: Crowd-sourced mapping offers a scalable alternative to creating maps using traditional survey vehicles. Yet, existing methods either rely on prior high-definition (HD) maps or neglect uncertainties in the map fusion. In this work, we present a complete pipeline for HD map generation using production vehicles equipped only with a monocular camera, consumer-grade GNSS, and IMU. Our approach includes on-cloud localization using lightweight standard-definition maps, on-vehicle mapping via an extended object trajectory (EOT) Poisson multi-Bernoulli (PMB) filter with Gibbs sampling, and on-cloud multi-drive optimization and Bayesian map fusion. We represent the lane lines using B-splines, where each B-spline is parameterized by a sequence of Gaussian distributed control points, and propose a novel Bayesian fusion framework for B-spline trajectories with differing density representation, enabling principled handling of uncertainties. We evaluate our proposed approach, B$^2$F-Map, on large-scale real-world datasets collected across diverse driving conditions and demonstrate that our method is able to produce geometrically consistent lane-level maps.

</details>


### [379] [TacMamba: A Tactile History Compression Adapter Bridging Fast Reflexes and Slow VLA Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01700)
*Zhenan Wang,Yanzhe Wang,Meixuan Ren,Peng Li,Yang Liu,Yifei Nie,Limin Long,Yun Ye,Xiaofeng Wang,Zhen Zhu,Huixu Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TacMamba：一种分层架构，通过Mamba-based压缩器将高频触觉反馈与低频视觉规划对齐，实现实时触觉-视觉融合，在按钮点击检测等视觉模糊任务中达到100%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在视觉模糊的操作任务（如检测按钮点击）中，触觉反馈通常是唯一的地面真值来源。然而，融合触觉数据面临时空不匹配的挑战：触觉感知需要高频处理与长时记忆（系统1），而视觉策略在低频控制下运行（系统2）。现有架构难以弥合这一差距。

Method: 提出TacMamba分层架构，包含三个核心贡献：1）定制高频触觉接口；2）基于Mamba的触觉历史压缩器，以O(1)推理延迟（0.45ms）将连续力历史编码为紧凑状态，无需联合预训练即可与VLA模型即插即用融合；3）触觉引导的双阶段训练策略，利用时间判别进行自监督表示学习，并使用相位均匀采样缓解数据稀疏性。

Result: 在离散计数和隐式状态切换实验中，TacMamba达到100%成功率，显著优于仅视觉的pi_0.5基线，同时严格满足硬实时约束。

Conclusion: TacMamba成功解决了触觉-视觉融合中的时空不匹配问题，通过高效压缩触觉历史实现实时性能，为视觉模糊操作任务提供了可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: In visually ambiguous manipulation such as detecting button click tactile feedback is often the sole source of ground truth. However, fusing tactile data poses a significant challenge due to a spatiotemporal mismatch: tactile perception requires high-frequency processing with long-horizon memory (System 1), whereas visual policies operate at low control frequencies (System 2). Existing architectures struggle to bridge this gap: Transformers are computationally prohibitive for high-frequency loops (>100Hz), while LSTMs suffer from forgetting over extended interaction histories. In this paper, we introduce TacMamba, a hierarchical architecture that aligns high-bandwidth tactile reflexes with low-frequency visual planning. Our approach comprises three core contributions: (1) a custom high-frequency tactile interface designed for flexible integration; (2) a Mamba-based Tactile History Compressor that encodes continuous force history into a compact state with O(1) inference latency (0.45 ms), enabling plug-and-play fusion with VLA models without joint pre-training and (3) a Tactile-Guided Dual-Stage Training strategy that leverages temporal discrimination for self-supervised representation learning and phase-uniform sampling to mitigate data sparsity. Experiments on discrete counting and implicit state switching demonstrate that TacMamba achieves 100% success rates, significantly outperforming the visual-only pi_0.5 baseline, while strictly satisfying hard real-time constraints.

</details>


### [380] [A Safety-Aware Shared Autonomy Framework with BarrierIK Using Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01705)
*Berk Guler,Kay Pompetzki,Yuanzheng Sun,Simon Manschitz,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出在共享自主系统的逆运动学层使用控制屏障函数，确保混合后指令的安全性，同时在杂乱环境中保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在杂乱环境中，线性混合操作者意图和自主辅助的共享自主系统可能产生不安全指令。现有方法通过势能或代价项建模避障，只能作为软约束保证安全，而安全关键控制需要硬性保证。

Method: 在共享自主系统的逆运动学层应用控制屏障函数，针对混合后指令的安全性，同时保持任务性能。通过仿真和VR遥操作研究进行评估。

Result: 在逆运动学层使用CBF减少了违规时间，增加了最小间隙，同时保持了任务性能。用户研究中，参与者报告了更高的感知安全性和信任度，更低的干扰，并普遍偏好带有安全过滤器的共享自主系统。

Conclusion: 在共享自主系统的逆运动学层应用控制屏障函数能有效提供安全硬保证，提高安全性同时保持任务性能，获得用户更好的接受度。

Abstract: Shared autonomy blends operator intent with autonomous assistance. In cluttered environments, linear blending can produce unsafe commands even when each source is individually collision-free. Many existing approaches model obstacle avoidance through potentials or cost terms, which only enforce safety as a soft constraint. In contrast, safety-critical control requires hard guarantees. We investigate the use of control barrier functions (CBFs) at the inverse kinematics (IK) layer of shared autonomy, targeting post-blend safety while preserving task performance. Our approach is evaluated in simulation on representative cluttered environments and in a VR teleoperation study comparing pure teleoperation with shared autonomy. Across conditions, employing CBFs at the IK layer reduces violation time and increases minimum clearance while maintaining task performance. In the user study, participants reported higher perceived safety and trust, lower interference, and an overall preference for shared autonomy with our safety filter. Additional materials available at https://berkguler.github.io/barrierik.

</details>


### [381] [Shape-Interpretable Visual Self-Modeling Enables Geometry-Aware Continuum Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01751)
*Peng Yu,Xin Wang,Ning Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于连续体机器人的形状可解释视觉自建模框架，通过贝塞尔曲线表示将多视角图像编码到紧凑的物理意义形状空间，结合神经ODE学习形状和末端执行器动力学，实现几何感知的混合形状-位置控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续体机器人具有高灵活性和冗余性，适合在复杂环境中安全交互，但其连续变形和非线性动力学给感知、建模和控制带来了根本性挑战。现有的视觉控制方法通常依赖端到端学习，缺乏对机器人几何结构及其与环境交互的显式认知。

Method: 使用贝塞尔曲线表示从多视角平面图像编码机器人形状，将视觉观察转换为紧凑的物理意义形状空间。基于此表示，采用神经常微分方程从数据中自建模形状和末端执行器动力学，无需解析模型或密集身体标记。该框架支持混合形状-位置控制，并利用学习形状空间的显式几何结构实现环境感知行为。

Result: 在电缆驱动连续体机器人上的实验表明，该方法实现了精确的形状-位置调节和跟踪：形状误差在图像分辨率的1.56%以内，末端执行器误差在机器人长度的2%以内。在受限环境中也表现出鲁棒性能。

Conclusion: 通过将视觉形状表示从二维观察提升到可解释的三维自模型，这项工作为基于视觉的端到端控制提供了原则性替代方案，推进了连续体机器人的自主几何感知操作能力。

Abstract: Continuum robots possess high flexibility and redundancy, making them well suited for safe interaction in complex environments, yet their continuous deformation and nonlinear dynamics pose fundamental challenges to perception, modeling, and control. Existing vision-based control approaches often rely on end-to-end learning, achieving shape regulation without explicit awareness of robot geometry or its interaction with the environment. Here, we introduce a shape-interpretable visual self-modeling framework for continuum robots that enables geometry-aware control. Robot shapes are encoded from multi-view planar images using a Bezier-curve representation, transforming visual observations into a compact and physically meaningful shape space that uniquely characterizes the robot's three-dimensional configuration. Based on this representation, neural ordinary differential equations are employed to self-model both shape and end-effector dynamics directly from data, enabling hybrid shape-position control without analytical models or dense body markers. The explicit geometric structure of the learned shape space allows the robot to reason about its body and surroundings, supporting environment-aware behaviors such as obstacle avoidance and self-motion while maintaining end-effector objectives. Experiments on a cable-driven continuum robot demonstrate accurate shape-position regulation and tracking, with shape errors within 1.56% of image resolution and end-effector errors within 2% of robot length, as well as robust performance in constrained environments. By elevating visual shape representations from two-dimensional observations to an interpretable three-dimensional self-model, this work establishes a principled alternative to vision-based end-to-end control and advances autonomous, geometry-aware manipulation for continuum robots.

</details>


### [382] [Neural Implicit Action Fields: From Discrete Waypoints to Continuous Functions for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01766)
*Haoyun Liu,Jianzhuang Zhao,Xinyuan Chang,Tianle Shi,Chuanzhang Meng,Jiayuan Tan,Feng Xiong,Tong Lin,Dongjie Huo,Mu Xu,SongLin Dong,Zhiheng Ma,Yihong Gong,Sheng Zhong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Neural Implicit Action Fields (NIAF)，将动作预测从离散路径点转换为连续动作函数回归，通过MLLM作为层次谱调制器生成无限分辨率轨迹，实现解析可微性，在CALVIN和LIBERO基准上达到SOTA，并在真实世界实现稳定阻抗控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型预测离散路径点的范式与物理运动的连续性本质存在根本性不匹配。离散化带来了刚性采样率、缺乏高阶可微性、引入量化伪影等问题，阻碍了精确、顺从的交互。

Method: 使用MLLM作为可学习运动先验上的层次谱调制器，将动作预测重新定义为连续动作函数回归，合成无限分辨率轨迹作为连续时间流形。该公式实现解析可微性，允许对速度、加速度和加加速度进行显式监督以确保数学一致性和物理合理性。

Result: 在CALVIN和LIBERO基准上实现了最先进的结果。真实世界实验表明NIAF能够实现稳定的阻抗控制，弥合了高级语义理解和低级动态执行之间的差距。

Conclusion: NIAF通过从离散路径点预测转向连续动作函数回归，解决了VLA模型中的根本性不匹配问题，实现了精确、顺从的交互，为视觉-语言-动作模型提供了新的范式。

Abstract: Despite the rapid progress of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, the prevailing paradigm of predicting discrete waypoints remains fundamentally misaligned with the intrinsic continuity of physical motion. This discretization imposes rigid sampling rates, lacks high-order differentiability, and introduces quantization artifacts that hinder precise, compliant interaction. We propose Neural Implicit Action Fields (NIAF), a paradigm shift that reformulates action prediction from discrete waypoints to continuous action function regression. By utilizing an MLLM as a hierarchical spectral modulator over a learnable motion prior, NIAF synthesizes infinite-resolution trajectories as continuous-time manifolds. This formulation enables analytical differentiability, allowing for explicit supervision of velocity, acceleration, and jerk to ensure mathematical consistency and physical plausibility. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on CALVIN and LIBERO benchmarks across diverse backbones. Furthermore, real-world experiments demonstrate that NIAF enables stable impedance control, bridging the gap between high-level semantic understanding and low-level dynamic execution.

</details>


### [383] [SSMG-Nav: Enhancing Lifelong Object Navigation with Semantic Skeleton Memory Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01813)
*Haochen Niu,Lantao Zhang,Xingwu Ji,Rendong Ying,Peilin Liu,Fei Wen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SSMG-Nav：基于语义骨架记忆图的机器人导航框架，通过整合历史观察、多模态目标识别和长时程规划，提高陌生环境中目标导航的成功率和路径效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务机器人导航方法存在三个主要局限：1）未充分利用可重复使用的持久记忆；2）大多限于单模态输入；3）采用短视贪婪策略导致低效的来回移动。需要解决这些限制以实现更高效、更智能的终身导航能力。

Method: 1）构建语义骨架记忆图（SSMG），将历史观察整合为空间对齐的持久记忆，以拓扑关键点（如交叉口、房间中心）为锚点；2）将附近实体聚类为子图，统一实体和空间级语义；3）集成视觉语言模型（VLM）处理多模态目标（图像、物体、文本）；4）为每个子图合成多模态提示，引导VLM推断目标位置信念；5）长时程规划器在目标信念和可通行成本之间权衡，生成最小化期望路径长度的访问序列。

Result: 在具有挑战性的终身基准测试和标准ObjectNav基准测试中，与强基线相比，SSMG-Nav实现了更高的成功率和更好的路径效率，验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: SSMG-Nav框架通过整合持久记忆、多模态理解和长时程规划，显著提高了服务机器人在陌生环境中导航的性能，减少了低效的来回移动，为终身导航提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Navigating to out-of-sight targets from human instructions in unfamiliar environments is a core capability for service robots. Despite substantial progress, most approaches underutilize reusable, persistent memory, constraining performance in lifelong settings. Many are additionally limited to single-modality inputs and employ myopic greedy policies, which often induce inefficient back-and-forth maneuvers (BFMs). To address such limitations, we introduce SSMG-Nav, a framework for object navigation built on a \textit{Semantic Skeleton Memory Graph} (SSMG) that consolidates past observations into a spatially aligned, persistent memory anchored by topological keypoints (e.g., junctions, room centers). SSMG clusters nearby entities into subgraphs, unifying entity- and space-level semantics to yield a compact set of candidate destinations. To support multimodal targets (images, objects, and text), we integrate a vision-language model (VLM). For each subgraph, a multimodal prompt synthesized from memory guides the VLM to infer a target belief over destinations. A long-horizon planner then trades off this belief against traversability costs to produce a visit sequence that minimizes expected path length, thereby reducing backtracking. Extensive experiments on challenging lifelong benchmarks and standard ObjectNav benchmarks demonstrate that, compared to strong baselines, our method achieves higher success rates and greater path efficiency, validating the effectiveness of SSMG-Nav.

</details>


### [384] [Tiny-DroNeRF: Tiny Neural Radiance Fields aboard Federated Learning-enabled Nano-drones](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01850)
*Ilenia Carboni,Elia Cereda,Lorenzo Lamberti,Daniele Malpetti,Francesco Conti,Daniele Palossi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Tiny-DroNeRF：一种基于Instant-NGP的轻量级NeRF模型，专为纳米无人机上的超低功耗MCU设计，通过联邦学习实现多无人机协同训练，大幅降低内存占用并提升重建精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纳米无人机（<30g）因尺寸限制，计算资源严重受限（<100 mW MCU，<100 MB内存），但需要执行密集3D场景重建等复杂视觉任务。传统NeRF方法需要GB级内存和高功耗GPU，无法在纳米无人机上运行。

Method: 1) 基于Instant-NGP开发轻量级NeRF模型Tiny-DroNeRF，针对GAP9超低功耗MCU优化；2) 引入协作式联邦学习方案，将模型训练分布在多架纳米无人机上。

Result: 1) Tiny-DroNeRF内存占用比Instant-NGP减少96%；2) 重建精度仅下降5.7 dB；3) 联邦学习使模型能够利用超出单机内存容量的数据训练，提高了整体重建精度。

Conclusion: 首次在超低功耗MCU上实现NeRF训练，并结合纳米无人机的联邦学习，为资源受限的纳米无人机开启了复杂视觉任务的可能性，特别是在密集3D场景重建方面。

Abstract: Sub-30g nano-sized aerial robots can leverage their agility and form factor to autonomously explore cluttered and narrow environments, like in industrial inspection and search and rescue missions. However, the price for their tiny size is a strong limit in their resources, i.e., sub-100 mW microcontroller units (MCUs) delivering $\sim$100 GOps/s at best, and memory budgets well below 100 MB. Despite these strict constraints, we aim to enable complex vision-based tasks aboard nano-drones, such as dense 3D scene reconstruction: a key robotic task underlying fundamental capabilities like spatial awareness and motion planning. Top-performing 3D reconstruction methods leverage neural radiance fields (NeRF) models, which require GBs of memory and massive computation, usually delivered by high-end GPUs consuming 100s of Watts. Our work introduces Tiny-DroNeRF, a lightweight NeRF model, based on Instant-NGP, and optimized for running on a GAP9 ultra-low-power (ULP) MCU aboard our nano-drones. Then, we further empower our Tiny-DroNeRF by leveraging a collaborative federated learning scheme, which distributes the model training among multiple nano-drones. Our experimental results show a 96% reduction in Tiny-DroNeRF's memory footprint compared to Instant-NGP, with only a 5.7 dB drop in reconstruction accuracy. Finally, our federated learning scheme allows Tiny-DroNeRF to train with an amount of data otherwise impossible to keep in a single drone's memory, increasing the overall reconstruction accuracy. Ultimately, our work combines, for the first time, NeRF training on an ULP MCU with federated learning on nano-drones.

</details>


### [385] [SaferPath: Hierarchical Visual Navigation with Learned Guidance and Safety-Constrained Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01898)
*Lingjie Zhang,Zeyu Jiang,Changhao Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SaferPath是一个分层视觉导航框架，结合学习引导与安全约束优化控制，通过MP-SVES生成安全轨迹，在复杂室内环境中提升导航成功率并减少碰撞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前端到端学习导航方法在未见、杂乱或狭窄环境中泛化性和安全性不足，特别是在密集室内场景中容易发生碰撞，需要更安全的导航解决方案。

Method: 采用分层框架：1) 从现有端到端模型获取学习引导；2) 将视觉观测转换为可通行区域地图；3) 使用MP-SVES进行安全约束优化，精炼轨迹；4) MPC控制器跟踪轨迹执行导航。

Result: 在未见障碍物、密集非结构化空间和狭窄走廊等场景中，SaferPath显著提高成功率并减少碰撞，优于ViNT和NoMaD等基线方法，实现真实挑战环境下的安全导航。

Conclusion: SaferPath通过结合学习引导与安全优化控制，有效解决了端到端导航方法的安全性和泛化性问题，为移动机器人在复杂环境中的安全导航提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Visual navigation is a core capability for mobile robots, yet end-to-end learning-based methods often struggle with generalization and safety in unseen, cluttered, or narrow environments. These limitations are especially pronounced in dense indoor settings, where collisions are likely and end-to-end models frequently fail. To address this, we propose SaferPath, a hierarchical visual navigation framework that leverages learned guidance from existing end-to-end models and refines it through a safety-constrained optimization-control module. SaferPath transforms visual observations into a traversable-area map and refines guidance trajectories using Model Predictive Stein Variational Evolution Strategy (MP-SVES), efficiently generating safe trajectories in only a few iterations. The refined trajectories are tracked by an MPC controller, ensuring robust navigation in complex environments. Extensive experiments in scenarios with unseen obstacles, dense unstructured spaces, and narrow corridors demonstrate that SaferPath consistently improves success rates and reduces collisions, outperforming representative baselines such as ViNT and NoMaD, and enabling safe navigation in challenging real-world settings.

</details>


### [386] [Closed-Loop Action Chunks with Dynamic Corrections for Training-Free Diffusion Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01953)
*Pengyuan Wu,Pingrui Zhang,Zhigang Wang,Dong Wang,Bin Zhao,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DCDP提出了一种动态闭环扩散策略框架，通过集成块状动作生成与实时校正，提升机器人操作在动态场景中的适应性和响应速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散的策略在机器人操作中表现出色，但在动态场景中适应缓慢，导致响应延迟或任务失败。需要一种能够实时适应环境变化的策略框架。

Method: DCDP框架包括：1）自监督动态特征编码器；2）交叉注意力融合机制；3）非对称动作编码器-解码器。这些组件在动作执行前注入环境动态信息，实现实时闭环动作校正。

Result: 在动态PushT仿真中，DCDP将适应性提高了19%且无需重新训练，仅增加5%的计算开销。模块化设计支持即插即用集成，在真实世界操作任务中实现了时间一致性和实时响应性。

Conclusion: DCDP通过动态闭环校正机制有效解决了扩散策略在动态场景中的适应性问题，实现了高适应性和低计算开销的平衡，为动态机器人操作提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion-based policies have achieved remarkable results in robotic manipulation but often struggle to adapt rapidly in dynamic scenarios, leading to delayed responses or task failures. We present DCDP, a Dynamic Closed-Loop Diffusion Policy framework that integrates chunk-based action generation with real-time correction. DCDP integrates a self-supervised dynamic feature encoder, cross-attention fusion, and an asymmetric action encoder-decoder to inject environmental dynamics before action execution, achieving real-time closed-loop action correction and enhancing the system's adaptability in dynamic scenarios. In dynamic PushT simulations, DCDP improves adaptability by 19\% without retraining while requiring only 5\% additional computation. Its modular design enables plug-and-play integration, achieving both temporal coherence and real-time responsiveness in dynamic robotic scenarios, including real-world manipulation tasks. The project page is at: https://github.com/wupengyuan/dcdp

</details>


### [387] [From Transportation to Manipulation: Transforming Magnetic Levitation to Magnetic Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01982)
*Lara Bergmann,Noah Greis,Klaus Neumann*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种低成本六自由度并联运动平台MagBot，将两个磁悬浮移动器耦合为复合机器人平台，实现了运输与操作的统一，扩展了工作空间、负载能力和功能灵活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 磁悬浮系统在工业自动化中主要应用于运输，但其操作潜力尚未充分开发。现有磁悬浮系统缺乏多自由度操作能力，限制了其在制造中的综合应用。

Method: 设计6D-Platform MagBot，将两个磁悬浮移动器耦合形成六自由度并联运动平台，实现亚毫米定位精度，并通过对接站支持自主拾取和放置功能。

Result: 实验表明该平台达到亚毫米定位精度，支持快速可重复配置，相比单个移动器显著扩展了可达工作空间、负载能力和功能灵活性。

Conclusion: 通过统一运输和操作功能，该工作将磁悬浮技术推向磁悬浮机器人领域，为实现更敏捷、高效和适应性强的制造解决方案提供了可能。

Abstract: Magnetic Levitation (MagLev) systems fundamentally increase the flexibility of in-machine material flow in industrial automation. Therefore, these systems enable dynamic throughput optimization, which is especially beneficial for high-mix low-volume manufacturing. Until now, MagLev installations have been used primarily for in-machine transport, while their potential for manipulation is largely unexplored. This paper introduces the 6D-Platform MagBot, a low-cost six degrees of freedom parallel kinematic that couples two movers into a composite robotic platform. Experiments show that the 6D-Platform MagBot achieves sub-millimeter positioning accuracy and supports fully autonomous pick up and drop off via a docking station, allowing rapid and repeatable reconfiguration of the machine. Relative to a single mover, the proposed platform substantially expands the reachable workspace, payload, and functional dexterity. By unifying transportation and manipulation, this work advances Magnetic Levitation towards Magnetic Robotics, enabling manufacturing solutions that are more agile, efficient, and adaptable.

</details>


### [388] [Learning Vision-Based Omnidirectional Navigation: A Teacher-Student Approach Using Monocular Depth Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.01999)
*Jan Finke,Wayne Paul Martis,Adrian Schmelter,Lars Erbach,Christian Jestel,Marvin Wiedemann*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的移动机器人导航框架，通过教师-学生架构将使用特权2D LiDAR的教师策略知识蒸馏到仅依赖单目深度图的学生策略中，实现了比传统2D LiDAR更好的3D障碍物避障性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业环境中可靠的障碍物避障需要3D场景理解，但广泛使用的2D LiDAR传感器只能感知环境的单个水平切片，会错过扫描平面上方或下方的关键障碍物。需要一种不依赖LiDAR、仅使用视觉的导航方案来解决3D几何复杂障碍物的避障问题。

Method: 采用教师-学生框架：1) 教师策略使用PPO在NVIDIA Isaac Lab中训练，利用特权2D LiDAR观测（考虑完整机器人足迹）学习鲁棒导航；2) 将学习到的行为蒸馏到学生策略，该策略仅依赖四个RGB相机通过微调的Depth Anything V2模型预测的单目深度图；3) 整个推理管道（包括单目深度估计、策略执行和电机控制）完全在NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX上运行。

Result: 在仿真中，学生策略达到82-96.5%的成功率，始终优于标准的2D LiDAR教师策略（50-89%）。在真实世界实验中，基于MDE的学生策略在导航具有复杂3D几何形状的障碍物（如悬垂结构和低矮物体）时优于2D LiDAR教师策略，这些障碍物超出了2D LiDAR的单一扫描平面。

Conclusion: 该研究证明了仅使用视觉的导航系统能够超越传统2D LiDAR方法，特别是在处理3D几何复杂障碍物时。通过知识蒸馏和高效的边缘计算部署，实现了无需外部计算的实时推理，为工业环境中更可靠的障碍物避障提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable obstacle avoidance in industrial settings demands 3D scene understanding, but widely used 2D LiDAR sensors perceive only a single horizontal slice of the environment, missing critical obstacles above or below the scan plane. We present a teacher-student framework for vision-based mobile robot navigation that eliminates the need for LiDAR sensors. A teacher policy trained via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in NVIDIA Isaac Lab leverages privileged 2D LiDAR observations that account for the full robot footprint to learn robust navigation. The learned behavior is distilled into a student policy that relies solely on monocular depth maps predicted by a fine-tuned Depth Anything V2 model from four RGB cameras. The complete inference pipeline, comprising monocular depth estimation (MDE), policy execution, and motor control, runs entirely onboard an NVIDIA Jetson Orin AGX mounted on a DJI RoboMaster platform, requiring no external computation for inference. In simulation, the student achieves success rates of 82-96.5%, consistently outperforming the standard 2D LiDAR teacher (50-89%). In real-world experiments, the MDE-based student outperforms the 2D LiDAR teacher when navigating around obstacles with complex 3D geometries, such as overhanging structures and low-profile objects, that fall outside the single scan plane of a 2D LiDAR.

</details>


### [389] [CHOP: Counterfactual Human Preference Labels Improve Obstacle Avoidance in Visuomotor Navigation Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02004)
*Gershom Seneviratne,Jianyu An,Vaibhav Shende,Sahire Ellahy,Yaxita Amin,Kondapi Manasanjani,Samarth Chopra,Jonathan Deepak Kannan,Dinesh Manocha*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CHOP利用反事实人类偏好标签来对齐视觉运动导航策略，使其更符合人类对安全性和避障的直觉，显著减少了碰撞风险并提高了导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉运动导航策略在复杂现实环境中往往难以实现安全导航和动态避障，需要更好地与人类对安全性和避障的直觉认知对齐。

Method: 提出CHOP方法：为每个视觉观察生成一组反事实导航轨迹（包括机器人实际执行的轨迹），让人类标注者基于碰撞风险和路径效率等因素对这些轨迹进行成对偏好标注，然后利用这些聚合的偏好标签来微调视觉运动导航策略。

Result: 在SCAND数据集上，使用CHOP微调的视觉运动导航策略将近碰撞事件减少49.7%，与人类偏好轨迹的偏差降低45.0%，平均障碍物间隙增加19.8%。在Ghost Robotics Vision60四足机器人的真实部署中，目标成功率提高24.4%，最小障碍物间隙增加6.8%，碰撞和干预事件减少45.7%，归一化路径完成度提高38.6%。

Conclusion: 反事实偏好监督在弥合大规模视觉运动策略与人类对齐、安全感知的具身导航之间的差距方面具有重要价值，CHOP方法显著提升了导航策略的安全性和人类偏好对齐度。

Abstract: Visuomotor navigation policies have shown strong perception-action coupling for embodied agents, yet they often struggle with safe navigation and dynamic obstacle avoidance in complex real-world environments. We introduce CHOP, a novel approach that leverages Counterfactual Human Preference Labels to align visuomotor navigation policies towards human intuition of safety and obstacle avoidance in navigation. In CHOP, for each visual observation, the robot's executed trajectory is included among a set of counterfactual navigation trajectories: alternative trajectories the robot could have followed under identical conditions. Human annotators provide pairwise preference labels over these trajectories based on anticipated outcomes such as collision risk and path efficiency. These aggregated preferences are then used to fine-tune visuomotor navigation policies, aligning their behavior with human preferences in navigation. Experiments on the SCAND dataset show that visuomotor navigation policies fine-tuned with CHOP reduce near-collision events by 49.7%, decrease deviation from human-preferred trajectories by 45.0%, and increase average obstacle clearance by 19.8% on average across multiple state-of-the-art models, compared to their pretrained baselines. These improvements transfer to real-world deployments on a Ghost Robotics Vision60 quadruped, where CHOP-aligned policies improve average goal success rates by 24.4%, increase minimum obstacle clearance by 6.8%, reduce collision and intervention events by 45.7%, and improve normalized path completion by 38.6% on average across navigation scenarios, compared to their pretrained baselines. Our results highlight the value of counterfactual preference supervision in bridging the gap between large-scale visuomotor policies and human-aligned, safety-aware embodied navigation.

</details>


### [390] [LAD-Drive: Bridging Language and Trajectory with Action-Aware Diffusion Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02035)
*Fabian Schmidt,Karol Fedurko,Markus Enzweiler,Abhinav Valada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LAD-Drive是一个用于自动驾驶的生成式框架，通过结构化解耦高层意图和低层空间规划，使用动作解码器推断概率元动作分布，结合动作感知扩散解码器生成安全、运动学可行的轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常依赖单模态规划头，限制了其表示多模态驾驶行为的能力，且大多数生成方法使用one-hot编码动作，忽略了复杂场景中关键的导航不确定性。

Method: 引入LAD-Drive框架，结构化解耦高层意图和低层空间规划。使用动作解码器推断概率元动作分布，建立显式信念状态；将该分布与车辆运动学状态融合，通过动作感知扩散解码器利用截断去噪过程将学习到的运动锚点细化为安全、运动学可行的轨迹。

Result: 在LangAuto基准测试中，LAD-Drive实现了最先进的结果，驾驶分数比竞争基线高出59%，同时显著减少了路线偏差和碰撞。

Conclusion: LAD-Drive通过结构化解耦意图和规划，并利用概率元动作分布和动作感知扩散解码，有效解决了将MLLM的离散语义知识转化为连续轨迹的挑战，在自动驾驶任务上表现出色。

Abstract: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide advanced reasoning for autonomous driving, translating their discrete semantic knowledge into continuous trajectories remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods often rely on unimodal planning heads that inherently limit their ability to represent multimodal driving behavior. Furthermore, most generative approaches frequently condition on one-hot encoded actions, discarding the nuanced navigational uncertainty critical for complex scenarios. To resolve these limitations, we introduce LAD-Drive, a generative framework that structurally disentangles high-level intention from low-level spatial planning. LAD-Drive employs an action decoder to infer a probabilistic meta-action distribution, establishing an explicit belief state that preserves the nuanced intent typically lost by one-hot encodings. This distribution, fused with the vehicle's kinematic state, conditions an action-aware diffusion decoder that utilizes a truncated denoising process to refine learned motion anchors into safe, kinematically feasible trajectories. Extensive evaluations on the LangAuto benchmark demonstrate that LAD-Drive achieves state-of-the-art results, outperforming competitive baselines by up to 59% in Driving Score while significantly reducing route deviations and collisions. We will publicly release the code and models on https://github.com/iis-esslingen/lad-drive.

</details>


### [391] [$π$-StepNFT: Wider Space Needs Finer Steps in Online RL for Flow-based VLAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02083)
*Siting Wang,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Minnan Pei,Xinyu Cui,Cheng Deng,Jian Zhao,Guan Huang,Haifeng Zhang,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出π-StepNFT框架，通过单次前向传播优化，无需辅助价值网络，解决流式VLA模型在多步采样中的似然计算难题，提升在线强化学习性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流式视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在具身控制中表现出色，但在多步采样时面临难以处理的似然计算问题，阻碍了在线强化学习的应用。

Method: 提出π-StepNFT（步进式负感知微调）框架，该框架无需评论家和似然计算，每个优化步骤仅需一次前向传播，消除了辅助价值网络的需求。该方法识别出更广泛的探索空间需要更细粒度的步进式指导来实现对齐。

Result: 在LIBERO基准测试中展现了具有竞争力的少样本鲁棒性，解锁了潜在性能；在ManiSkill上实现了优越的泛化能力，在分布外场景中优于基于价值的方法，防止了对多模态特征的过拟合。

Conclusion: π-StepNFT为解决复杂现实世界应用提供了可扩展的解决方案，其特性在防止过拟合和提升泛化能力方面表现出色。

Abstract: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) models excel in embodied control but suffer from intractable likelihoods during multi-step sampling, hindering online reinforcement learning. We propose \textbf{\textit{$\boldsymbolπ$-StepNFT}} (Step-wise Negative-aware Fine-Tuning), a critic-and-likelihood-free framework that requires only a single forward pass per optimization step and eliminates auxiliary value networks. We identify that wider exploration spaces necessitate finer-grained, step-wise guidance for alignment. Empirically, $π$-StepNFT unlocks latent potential on LIBERO with competitive few-shot robustness. Moreover, it achieves superior generalization on ManiSkill, outperforming value-based baselines in OOD scenarios by preventing overfitting to multimodal features. This property offers a scalable solution promising for complex real-world applications.

</details>


### [392] [ACDC: Adaptive Curriculum Planning with Dynamic Contrastive Control for Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning in Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02104)
*Xuerui Wang,Guangyu Ren,Tianhong Dai,Bintao Hu,Shuangyao Huang,Wenzhang Zhang,Hengyan Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ACDC是一个结合自适应课程规划与动态对比控制的强化学习框架，通过多维课程设计引导智能体学习，在机器人操作任务中显著提升样本效率和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有目标导向强化学习方法主要依赖经验优先级，导致在多样化任务中性能受限。受人类学习行为启发，需要更全面的学习范式来引导智能体沿着精心设计的学习轨迹前进。

Method: ACDC框架包含两个层次：规划层的自适应课程(AC)组件通过动态平衡多样性驱动的探索和质量驱动的利用来安排学习课程；控制层的动态对比(DC)组件通过范数约束对比学习实施课程计划，实现与当前课程重点对齐的幅度引导经验选择。

Result: 在具有挑战性的机器人操作任务上进行广泛实验，ACDC在样本效率和最终任务成功率方面始终优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: ACDC通过整合自适应课程规划和动态对比控制，为机器人操作提供了一种更有效的学习范式，显著提升了目标导向强化学习的性能表现。

Abstract: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning has shown considerable potential in robotic manipulation; however, existing approaches remain limited by their reliance on prioritizing collected experience, resulting in suboptimal performance across diverse tasks. Inspired by human learning behaviors, we propose a more comprehensive learning paradigm, ACDC, which integrates multidimensional Adaptive Curriculum (AC) Planning with Dynamic Contrastive (DC) Control to guide the agent along a well-designed learning trajectory. More specifically, at the planning level, the AC component schedules the learning curriculum by dynamically balancing diversity-driven exploration and quality-driven exploitation based on the agent's success rate and training progress. At the control level, the DC component implements the curriculum plan through norm-constrained contrastive learning, enabling magnitude-guided experience selection aligned with the current curriculum focus. Extensive experiments on challenging robotic manipulation tasks demonstrate that ACDC consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baselines in both sample efficiency and final task success rate.

</details>


### [393] [Real-Time Thermal-Inertial Odometry on Embedded Hardware for High-Speed GPS-Denied Flight](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02114)
*Austin Stone,Mark Petersen,Cammy Peterson*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于高速GPS拒止飞行的实时单目热惯导里程计系统，融合热成像相机、IMU、激光测距仪、气压计和磁力计，在嵌入式硬件上实现30m/s高速飞行，轨迹漂移低于2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉惯性导航系统在高速飞行、视觉退化（如烟雾、黑暗）和GPS拒止环境下性能受限，需要一种能够在恶劣视觉条件下稳定工作的导航系统。

Method: 系统采用固定滞后因子图融合多传感器数据：1）轻量级热成像优化前端处理运动模糊和低对比度；2）激光测距仪提供特征深度先验；3）IIR滤波器预处理IMU数据；4）GRU网络建模高速飞行中的气压误差。

Result: 在NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX上实现完整系统，支持30m/s闭环四旋翼飞行，千米级轨迹漂移低于2%，超越了多项基线方法。

Conclusion: 该系统扩展了热惯导导航的操作范围，实现了在视觉退化和GPS拒止环境下可靠的高速飞行，为恶劣条件下的自主导航提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: We present a real-time monocular thermal-inertial odometry system designed for high-velocity, GPS-denied flight on embedded hardware. The system fuses measurements from a FLIR Boson+ 640 longwave infrared camera, a high-rate IMU, a laser range finder, a barometer, and a magnetometer within a fixed-lag factor graph. To sustain reliable feature tracks under motion blur, low contrast, and rapid viewpoint changes, we employ a lightweight thermal-optimized front-end with multi-stage feature filtering. Laser range finder measurements provide per-feature depth priors that stabilize scale during weakly observable motion. High-rate inertial data is first pre-filtered using a Chebyshev Type II infinite impulse response (IIR) filter and then preintegrated, improving robustness to airframe vibrations during aggressive maneuvers. To address barometric altitude errors induced at high airspeeds, we train an uncertainty-aware gated recurrent unit (GRU) network that models the temporal dynamics of static pressure distortion, outperforming polynomial and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) baselines. Integrated on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX, the complete system supports closed-loop quadrotor flight at 30 m/s with drift under 2% over kilometer-scale trajectories. These contributions expand the operational envelope of thermal-inertial navigation, enabling reliable high-speed flight in visually degraded and GPS-denied environments.

</details>


### [394] [Robometer: Scaling General-Purpose Robotic Reward Models via Trajectory Comparisons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02115)
*Anthony Liang,Yigit Korkmaz,Jiahui Zhang,Minyoung Hwang,Abrar Anwar,Sidhant Kaushik,Aditya Shah,Alex S. Huang,Luke Zettlemoyer,Dieter Fox,Yu Xiang,Anqi Li,Andreea Bobu,Abhishek Gupta,Stephen Tu,Erdem Biyik,Jesse Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Robometer是一个结合轨迹内进度监督和轨迹间偏好监督的可扩展奖励建模框架，通过双目标训练（帧级进度损失和轨迹比较偏好损失）从专家和失败轨迹中学习，在RBM-1M数据集上训练，提升了奖励泛化能力和机器人学习性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人奖励模型通常基于专家演示预测绝对任务进度，只提供局部帧级监督。这种方法在专家演示上有效，但在大规模机器人数据集中难以扩展，因为失败和次优轨迹众多，且分配密集进度标签存在歧义。需要一种能有效利用非专家数据的可扩展奖励建模方法。

Method: 提出Robometer框架，结合轨迹内进度监督和轨迹间偏好监督。采用双目标训练：1）帧级进度损失，在专家数据上锚定奖励幅度；2）轨迹比较偏好损失，对同一任务的不同轨迹施加全局排序约束。使用RBM-1M数据集（包含100多万条轨迹，涵盖多种机器人本体和任务，包含大量次优和失败数据）进行训练。

Result: 在基准测试和真实世界评估中，Robometer比先前方法学习到更具泛化能力的奖励函数，并在多种下游应用中提升了机器人学习性能。代码、模型权重和视频已开源。

Conclusion: Robometer通过结合局部进度监督和全局偏好监督，有效利用了专家和非专家数据，实现了可扩展的奖励建模，显著提升了奖励函数的泛化能力和机器人学习效果。

Abstract: General-purpose robot reward models are typically trained to predict absolute task progress from expert demonstrations, providing only local, frame-level supervision. While effective for expert demonstrations, this paradigm scales poorly to large-scale robotics datasets where failed and suboptimal trajectories are abundant and assigning dense progress labels is ambiguous. We introduce Robometer, a scalable reward modeling framework that combines intra-trajectory progress supervision with inter-trajectory preference supervision. Robometer is trained with a dual objective: a frame-level progress loss that anchors reward magnitude on expert data, and a trajectory-comparison preference loss that imposes global ordering constraints across trajectories of the same task, enabling effective learning from both real and augmented failed trajectories. To support this formulation at scale, we curate RBM-1M, a reward-learning dataset comprising over one million trajectories spanning diverse robot embodiments and tasks, including substantial suboptimal and failure data. Across benchmarks and real-world evaluations, Robometer learns more generalizable reward functions than prior methods and improves robot learning performance across a diverse set of downstream applications. Code, model weights, and videos at https://robometer.github.io/.

</details>


### [395] [Rethinking Camera Choice: An Empirical Study on Fisheye Camera Properties in Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02139)
*Han Xue,Nan Min,Xiaotong Liu,Wendi Chen,Yuan Fang,Jun Lv,Cewu Lu,Chuan Wen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 鱼眼摄像头在机器人操作中的广泛应用超越了对其在策略学习下游影响的系统性理解，本文通过首个综合实证研究填补了这一空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 鱼眼摄像头在机器人操作中的采用因其超宽视场而迅速增长，但缺乏对其下游影响（特别是对策略学习影响）的系统性理解。

Method: 通过模拟和真实世界的大量实验，研究三个关键问题：空间定位、场景泛化和硬件泛化，并提出了随机尺度增强策略。

Result: 研究发现：1) 宽视场显著增强空间定位，但效果取决于环境视觉复杂度；2) 鱼眼训练的策略在简单场景容易过拟合，但在足够多样化的环境中表现出优越的场景泛化能力；3) 交叉摄像头转移失败的主要原因是尺度过拟合，随机尺度增强策略可改善硬件泛化性能。

Conclusion: 研究结果为大规模收集和有效使用机器人学习中的鱼眼数据集提供了具体可行的指导。

Abstract: The adoption of fisheye cameras in robotic manipulation, driven by their exceptionally wide Field of View (FoV), is rapidly outpacing a systematic understanding of their downstream effects on policy learning. This paper presents the first comprehensive empirical study to bridge this gap, rigorously analyzing the properties of wrist-mounted fisheye cameras for imitation learning. Through extensive experiments in both simulation and the real world, we investigate three critical research questions: spatial localization, scene generalization, and hardware generalization. Our investigation reveals that: (1) The wide FoV significantly enhances spatial localization, but this benefit is critically contingent on the visual complexity of the environment. (2) Fisheye-trained policies, while prone to overfitting in simple scenes, unlock superior scene generalization when trained with sufficient environmental diversity. (3) While naive cross-camera transfer leads to failures, we identify the root cause as scale overfitting and demonstrate that hardware generalization performance can be improved with a simple Random Scale Augmentation (RSA) strategy. Collectively, our findings provide concrete, actionable guidance for the large-scale collection and effective use of fisheye datasets in robotic learning. More results and videos are available on https://robo-fisheye.github.io/

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [396] [Transit Network Design with Two-Level Demand Uncertainties: A Machine Learning and Contextual Stochastic Optimization Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00010)
*Hongzhao Guan,Beste Basciftci,Pascal Van Hentenryck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出两层级乘客选择公交网络设计(2LRC-TND)框架，结合机器学习和上下文随机优化，考虑核心需求和潜在需求两级不确定性，比传统固定需求模型更现实。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统公交网络设计通常基于固定需求假设，忽略了需求不确定性对网络设计的影响。现实中，公交需求受多种因素影响，包括服务质量对潜在用户的吸引力，需要更复杂的建模方法。

Method: 提出2LRC-TND框架：1) 使用机器学习模型构建两级出行方式选择模型，识别核心需求(依赖公交者)和潜在需求(有条件选择公交者)；2) 将选择模型集成到上下文随机优化(CSO)中；3) 使用约束规划(CP)的CP-SAT求解器求解优化问题。

Result: 在亚特兰大都市区案例研究中(6600多条出行弧，38000多次出行)，2LRC-TND能够有效设计考虑需求不确定性和上下文信息的公交网络，相比固定需求模型更现实可行。

Conclusion: 2LRC-TND框架成功将两级需求不确定性纳入公交网络设计过程，通过机器学习建模选择行为和上下文随机优化，为公交网络设计提供了更贴近现实的替代方案。

Abstract: Transit Network Design is a well-studied problem in the field of transportation, typically addressed by solving optimization models under fixed demand assumptions. Considering the limitations of these assumptions, this paper proposes a new framework, namely the Two-Level Rider Choice Transit Network Design (2LRC-TND), that leverages machine learning and contextual stochastic optimization (CSO) through constraint programming (CP) to incorporate two layers of demand uncertainties into the network design process. The first level identifies travelers who rely on public transit (core demand), while the second level captures the conditional adoption behavior of those who do not (latent demand), based on the availability and quality of transit services. To capture these two types of uncertainties, 2LRC-TND relies on two travel mode choice models, that use multiple machine learning models. To design a network, 2LRC-TND integrates the resulting choice models into a CSO that is solved using a CP-SAT solver. 2LRC-TND is evaluated through a case study involving over 6,600 travel arcs and more than 38,000 trips in the Atlanta metropolitan area. The computational results demonstrate the effectiveness of the 2LRC-TND in designing transit networks that account for demand uncertainties and contextual information, offering a more realistic alternative to fixed-demand models.

</details>


### [397] [StaTS: Spectral Trajectory Schedule Learning for Adaptive Time Series Forecasting with Frequency Guided Denoiser](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00037)
*Jintao Zhang,Zirui Liu,Mingyue Cheng,Xianquan Wang,Zhiding Liu,Qi Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: StaTS是一个用于概率时间序列预测的扩散模型，通过学习噪声调度和去噪器来改进现有方法，解决了固定噪声调度导致的结构恢复有限和谱退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型在时间序列预测中使用固定噪声调度，导致中间状态难以逆转且终端状态偏离近噪声假设。同时，现有方法主要依赖时域条件，很少建模调度引起的谱退化，限制了不同噪声水平下的结构恢复能力。

Method: 提出StaTS模型，包含两个核心组件：1) 谱轨迹调度器(SS)，通过学习数据自适应噪声调度并进行谱正则化来改善结构保持和逐步可逆性；2) 频率引导去噪器(FGD)，估计调度引起的谱失真并用于调制不同扩散步和变量间的去噪强度。采用两阶段训练程序稳定调度学习和去噪器优化的耦合。

Result: 在多个真实世界基准测试中显示出一致的性能提升，同时在更少采样步数下仍保持强劲性能。

Conclusion: StaTS通过联合学习噪声调度和去噪器，解决了现有扩散模型在时间序列预测中的局限性，实现了更好的结构恢复和预测性能。

Abstract: Diffusion models have been used for probabilistic time series forecasting and show strong potential. However, fixed noise schedules often produce intermediate states that are hard to invert and a terminal state that deviates from the near noise assumption. Meanwhile, prior methods rely on time domain conditioning and seldom model schedule induced spectral degradation, which limits structure recovery across noise levels. We propose StaTS, a diffusion model for probabilistic time series forecasting that learns the noise schedule and the denoiser through alternating updates. StaTS includes Spectral Trajectory Scheduler (STS) that learns a data adaptive noise schedule with spectral regularization to improve structural preservation and stepwise invertibility, and Frequency Guided Denoiser (FGD) that estimates schedule induced spectral distortion and uses it to modulate denoising strength for heterogeneous restoration across diffusion steps and variables. A two stage training procedure stabilizes the coupling between schedule learning and denoiser optimization. Experiments on multiple real world benchmarks show consistent gains, while maintaining strong performance with fewer sampling steps. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjt-gpu/StaTS/.

</details>


### [398] [CARE: Confounder-Aware Aggregation for Reliable LLM Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00039)
*Jitian Zhao,Changho Shin,Tzu-Heng Huang,Satya Sai Srinath Namburi GNVV,Frederic Sala*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CARE是一个考虑混淆因素的LLM评判者聚合框架，通过建模真实质量信号和共享混淆因子来提高评估准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM-as-a-judge的聚合方法存在根本缺陷：它们假设评判者提供独立的质量估计，但实际上LLM评判者存在由共享潜在混淆因素（如冗长性、风格偏好或训练伪影）引起的相关误差，导致多数投票或平均等标准聚合规则效果有限甚至放大系统性错误

Method: 引入CARE框架，明确将LLM评判者分数建模为来自潜在真实质量信号和共享混淆因子的组合。无需真实标签，通过分离质量和混淆因素来改进聚合，而非启发式地重新加权评判者

Result: 在12个公共基准测试中（涵盖连续评分、二元分类和成对偏好设置），CARE提高了聚合准确性，将误差降低了高达26.8%。提供了可识别性和有限样本恢复的理论保证

Conclusion: CARE通过显式建模共享混淆因素，解决了LLM评判者聚合中的相关误差问题，显著提高了评估准确性，为可扩展的LLM评估提供了更可靠的聚合框架

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge ensembles are the standard paradigm for scalable evaluation, but their aggregation mechanisms suffer from a fundamental flaw: they implicitly assume that judges provide independent estimates of true quality. However, in practice, LLM judges exhibit correlated errors caused by shared latent confounders -- such as verbosity, stylistic preferences, or training artifacts -- causing standard aggregation rules like majority vote or averaging to provide little gain or even amplify systematic mistakes. To address this, we introduce CARE, a confounder-aware aggregation framework that explicitly models LLM judge scores as arising from both a latent true-quality signal and shared confounding factors. Rather than heuristically re-weighting judges, CARE separates quality from confounders without access to ground-truth labels. We provide theoretical guarantees for identifiability and finite-sample recovery under shared confounders, and we quantify the systematic bias incurred when aggregation models omit confounding latent factors. Across 12 public benchmarks spanning continuous scoring, binary classification, and pairwise preference settings, CARE improves aggregation accuracy, reducing error by up to 26.8\%. Code is released in \href{https://github.com/SprocketLab/CARE}{https://github.com/SprocketLab/CARE}.

</details>


### [399] [Attn-QAT: 4-Bit Attention With Quantization-Aware Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00040)
*Peiyuan Zhang,Matthew Noto,Wenxuan Tan,Chengquan Jiang,Will Lin,Wei Zhou,Hao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了注意力机制的4位量化感知训练，提出了Attn-QAT方法，解决了FP4量化在注意力计算中的训练不稳定问题，在扩散和语言模型中恢复了FP4注意力带来的质量下降，并在RTX 5090上实现了1.5倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实现可靠的4位注意力是新兴FP4 GPU上进行端到端FP4计算的前提，但由于FP4的动态范围极小且注意力激活值呈重尾分布，注意力成为主要障碍。现有方法中，简单将FP4前向传播与高精度Flash Attention风格反向传播结合的"即插即用"QAT会导致训练不稳定。

Method: 提出了Attn-QAT方法，基于两个关键原则：1) 在反向传播中匹配低精度注意力分数的重计算；2) 解决Flash Attention梯度计算中的隐式精度假设。实现了融合Triton内核用于训练和FP4推理内核。

Result: 在扩散模型和语言模型中，Attn-QAT无需使用先前FP4注意力中的显式离群值缓解启发式方法，就能恢复FP4注意力带来的质量下降，并在RTX 5090上实现了高达1.5倍的加速。

Conclusion: 本文系统研究了4位注意力量化感知训练，提出了稳定FP4注意力训练的关键原则和Attn-QAT方法，为FP4 GPU上的端到端4位计算提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Achieving reliable 4-bit attention is a prerequisite for end-to-end FP4 computation on emerging FP4-capable GPUs, yet attention remains the main obstacle due to FP4's tiny dynamic range and attention's heavy-tailed activations. This paper presents the first systematic study of 4-bit quantization-aware training (QAT) for attention. We find that "drop-in" QAT, which naively combines an FP4 forward pass with a high-precision Flash Attention (FA)-style backward pass, leads to training instability. We identify two key principles for stable FP4 attention: (1) matching low-precision recomputation of attention scores in the backward pass, and (2) resolving implicit precision assumptions in FA's gradient calculation. Based on these insights, we propose Attn-QAT and implement fused Triton kernels for training as well as FP4 inference kernels. Across diffusion and language models, Attn-QAT recovers the quality drop from FP4 attention without explicit outlier-mitigation heuristics used in prior FP4 attention, and delivers up to a 1.5x speedup on an RTX 5090. Video demos can be found at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/190F6xbBDUF2kGQYIcXBt3ehSYij5jlim?usp=sharing.

</details>


### [400] [Econometric vs. Causal Structure-Learning for Time-Series Policy Decisions: Evidence from the UK COVID-19 Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00041)
*Bruno Petrungaro,Anthony C. Constantinou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究比较了计量经济学方法和传统因果机器学习算法在时间序列数据中的因果发现性能，使用COVID-19英国数据作为案例，发现计量方法提供明确的时间结构规则，而因果ML算法探索更广泛的图结构空间但产生更密集的图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统因果机器学习主要关注横截面数据，而时间序列数据的因果结构恢复仍在研究中。计量经济学多年来在时间序列因果关系方面有深入研究，因此研究希望比较这两种方法的性能，探讨能否将计量经济学的经验融入因果机器学习中。

Method: 评估四种计量经济学方法和十一种因果ML算法，从图结构、模型维度和因果效应恢复能力三个方面进行比较。使用COVID-19英国真实数据作为案例，并将计量经济学方法的结果转换为bnlearn（最广泛使用的贝叶斯网络R库）格式。

Result: 计量经济学方法提供明确的时间结构规则，而因果ML算法通过探索更大的图结构空间产生更密集的图，能识别更多的因果关系。计量方法在时间序列结构方面更规范，而ML方法在发现更广泛的因果关系方面更有优势。

Conclusion: 两种方法各有优势：计量经济学方法提供明确的时间序列规则，而因果ML算法能发现更广泛的因果关系。研究提供了将计量经济学结果转换为bnlearn格式的代码，为政策决策支持提供了不同方法的比较框架。

Abstract: Causal machine learning (ML) recovers graphical structures that inform us about potential cause-and-effect relationships. Most progress has focused on cross-sectional data with no explicit time order, whereas recovering causal structures from time series data remains the subject of ongoing research in causal ML. In addition to traditional causal ML, this study assesses econometric methods that some argue can recover causal structures from time series data. The use of these methods can be explained by the significant attention the field of econometrics has given to causality, and specifically to time series, over the years. This presents the possibility of comparing the causal discovery performance between econometric and traditional causal ML algorithms. We seek to understand if there are lessons to be incorporated into causal ML from econometrics, and provide code to translate the results of these econometric methods to the most widely used Bayesian Network R library, bnlearn. We investigate the benefits and challenges that these algorithms present in supporting policy decision-making, using the real-world case of COVID-19 in the UK as an example. Four econometric methods are evaluated in terms of graphical structure, model dimensionality, and their ability to recover causal effects, and these results are compared with those of eleven causal ML algorithms. Amongst our main results, we see that econometric methods provide clear rules for temporal structures, whereas causal-ML algorithms offer broader discovery by exploring a larger space of graph structures that tends to lead to denser graphs that capture more identifiable causal relationships.

</details>


### [401] [Maximizing the Spectral Energy Gain in Sub-1-Bit LLMs via Latent Geometry Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00042)
*Banseok Lee,Youngmin Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出LittleBit-2框架，通过内部潜在旋转和联合迭代量化解决极端模型压缩中的潜在几何错位问题，在亚1位压缩率下实现最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在极端模型压缩中，低秩二进制近似理论上应优于微小秩浮点基线，但现有方法未能实现这一潜力，性能落后于最先进的1位方法。作者将这种性能下降归因于潜在几何错位：标准奇异向量表现出高相干性（尖峰分布），这是二进制量化的最坏几何情况。

Method: 提出LittleBit-2框架，采用内部潜在旋转和联合迭代量化（Joint-ITQ）作为几何预处理器，将相干潜在分布与二进制超立方体对齐，且不增加推理开销。该方法通过几何对齐优化二进制量化过程。

Result: 在Llama-2和Llama-3模型上，LittleBit-2在亚1位压缩率（1~0.1 bpp）下建立了新的最先进水平，匹配了领先的1位基线方法的保真度。

Conclusion: 通过解决潜在几何错位问题，LittleBit-2成功实现了极端模型压缩中的谱能量增益潜力，在极低比特率下达到了与更高比特率方法相当的性能。

Abstract: We identify the Spectral Energy Gain in extreme model compression, where low-rank binary approximations outperform tiny-rank floating-point baselines for heavy-tailed spectra. However, prior attempts fail to realize this potential, trailing state-of-the-art 1-bit methods. We attribute this degradation to Latent Geometry Misalignment: standard singular vectors exhibit high coherence (spiky distribution), the worst-case geometry for binary quantization. To realize this gain, we propose LittleBit-2, a framework employing Internal Latent Rotation and Joint Iterative Quantization (Joint-ITQ). This approach acts as a geometric preconditioner, aligning coherent latent distributions with the binary hypercube with zero inference overhead. Empirically, LittleBit-2 establishes a new state-of-the-art in the sub-1-bit regime (1$\sim$0.1 bpp) on Llama-2 and Llama-3, matching the fidelity of leading 1-bit baselines.

</details>


### [402] [Reinforcement Learning for Control with Probabilistic Stability Guarantee: A Finite-Sample Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00043)
*Minghao Han,Lixian Zhang,Chenliang Liu,Zhipeng Zhou,Jun Wang,Wei Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于有限数据的强化学习方法，为控制系统提供概率稳定性保证，并开发了L-REINFORCE算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弥合强化学习与控制理论之间的关键差距，在模型无关框架下使用有限数据实现稳定性分析和控制器设计。

Method: 利用李雅普诺夫方法提出概率稳定性定理，仅使用有限数量的采样轨迹确保均方稳定性；推导出稳定策略学习的策略梯度定理，并开发L-REINFORCE算法。

Result: 稳定性概率随轨迹数量和长度增加而提高，随着数据量增长收敛到确定性；在Cartpole任务仿真中，L-REINFORCE在确保稳定性方面优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 该工作成功地将强化学习与控制理论相结合，为模型无关框架下的稳定性分析和控制器设计提供了有效方法。

Abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to reinforcement learning (RL) for control systems that provides probabilistic stability guarantees using finite data. Leveraging Lyapunov's method, we propose a probabilistic stability theorem that ensures mean square stability using only a finite number of sampled trajectories. The probability of stability increases with the number and length of trajectories, converging to certainty as data size grows. Additionally, we derive a policy gradient theorem for stabilizing policy learning and develop an RL algorithm, L-REINFORCE, that extends the classical REINFORCE algorithm to stabilization problems. The effectiveness of L-REINFORCE is demonstrated through simulations on a Cartpole task, where it outperforms the baseline in ensuring stability. This work bridges a critical gap between RL and control theory, enabling stability analysis and controller design in a model-free framework with finite data.

</details>


### [403] [Property-Driven Evaluation of GNN Expressiveness at Scale: Datasets, Framework, and Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00044)
*Sicong Che,Jiayi Yang,Sarfraz Khurshid,Wenxi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了基于形式化规范的图神经网络评估方法，通过Alloy生成包含336个数据集的基准，评估GNN在16种图属性上的表达能力，发现不同池化方法在泛化性、敏感性和鲁棒性上存在权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推动可信AI需要原则性的软件工程方法进行模型评估。图神经网络在处理图结构数据方面取得了显著成功，但其在捕捉基本图属性方面的表达能力仍是一个开放挑战。现有评估方法缺乏系统性和原则性。

Method: 1. 使用Alloy（软件规范语言和分析器）开发可配置的图数据集生成器，生成两个数据集家族：GraphRandom（包含满足或违反特定属性的多样化图）和GraphPerturb（引入受控结构变化）。2. 提出通用评估框架，评估GNN表达能力的三个关键方面：泛化性、敏感性和鲁棒性，使用两个新的量化指标。3. 对全局池化方法对GNN表达能力的影响进行首次全面研究。

Result: 1. 创建了包含336个新数据集的基准，每个数据集至少有10,000个标记图，涵盖16个对分布式系统、知识图谱和生物网络至关重要的基本图属性。2. 发现不同池化方法存在明显权衡：基于注意力的池化在泛化性和鲁棒性方面表现优异，而二阶池化提供更优的敏感性，但没有单一方法在所有属性上始终表现良好。

Conclusion: 通过将软件工程严谨性嵌入AI评估，这项工作为开发表达能力强且可靠的GNN架构建立了原则性基础。研究结果揭示了基本局限性，并提出了开放研究方向，包括自适应属性感知池化、尺度敏感架构和面向鲁棒性的训练。

Abstract: Advancing trustworthy AI requires principled software engineering approaches to model evaluation. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved remarkable success in processing graph-structured data, however, their expressiveness in capturing fundamental graph properties remains an open challenge. We address this by developing a property-driven evaluation methodology grounded in formal specification, systematic evaluation, and empirical study. Leveraging Alloy, a software specification language and analyzer, we introduce a configurable graph dataset generator that produces two dataset families: GraphRandom, containing diverse graphs that either satisfy or violate specific properties, and GraphPerturb, introducing controlled structural variations. Together, these benchmarks encompass 336 new datasets, each with at least 10,000 labeled graphs, covering 16 fundamental graph properties critical to distributed systems, knowledge graphs, and biological networks. We propose a general evaluation framework that assesses three key aspects of GNN expressiveness: generalizability, sensitivity, and robustness, with two novel quantitative metrics. Using this framework, we conduct the first comprehensive study on global pooling methods' impact on GNN expressiveness. Our findings reveal distinct trade-offs: attention-based pooling excels in generalization and robustness, while second-order pooling provides superior sensitivity, but no single approach consistently performs well across all properties. These insights highlight fundamental limitations and open research directions including adaptive property-aware pooling, scale-sensitive architectures, and robustness-oriented training. By embedding software engineering rigor into AI evaluation, this work establishes a principled foundation for developing expressive and reliable GNN architectures.

</details>


### [404] [Breaking the Factorization Barrier in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00045)
*Ian Li,Zilei Shao,Benjie Wang,Rose Yu,Guy Van den Broeck,Anji Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CoDD提出耦合离散扩散框架，通过轻量级概率推理层替代完全因子化输出分布，突破扩散语言模型的"因子化障碍"，实现高效并行生成且保持连贯性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散语言模型存在"因子化障碍"：同时预测的token被假设为独立，导致模型必须在速度与连贯性之间权衡。这种限制源于结构错误设定，而非骨干网络表达能力不足。

Method: 提出耦合离散扩散(CoDD)混合框架，用轻量级可处理的概率推理层替代完全因子化输出分布，形成表达能力更强但参数紧凑的分布族，能够建模复杂联合依赖关系。

Result: CoDD以可忽略的开销增强多种扩散语言模型架构，匹配计算密集型强化学习基线的推理性能但训练成本大幅降低，防止少步生成时的性能崩溃，在显著降低延迟下实现高质量输出。

Conclusion: CoDD通过打破因子化障碍，使扩散语言模型能够同时实现高效并行生成和高质量连贯输出，为扩散语言模型的实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion language models theoretically allow for efficient parallel generation but are practically hindered by the "factorization barrier": the assumption that simultaneously predicted tokens are independent. This limitation forces a trade-off: models must either sacrifice speed by resolving dependencies sequentially or suffer from incoherence due to factorization. We argue that this barrier arises not from limited backbone expressivity, but from a structural misspecification: models are restricted to fully factorized outputs because explicitly parameterizing a joint distribution would require the Transformer to output a prohibitively large number of parameters. We propose Coupled Discrete Diffusion (CoDD), a hybrid framework that breaks this barrier by replacing the fully-factorized output distribution with a lightweight, tractable probabilistic inference layer. This formulation yields a distribution family that is significantly more expressive than standard factorized priors, enabling the modeling of complex joint dependencies, yet remains compact enough to avoid the prohibitive parameter explosion associated with full joint modeling. Empirically, CoDD seamlessly enhances diverse diffusion language model architectures with negligible overhead, matching the reasoning performance of computationally intensive Reinforcement Learning baselines at a fraction of the training cost. Furthermore, it prevents performance collapse in few-step generation, enabling high-quality outputs at significantly reduced latencies. Code available at: https://github.com/liuanji/CoDD

</details>


### [405] [REMIND: Rethinking Medical High-Modality Learning under Missingness--A Long-Tailed Distribution Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00046)
*Chenwei Wu,Zitao Shuai,Liyue Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出REMIND框架，通过分组专家混合架构和分布鲁棒优化，解决高模态缺失下长尾分布导致的性能下降问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗多模态学习中，由于数据收集限制导致高模态缺失问题，这会产生指数级增长的模态组合，形成长尾分布。现有方法忽视这一现象，导致尾部模态组合性能显著下降

Method: 提出REMIND框架：1）采用分组专家混合架构，为不同模态组合学习特定的融合函数；2）使用分组分布鲁棒优化策略，对代表性不足的模态组合进行加权

Result: 在真实医疗数据集上的实验表明，该框架持续优于现有方法，并能鲁棒地推广到各种医疗多模态学习应用中

Conclusion: REMIND框架有效解决了高模态缺失下的长尾分布问题，通过专门的分组架构和优化策略，显著提升了多模态学习的性能

Abstract: Medical multi-modal learning is critical for integrating information from a large set of diverse modalities. However, when leveraging a high number of modalities in real clinical applications, it is often impractical to obtain full-modality observations for every patient due to data collection constraints, a problem we refer to as 'High-Modality Learning under Missingness'. In this study, we identify that such missingness inherently induces an exponential growth in possible modality combinations, followed by long-tail distributions of modality combinations due to varying modality availability. While prior work overlooked this critical phenomenon, we find this long-tailed distribution leads to significant underperformance on tail modality combination groups. Our empirical analysis attributes this problem to two fundamental issues: 1) gradient inconsistency, where tail groups' gradient updates diverge from the overall optimization direction; 2) concept shifts, where each modality combination requires distinct fusion functions. To address these challenges, we propose REMIND, a unified framework that REthinks MultImodal learNing under high-moDality missingness from a long-tail perspective. Our core idea is to propose a novel group-specialized Mixture-of-Experts architecture that scalably learns group-specific multi-modal fusion functions for arbitrary modality combinations, while simultaneously leveraging a group distributionally robust optimization strategy to upweight underrepresented modality combinations. Extensive experiments on real-world medical datasets show that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, and robustly generalizes across various medical multi-modal learning applications under high-modality missingness.

</details>


### [406] [BiJEPA: Bi-directional Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for Symmetric Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00049)
*Yongchao Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BiJEPA是一种双向联合嵌入预测架构，通过循环一致性预测和范数正则化解决标准JEPA单向预测的局限性，在多种模态数据上实现稳定收敛和鲁棒表示学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准JEPA模型通常采用单向预测机制（如上下文→目标），可能忽略了逆关系中的信息信号，导致性能下降。需要一种更全面的表示学习方法。

Method: 提出BiJEPA（双向联合嵌入预测架构），通过强制数据片段间的循环一致可预测性来增强表示学习。引入关键范数正则化机制解决对称预测固有的不稳定性（表示爆炸问题）。

Result: 在三种不同模态上评估：合成周期信号、混沌洛伦兹吸引子轨迹和高维图像数据（MNIST）。BiJEPA实现稳定收敛而不崩溃，捕捉混沌系统的语义结构，学习到能够生成和泛化的鲁棒时空表示。

Conclusion: BiJEPA通过双向预测和正则化机制，为表示学习提供了更全面的方法，在多种数据模态上表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has shifted from pixel-level reconstruction to latent space prediction, spearheaded by the Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA). While effective, standard JEPA models typically rely on a uni-directional prediction mechanism (e.g. Context $\to$ Target), potentially neglecting the informative signal inherent in the inverse relationship, degrading its performance. In this work, we propose \textbf{BiJEPA}, a \textit{Bi-Directional Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture} that enforces cycle-consistent predictability between data segments. We address the inherent instability of symmetric prediction (representation explosion) by introducing a critical norm regularization mechanism on the representation vectors. We evaluate BiJEPA on three distinct modalities: synthetic periodic signals, chaotic Lorenz attractor trajectories, and high-dimensional image data (MNIST). Our results demonstrate that BiJEPA achieves stable convergence without collapse, captures the semantic structure of chaotic systems, and learns robust temporal and spatial representations capable of generation and generalisation, offering a more holistic approach to representation learning.

</details>


### [407] [Knowledge-guided generative surrogate modeling for high-dimensional design optimization under scarce data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00052)
*Bingran Wang,Seongha Jeong,Sebastiaan P. C. van Schie,Dongyeon Han,Jaeho Min,John T. Hwang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RBF-Gen：一种结合稀缺数据和领域知识的径向基函数代理建模框架，通过生成器网络利用零空间，在数据稀缺情况下显著提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机械设计和制造过程优化中，高保真计算模型可能不可用或成本过高，而纯数据驱动的代理模型在数据稀缺时难以达到高预测精度。领域专家通常拥有有价值的领域知识，但很少有代理建模技术能系统地将这些知识与有限数据结合。

Method: 提出RBF-Gen框架，构建具有比训练样本更多中心的RBF空间，通过生成器网络利用零空间（受最大信息保留原理启发）。引入的潜变量提供了在训练过程中编码结构关系和分布先验的原则机制，从而引导代理模型获得物理上有意义的解。

Result: 数值研究表明，在数据稀缺设置下，RBF-Gen在1D和2D结构优化问题上显著优于标准RBF代理模型，并在真实世界半导体制造数据集上实现了更优的预测精度。

Conclusion: 将有限的实验数据与领域专业知识相结合，能够在机械和过程设计问题中实现准确且实用的代理建模，展示了这种方法的潜力。

Abstract: Surrogate models are widely used in mechanical design and manufacturing process optimization, where high-fidelity computational models may be unavailable or prohibitively expensive. Their effectiveness, however, is often limited by data scarcity, as purely data-driven surrogates struggle to achieve high predictive accuracy in such situations. Subject matter experts (SMEs) frequently possess valuable domain knowledge about functional relationships, yet few surrogate modeling techniques can systematically integrate this information with limited data. We address this challenge with RBF-Gen, a knowledge-guided surrogate modeling framework that combines scarce data with domain knowledge. This method constructs a radial basis function (RBF) space with more centers than training samples and leverages the null space via a generator network, inspired by the principle of maximum information preservation. The introduced latent variables provide a principled mechanism to encode structural relationships and distributional priors during training, thereby guiding the surrogate toward physically meaningful solutions. Numerical studies demonstrate that RBF-Gen significantly outperforms standard RBF surrogates on 1D and 2D structural optimization problems in data-scarce settings, and achieves superior predictive accuracy on a real-world semiconductor manufacturing dataset. These results highlight the potential of combining limited experimental data with domain expertise to enable accurate and practical surrogate modeling in mechanical and process design problems.

</details>


### [408] [Mag-Mamba: Modeling Coupled spatiotemporal Asymmetry for POI Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00053)
*Zhuoxuan Li,Tangwei Ye,Jieyuan Pei,Haina Liang,Zhongyuan Lai,Zihan Liu,Yiming Wu,Qi Zhang,Liang Hu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Mag-Mamba是一个用于下一个兴趣点推荐的框架，它通过复数域中的相位驱动旋转动力学来建模城市移动中固有的耦合时空不对称性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常基于图或序列架构，使用对称算子或实值聚合，难以统一建模随时间变化的全局方向性。城市移动中的时空不对称性（位置间转移意图具有高度不对称性且随时间动态变化）是下一个兴趣点推荐面临的核心挑战。

Method: 1. 时间条件磁相位编码器：在地理邻接图上构建时间条件磁拉普拉斯矩阵，利用边相位差来表征全局演化的空间方向性。2. 复数值Mamba模块：将传统的标量状态衰减推广为联合衰减-旋转动力学，通过时间间隔和磁地理先验进行显式调制。

Result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，Mag-Mamba相比最先进的基线方法取得了显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: 通过将时空不对称性建模为复数域中的相位驱动旋转动力学，Mag-Mamba框架能够有效解决下一个兴趣点推荐中的耦合时空不对称性挑战，为城市移动建模提供了新的思路。

Abstract: Next Point-of-Interest (POI) recommendation is a critical task in location-based services, yet it faces the fundamental challenge of coupled spatiotemporal asymmetry inherent in urban mobility. Specifically, transition intents between locations exhibit high asymmetry and are dynamically conditioned on time. Existing methods, typically built on graph or sequence backbones, rely on symmetric operators or real-valued aggregations, struggling to unify the modeling of time-varying global directionality. To address this limitation, we propose Mag-Mamba, a framework whose core insight lies in modeling spatiotemporal asymmetry as phase-driven rotational dynamics in the complex domain. Based on this, we first devise a Time-conditioned Magnetic Phase Encoder that constructs a time-conditioned Magnetic Laplacian on the geographic adjacency graph, utilizing edge phase differences to characterize the globally evolving spatial directionality. Subsequently, we introduce a Complex-valued Mamba module that generalizes traditional scalar state decay into joint decay-rotation dynamics, explicitly modulated by both time intervals and magnetic geographic priors. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that Mag-Mamba achieves significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [409] [Expert Divergence Learning for MoE-based Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00054)
*Jiaang Li,Haibin Chen,Langming Liu,Yujin Yuan,Yadao Wang,Yizhen Zhang,Chengting Yu,Xin Tong,Weidong Zhang,Shilei Liu,Wenbo Su,Bo Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Expert Divergence Learning方法，通过标签驱动的辅助损失函数，利用预训练语料中的领域标签来最大化不同数据领域专家路由分布之间的Jensen-Shannon散度，从而解决MoE架构中的专家同质化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合专家（MoE）架构是扩展语言模型的有效技术，但常面临专家同质化问题，即专家学习冗余功能，限制了MoE的潜力。需要一种方法来促进专家间的功能专业化。

Method: 提出Expert Divergence Learning预训练策略，引入标签驱动的辅助损失函数，利用预训练语料中的领域标签，最大化不同数据领域专家路由分布之间的Jensen-Shannon散度，引导模型为不同领域开发差异化的路由策略。

Result: 在15B参数的MoE模型上验证，使用该方法训练的模型不仅获得更低的语言建模损失，还在多种下游基准测试中表现显著提升。进一步分析证实该方法有效缓解专家同质化，带来更好的功能专业化，且训练计算开销可忽略。

Conclusion: Expert Divergence Learning是一种有效的预训练策略，能够解决MoE架构中的专家同质化问题，促进专家功能专业化，提升模型性能，且几乎不增加计算成本。

Abstract: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture is a powerful technique for scaling language models, yet it often suffers from expert homogenization, where experts learn redundant functionalities, thereby limiting MoE's full potential. To address this, we introduce Expert Divergence Learning, a novel pre-training strategy that explicitly encourages functional specialization among experts. Our method incorporates a label-driven auxiliary loss that leverages domain labels inherent in pre-training corpora to maximize the Jensen-Shannon Divergence between the expert routing distributions of different data domains. This optimization objective guides the model to develop diverged routing policies for varied domains and closer routing policies for the same domain, which leads to emergent and organized expert specialization. We validate our approach by pre-training MoE models of up to 15 billion parameters from scratch. Experimental results demonstrate that models trained with Expert Divergence Learning not only achieve a lower language modeling loss but also exhibit significant performance improvements across a diverse range of downstream benchmarks. Further analysis confirms that our method effectively mitigates expert homogenization and brings greater functional specialization, all with negligible computational overhead during training.

</details>


### [410] [M3-AD: Reflection-aware Multi-modal, Multi-category, and Multi-dimensional Benchmark and Framework for Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00055)
*Chao Huang,Yanhui Li,Yunkang Cao,Wei Wang,Hongxi Huang,Jie Wen,Wenqi Ren,Xiaochun Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出M3-AD，一个用于工业异常检测的反射感知多模态框架，包含M3-AD-FT和M3-AD-Bench两个数据集，以及RA-Monitor机制，通过可学习的决策修正过程提升模型在复杂工业场景中的可靠性和自校正能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在工业异常检测中虽然实现了零样本能力，但在细粒度、结构复杂的工业场景中容易产生高置信度但不可靠的决策，且缺乏有效的自校正机制。

Method: 提出M3-AD框架，包含两个互补的数据资源：用于反射对齐微调的M3-AD-FT和用于系统跨类别评估的M3-AD-Bench。在此基础上提出RA-Monitor，将反射建模为可学习的决策修正过程，指导模型在初始判断不可靠时进行受控自校正。

Result: 在M3-AD-Bench上的大量实验表明，RA-Monitor在零样本异常检测和异常分析任务中优于多个开源和商业多模态大语言模型。

Conclusion: 提出的M3-AD框架通过反射感知学习和RA-Monitor机制，有效提升了工业异常检测中模型的决策可靠性和自校正能力，为复杂工业场景下的可靠检测提供了新思路。

Abstract: Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced industrial anomaly detection toward a zero-shot paradigm, they still tend to produce high-confidence yet unreliable decisions in fine-grained and structurally complex industrial scenarios, and lack effective self-corrective mechanisms. To address this issue, we propose M3-AD, a unified reflection-aware multimodal framework for industrial anomaly detection. M3-AD comprises two complementary data resources: M3-AD-FT, designed for reflection-aligned fine-tuning, and M3-AD-Bench, designed for systematic cross-category evaluation, together providing a foundation for reflection-aware learning and reliability assessment. Building upon this foundation, we propose RA-Monitor, which models reflection as a learnable decision revision process and guides models to perform controlled self-correction when initial judgments are unreliable, thereby improving decision robustness. Extensive experiments conducted on M3-AD-Bench demonstrate that RA-Monitor outperforms multiple open-source and commercial MLLMs in zero-shot anomaly detection and anomaly analysis tasks. Code will be released at https://github.com/Yanhui-Lee/M3-AD.

</details>


### [411] [A Representation-Consistent Gated Recurrent Framework for Robust Medical Time-Series Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00067)
*Maitri Krishna Sai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种表示一致的门控循环框架(RC-GRF)，通过正则化约束隐藏状态的时间一致性，提高医疗时间序列数据建模的鲁棒性和泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗时间序列数据具有不规则采样、高噪声、缺失值和强特征间依赖的特点。传统的门控循环神经网络(LSTM/GRU)虽然能捕捉时间依赖，但缺乏对隐藏状态演化的显式约束，导致在噪声或不完整输入下出现表示漂移和不稳定性。

Method: 提出了表示一致的门控循环框架(RC-GRF)，引入原则性的正则化策略来强制隐藏状态表示的时间一致性。该框架是模型无关的，可以集成到现有的门控循环架构中而不修改其内部门控机制。

Result: 理论分析表明一致性约束能够限制隐藏状态发散并提高稳定性。在医疗时间序列分类基准测试上的广泛实验显示，该方法提高了鲁棒性、减少了方差，并增强了泛化性能，特别是在噪声和低样本设置下表现更好。

Conclusion: RC-GRF框架通过强制隐藏状态表示的时间一致性，有效解决了门控循环模型在医疗时间序列数据上的表示漂移问题，提高了模型的稳定性和泛化能力。

Abstract: Medical time-series data are characterized by irregular sampling, high noise levels, missing values, and strong inter-feature dependencies. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs), particularly gated architectures such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Gated Recurrent Units (GRU), are widely used for modeling such data due to their ability to capture temporal dependencies. However, standard gated recurrent models do not explicitly constrain the evolution of latent representations over time, leading to representation drift and instability under noisy or incomplete inputs. In this work, we propose a representation-consistent gated recurrent framework (RC-GRF) that introduces a principled regularization strategy to enforce temporal consistency in hidden-state representations. The proposed framework is model-agnostic and can be integrated into existing gated recurrent architectures without modifying their internal gating mechanisms. We provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating how the consistency constraint bounds hidden-state divergence and improves stability. Extensive experiments on medical time-series classification benchmarks show that the proposed approach improves robustness, reduces variance, and enhances generalization performance, particularly in noisy and low-sample settings.

</details>


### [412] [Certainty-Validity: A Diagnostic Framework for Discrete Commitment Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.00070)
*Datorien L. Anderson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出确定性-有效性(CVS)框架，用于诊断离散承诺系统的模型性能，揭示标准评估指标无法发现的"自信错误"失败模式，并分析83%模糊性天花板现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准机器学习评估指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、AUROC）假设所有错误是等价的，但这对离散承诺系统存在认识论缺陷。需要新的评估框架来区分模型在模糊数据上的适当怀疑与错误自信。

Method: 提出确定性-有效性(CVS)框架，将模型性能分解为2x2矩阵（高/低确定性 vs 有效/无效预测）。在Fashion-MNIST、EMNIST和IMDB数据集上进行消融实验，分析离散架构的"83%模糊性天花板"现象。

Result: 1. 揭示标准准确率隐藏的"自信错误"失败模式：模型在模糊数据上产生幻觉
2. 发现离散模型存在"83%模糊性天花板"：在模糊基准上稳定停滞
3. 证明这种停滞不是失败而是特征：模型在结构证据结束时停止
4. 显示在模糊数据上的标准训练会导致良性过拟合，从"不确定错误"迁移到"自信错误"
